# **[Trump set to re-establish Defense Department's 'warrior ethos' by restoring original name](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
President Donald Trump intends to restore the original name of the Department of Defense.Trump is expected to sign an executive order on Friday that will designate the Department of War as the DOD's secondary title, according to a White House fact sheet obtained by Fox News Digital. The change will also name Pete Hegseth the secretary of war.'Call the endless WARS what they are. And maybe then, we'll finally put an end to this cycle.'Further, the order seeks to make the alteration permanent by instructing Hegseth to propose legislative and executive actions.

# **[The real RFK threat](http://trk.libertyledger.-dUotdeu7lw)**
---
The United States Senate isn’t happy with Bobby Kennedy Jr. Senators say he's a grievous threat to the health and safety of Americans and that everything was fine before he came to town.These Republican and Democrat senators would rather see nothing change. They know the country gets sicker and fatter every day, but they don't want people fired over that. That attitude almost makes sense. Responsibility and accountability are rare birds in these parts, and most of these people have been in their offices for decades while our national downward slide continues uninterrupted.The same politicians who have held office for decades while autism rates exploded and Americans got fatter and sicker were angry.But what scares them most about RFK Jr. isn't what he’s doing; it’s what he’s saying.

subject: The cure for the radical left’s lunacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
For the American left, if you burn down whole city blocks and riot, you'll probably get a financial settlement.

|

| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfiet7ptjka9jdcsber23oa4c5se3b4i3qusfckg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7chim6ob4c3h2bs)
Friend,

For the American left, if you burn down whole city blocks and riot, you'll probably get a financial settlement.

If you invade the country, NGOs will pay your legal bills as you enjoy free housing and debit cards filled with taxpayer cash.

If you wave the Mexican flag while assaulting law enforcement, the news will call it a _"potent sign of protest."_

If you burn the American flag, they'll call it free speech.

But if you dare tear down a Pride flag, you face years in prison.

This demonstrates the lunacy of the radical left.

It’s also what’s at stake if we rest on our laurels instead of taking action to win in 2026, 2028, and beyond...

**Turning Point PAC has a plan to hold the line!**

We have identified 3 battleground states where we can have the most impact: Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire.

By establishing field offices and ramping up field operations in those states, [you and I can build a RED WALL](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztjp920q90k8031geikr9qfu56pfi7vr7d5ds8ko_rp22sh2s8i6epb7chim6ob4c3h2bs) to protect our America First victories.

To do so, we’ll need to raise $75,000 before the end of the month to fund this mission.

I know this is no small ask, but this is no small operation.

**Winning in Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire is critical to the enduring success of President Trump’s America First agenda.**

These states have a number of important factors that make them the perfect targets for our grassroots ground game.
1. They are considered contested states that are important to both parties.
2. These states are growing.
3. **Republicans outnumber Democrats.**

Plus, if we win these states, we don’t have to worry about winning in other states like Michigan, Pennsylvania, or Wisconsin.

That’s the truth.

_**Only three states stand between us and a series of America First victories in 2026, 2028, and beyond.**_

Please help us [finish what we started](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmfho0rtqanu1b0a2cp8gc9ir42al245m28dcu6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7chim6ob4c3h2bs) and secure an America First future by donating today.

[Donate $100 = Get Pres. Trump lithograph and _Right Wing Revolution_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zljo2esui9emnsi791tbqoaqjmceoek1tbndkq0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7chim6ob4c3h2bs)

For America,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

P.S. Now that you’ve heard our plan, I want you to understand what is at stake if we fail: our Republic.

Everything President Trump has achieved... _undone_.
Our America First movement... _finished_.
Our freedom... _surrendered_.
The future of America... _**in peril!**_

We CANNOT let that happen.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The People’s Pardon Of Rudy Giuliani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.

| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zl2akepn5kqj3u8ect680maansrr36mn2ipt84ro_rp22sh2s8i6epb7chimepj0cjh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zspnvujg3s51h50cm66gmfn50ea90g54gr9egjoo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7chimepj0cjh2bs)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---
[**So please, help me reach this life-saving (_truly!_) goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me. **](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmge4s0bun79mrsdc52kf2850ma3pf0gb91giemg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7chimepj0cjh2bs)
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztqm8306s3nqqjnmpb7jd0nor02odggak1oeq1h8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7chimepj0cjh2bs)
__
---
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zik6h420lpiuhl2unrfdv9119pfk04drqi65hv9g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7chimepj0cjh2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---

Rudy Giuliani

clean_body: My last chance. My Hail Mary. | Friend, Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice... As a matter of fact, it’s my last resort. You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – and KNOW – was RIGHT. The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses! No viable pardon from the President. No protection. No cavalry coming over the hill. But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful force absolutely can: THE AMERICAN PEOPLE. So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU. My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — — calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES. ...And we’re nearly there! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Many Republicans from across the third district joined Vice President JD Vance in La Crosse this weekend. Shoutout to Buffalo County, St. Croix County, Trempealeau County, and many others for making the trip! **Juneau County**
Republicans in Juneau County ended the summer by participating in parades! Love the inflatable elephant! **Monroe County**

name: Melissa Chaudhry from "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry
subject: When the Federal Government Lies: My Husband, a Disabled U.S. Veteran, in ICE Detention
body:
Lies from the judge, smears from DHS, harassing phone calls before 6am, the ICE tuberculosis outbreak, the Governor's office, strangled communication, media injustice...& searching for time to grieve.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tZWxpc3NhNGNvbmdyZXNzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.Fqj4H7w_NOgGO3ZPzbBFyuW4BvqWKCX3qcx_sFdUJOM?) for more

---
# [When the Federal Government Lies: My Husband, a Disabled U.S. Veteran, in ICE Detention](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=172935017&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyOTM1MDE3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTcxNDQ0MzksImV4cCI6MTc1OTczNjQzOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Z7GIokYVailThL3zNDZqQt1981tJwhrDtNfiRXoCaV0)
### Lies from the judge, smears from DHS, harassing phone calls before 6am, the ICE tuberculosis outbreak, the Governor's office, strangled communication, media injustice...& searching for time to grieve.
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Sep 6
---
| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=172935017&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyOTM1MDE3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NzE0NDQzOSwiZXhwIjoxNzU5NzM2NDM5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzI2MDExMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zcjkFNnrI9sU9hMSEq9hgxgPiqCbxheTkUWrQff7HPI&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=172935017&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyOTM1MDE3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTcxNDQ0MzksImV4cCI6MTc1OTczNjQzOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Z7GIokYVailThL3zNDZqQt1981tJwhrDtNfiRXoCaV0&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=172935017&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyOTM1MDE3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTcxNDQ0MzksImV4cCI6MTc1OTczNjQzOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Z7GIokYVailThL3zNDZqQt1981tJwhrDtNfiRXoCaV0)
---
| | [](https://substack..sTQA6noFbKBnyYUpPxAjUycudaSYHkquhjjPjw3jlBc?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/when-the-federal-government-lies?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Friends,
It's been a long few days.
First, on Wednesday, we got word that the judge who heard Zahid's motion to be released on bond at the hearing last Friday, broke her word to us, twice:
* She said she'd take "a few days" to look over the particulars of the case and make a decision. **She did not.** As soon as she got us all out of the courtroom (with lip service about "overwhelming community support" \- but thank you, all, for being there), she checked a few boxes and signed off that Zahid is **not** released on bond, she "does not have jurisdiction" to release him on bond, and there's no further explanation - no legal reasoning, no extenuating circumstances, nothing.
* She promised us she'd provide an "alternative finding" \- meaning that if, on appeal, a higher court found she _did_ have jurisdiction, that alternative "what she'd do if she could" decision would be ready to go, saving time at that later step. **She did not.** There are checkboxes on this form-letter of a "judicial" decision - the one that says "no alternative finding" is checked. The end.

Backing Zahid up in his self-representation, I poured days' worth of work into legal filings over the long weekend - hoping she didn't work on the weekends, hoping I could get supplemental material in front of her during those "few days" she was considering the case... \- all fruitless, as it turned out. Because she lied.
So did USCIS, at Zahid's interview. When the interview was over, they told him - and gave him a paper saying - they'd get back to him with a decision "in a few days." ICE was waiting outside the door.
And ICE told the Congressman that USCIS told them they'd denied Zahid's naturalization.
So how, exactly, did ICE find out _early enough to be waiting outside the door_ when USCIS didn't even tell Zahid he'd been denied?
These people LIE. ALL THE TIME.
I really wish it wasn't so.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=172935017&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTcyOTM1MDE3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTcxNDQ0MzksImV4cCI6MTc1OTczNjQzOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Z7GIokYVailThL3zNDZqQt1981tJwhrDtNfiRXoCaV0)
(Note: our Immigration Judges in Tacoma are the _**only ones in the country**_ who deny bond on jurisdictional basis. Three, out of six hundred. There's already a class action lawsuit against them about it. I mean - if they, whose court is located IN THE SAME BUILDING as the detention center, don't have authority to release someone, **who does?**)
((Second note: Zahid's judge was T. Scala. Her last job was **chief counsel for ICE**.))
(((Third note: over 100 immigration judges have quit or been fired since Trump took office. Despite a backlog of over 3.5 _million_ cases. What, exactly, are the odds anyone will get a full and fair hearing, justice, or redress, under these conditions? Let alone when those in power at the federal level are actively undermining the rule of law every way they can?)))
* * *
Then, on Thursday morning, before I even had a chance to write to y'all about the bond decision, DHS released their smear campaign - full of lies, innuendo, slander, and irrelevance. Addressed at length in previous posts.
I fully expect that they are lining up an angle of attack on Mayor Harrell, based on his admirable and courageous support for due process and humane treatment, for my husband and others. LA, DC, Chicago, now Portland - Seattle won't be far down that list.
Make no mistake - the constant, aggressive repetition of "criminal illegal" and "sanctuary jurisdiction" and "fraudster/sob story" are meant to _weaponize cruelty, discredit compassion,_ and _normalize violence_. They are conditioning the public like Pavlov's dog, to go on the attack anytime they say those words.
And, unfortunately, it's working on a lot of people.
* * *
And the reporters are still asking me "does this mean we can't trust the government?"
YES.
That's been true a long time, actually.
But sure, if you're ready, we can talk about it now.
* * *
Let me be very clear. **The Federal Government is being weaponized against the American people.**
ICE now enjoys a budget that makes it one of the top-10 best-funded militaries _on the planet_. Masked, unidentified "agents" are snatching people off the street and entrapping people who follow all the rules, then throwing them away in for-profit detention centers where they're fed worse than dogs. By the thousands. NOW. IN 2025. IN THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA.
* * *
Today - Friday - I was awoken at 5:52am by the phone ringing.
Usually, at that hour, it's Zahid, calling during breakfast, while he has just a little bit of quiet.
And the phone call came from the same number. Most of the calls I get from the detention center system when Zahid calls are from a +61 number. Odd, I've noticed.
This call also came from a +61 number, so I answered it.
But instead of the normal "You have a prepaid call from ____. Press one to accept the call." someone - white guy, assertive - immediately said "I know you answered, I can hear you moving the phone around. Is this Melissa Chaudhry?"
Disturbed, and sleepy, I said "speaking - who's this, and why are you calling me before 6am?"
No answer to my question about his identity, just "because it's important, did you know your husband's a fraud, he stole a credit card and used it over 20 times" and the passport, etc. "Why aren't you talking about this?"
I said, "I am talking about it, it's in my Substack (and gave the url) and I'm happy to talk to you about it too." And started giving the story openly, over interruptions that seemed like they were trying to sound intimidating but I wasn't intimidated, I have genuinely nothing to hide here and wasn't on the defensive in the least.
He said "I have the court records, ..." and I said "I know they're in the court records, but that wasn't how it happened..." and told the story about the credit card (left in his taxi, had been used dozens of times, including FOR TAXI FARES, why would my husband who drove a taxi 12-16hours a day need taxi fares?) , and was halfway through the one about the passport when the line went dead. He hung up on me, no way to call back.
**This is wrong**. Calling a spouse, with no ID, asking aggressive questions designed to plant doubt in my heart, intentionally engineered to drive us apart, to split me from my husband - this is low, the lowest of the low.
And it's routine, when they've decided to target someone. West Point graduate, American hero, Captain James Yee -- the [Muslim chaplain at Guantanamo Bay](https://substack.com/redirect/bf597ea4-9467-425e-98d7-5189ddb14f9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the one who spoke against torturing detainees - my husband's friend for the past 15 years... -- when they wrongfully detained him and threw over 80 charges at him, threatening him with death by firing squad, the first thing they did was photoshop pictures from a holiday party and tell his wife he was sleeping around behind her back. They succeeded, that time - she believed them, and divorced him. Couldn't handle the stress, but also, said "why would the government lie?"
Spoiler: it lies whenever it serves its interests. And its interests are _not_ truth, justice, or peace.
* * *
The first thing our daughter said, climbing into bed with me this morning, was "Where's Baba?"
Our son, who's just turned 9 months old, is starting to take his first steps.
* * *
I found out this evening, at the vigil - thank you all for coming - that there's a tuburculosis outbreak in that facility.
Which worries me even more, because Zahid is sick. Aches, chills, painful throat, fever for three nights running. So bad that he doesn't even want me to come visit.
* * *
On Wednesday morning, I spoke with Governor Ferguson's office. I received the welcome news that the 9th Circuit has just decided that _yes_ in fact, Washington State Department of Health _does_ have jurisdiction over the detention center, and _does_ have oversight authority and the right to demand access and assess conditions of detainment in that place.
But of course, GEO Group appealed that ruling.
Because they don't care how much time and money they waste. They are making money, and every shred of regulatory oversight or public pressure makes it harder for them to graft off our taxpayer money by depriving human beings of the very basics of dignity.
* * *
If you find it hard to believe that my husband would be targeted for his refusal to work for the FBI, I encourage you to read this article.
["American Muslim blames the FBI, saying he was tortured at their behest in United Arab Emirates"](https://substack.com/redirect/23ddc9f8-db43-413f-9a2e-e61456be611a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Writing this all out to you helps. I've been looking for days now for the time and space to simply grieve what they stole.
A loving husband. A tender father. A skillful craftsman. A passionate philosopher. A multilingual poet. An international traveler. A devoted brother, uncle, and son. A fiercely independent spirit. A generous and cheerful soul. A grieving and wounded man, who pushes himself to serve because that gives him purpose and keeps him going. A responsible caregiver. A loyal soldier - loyal to _principle_ , not mindlessly obedient. A true survivor, who transmutes pain into purpose.
How much has he brought to this country? To our communities? To our lives? To my soul?
I can't measure.
And I don't even have time to mourn.
* * *
It's 11:56pm on Friday night. I just got off the phone with him. Here's what he said:
* **He 's still sick.**
* He was able to see a medic during sick call today, and finally - _finally_ \- got the doctor's note saying he can have a pint of milk with each meal to help keep the burning in check.
* This outcome might have had something to do with me showing up at their front desk with an unopened box of baking soda, escalating to a supervisor, and insisting that my husband was suffering and needed help.
* Coupled with the media coverage and public pressure - thank you all - we got somewhere.
* _Now, to get better care for**everyone** in there... or better yet, to shut down the facility entirely, and every other one like it!_
* The medic told him to go get some tests. On his way to get those tests, he was told by a guard to go back to his pod. He's learned not to try to explain anything, the guards don't listen or care. So he still hasn't gotten those tests.
* **They 're severely limiting his communication.**
* All detainees get up to 120 minutes on the tablets every day. Heavily monitored, of course - but available for video calls, music, etc. Calls can be up to 30m.
* Three days running, Zahid's account has been arbitrarily limited to 20m, for _everything_ \- that's phone calls, legal research, the works. He can't communicate properly, and can't put any real effort into his case.
* Several times - and this happened on a call with me yesterday - the allotted time expires and cuts off even when he hasn't used all 20 minutes.
* They're deliberately trying to cut him off.
* _And they know who he is. Guards laugh and comment about him being "famous," the one on the media. _
* They've told him - and us - point blank that they don't know why he's in there.
* Zahid still calls them "bro." I hear him do it, during visits. Bless his generous heart.
* In addition to the tuburculosis outbreak, there's a **skin rash outbreak** of some kind in there. Great. Just great.

* * *
This case is not just about my husband.
It's about whether states will allow their residents to be dehumanized, detained in for-profit cages, and smeared by federal agencies acting without accountability.
Washington has both the authority and the responsibility to defend its people when the federal government abandons decency, legality, and humanity.
Oversight of detention centers, refusal to cooperate with unjust enforcement, protection of immigrant communities, and assertion of state sovereignty are not optional--they are necessary.
If the federal government will not honor its own Constitution, then the states must.
For Zahid, for our children, and for the thousands of families like ours, it's time to stand up.
If Washington dares to use its full power to defend its people, Zahid's fight will not be in vain--and our children will inherit a state that could have cowed, but chose courage.
THAT would be a legacy worth fighting for.

clean_body: Lies from the judge, smears from DHS, harassing phone calls before 6am, the ICE tuberculosis outbreak, the Governor's office, strangled communication, media injustice...& searching for time to grieve. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Lies from the judge, smears from DHS, harassing phone calls before 6am, the ICE tuberculosis outbreak, the Governor's office, strangled communication, media injustice...& searching for time to grieve. | | | Sep 6 | | | | | | | | | | | | Friends, It's been a long few days. First, on Wednesday, we got word that the judge who heard Zahid's motion to be released on bond at the hearing last Friday, broke her word to us, twice: She said she'd take "a few days" to look over the particulars of the case and make a decision. She did not. As soon as she got us all out of the courtroom (with lip service about "overwhelming community support" \- but thank you, all, for being there), she checked a few boxes and signed off that Zahid is not released on bond, she "does not have jurisdiction" to release him on bond, and there's no further explanation - no legal reasoning, no extenuating circumstances, nothing. She promised us she'd provide an "alternative finding" \- meaning that if, on appeal, a higher court found she did have jurisdiction, that alternative "what she'd do if she could" decision would be ready to go, saving time at that later step. She did not. There are checkboxes on this form-letter of a "judicial" decision - the one that says "no alternative finding" is checked. The end. Backing Zahid up in his self-representation, I poured days' worth of work into legal filings over the long weekend - hoping she didn't work on the weekends, hoping I could get supplemental material in front of her during those "few days" she was considering the case... \- all fruitless, as it turned out. Because she lied. So did USCIS, at Zahid's interview. When the interview was over, they told him - and gave him a paper saying - they'd get back to him with a decision "in a few days." ICE was waiting outside the door. And ICE told the Congressman that USCIS told them they'd denied Zahid's naturalization. So how, exactly, did ICE find out early enough to be waiting outside the door when USCIS didn't even tell Zahid he'd been denied? These people LIE. ALL THE TIME. I really wish it wasn't so. (Note: our Immigration Judges in Tacoma are the only ones in the country who deny bond on jurisdictional basis. Three, out of six hundred. There's already a class action lawsuit against them about it. I mean - if they, whose court is located IN THE SAME BUILDING as the detention center, don't have authority to release someone, who does?) ((Second note: Zahid's judge was T. Scala. Her last job was chief counsel for ICE.)) (((Third note: over 100 immigration judges have quit or been fired since Trump took office. Despite a backlog of over 3.5 million cases. What, exactly, are the odds anyone will get a full and fair hearing, justice, or redress, under these conditions? Let alone when those in power at the federal level are actively undermining the rule of law every way they can?))) Then, on Thursday morning, before I even had a chance to write to y'all about the bond decision, DHS released their smear campaign - full of lies, innuendo, slander, and irrelevance. Addressed at length in previous posts. I fully expect that they are lining up an angle of attack on Mayor Harrell, based on his admirable and courageous support for due process and humane treatment, for my husband and others. LA, DC, Chicago, now Portland - Seattle won't be far down that list. Make no mistake - the constant, aggressive repetition of "criminal illegal" and "sanctuary jurisdiction" and "fraudster/sob story" are meant to weaponize cruelty, discredit compassion, and normalize violence. They are conditioning the public like Pavlov's dog, to go on the attack anytime they say those words. And, unfortunately, it's working on a lot of people. And the reporters are still asking me "does this mean we can't trust the government?" YES. That's been true a long time, actually. But sure, if you're ready, we can talk about it now. Let me be very clear. The Federal Government is being weaponized against the American people. ICE now enjoys a budget that makes it one of the top-10 best-funded militaries on the planet. Masked, unidentified "agents" are snatching people off the street and entrapping people who follow all the rules, then throwing them away in for-profit detention centers where they're fed worse than dogs. By the thousands. NOW. IN 2025. IN THE UNITED STATES OF AMERICA. Today - Friday - I was awoken at 5:52am by the phone ringing. Usually, at that hour, it's Zahid, calling during breakfast, while he has just a little bit of quiet. And the phone call came from the same number. Most of the calls I get from the detention center system when Zahid calls are from a +61 number. Odd, I've noticed. This call also came from a +61 number, so I answered it. But instead of the normal "You have a prepaid call from . Press one to accept the call." someone - white guy, assertive - immediately said "I know you answered, I can hear you moving the phone around. Is this Melissa Chaudhry?" Disturbed, and sleepy, I said "speaking - who's this, and why are you calling me before 6am?" No answer to my question about his identity, just "because it's important, did you know your husband's a fraud, he stole a credit card and used it over 20 times" and the passport, etc. "Why aren't you talking about this?" I said, "I am talking about it, it's in my Substack (and gave the url) and I'm happy to talk to you about it too." And started giving the story openly, over interruptions that seemed like they were trying to sound intimidating but I wasn't intimidated, I have genuinely nothing to hide here and wasn't on the defensive in the least. He said "I have the court records, ..." and I said "I know they're in the court records, but that wasn't how it happened..." and told the story about the credit card (left in his taxi, had been used dozens of times, including FOR TAXI FARES, why would my husband who drove a taxi 12-16hours a day need taxi fares?) , and was halfway through the one about the passport when the line went dead. He hung up on me, no way to call back. This is wrong. Calling a spouse, with no ID, asking aggressive questions designed to plant doubt in my heart, intentionally engineered to drive us apart, to split me from my husband - this is low, the lowest of the low. And it's routine, when they've decided to target someone. West Point graduate, American hero, Captain James Yee -- the , the one who spoke against torturing detainees - my husband's friend for the past 15 years... -- when they wrongfully detained him and threw over 80 charges at him, threatening him with death by firing squad, the first thing they did was photoshop pictures from a holiday party and tell his wife he was sleeping around behind her back. They succeeded, that time - she believed them, and divorced him. Couldn't handle the stress, but also, said "why would the government lie?" Spoiler: it lies whenever it serves its interests. And its interests are not truth, justice, or peace. The first thing our daughter said, climbing into bed with me this morning, was "Where's Baba?" Our son, who's just turned 9 months old, is starting to take his first steps. I found out this evening, at the vigil - thank you all for coming - that there's a tuburculosis outbreak in that facility. Which worries me even more, because Zahid is sick. Aches, chills, painful throat, fever for three nights running. So bad that he doesn't even want me to come visit. On Wednesday morning, I spoke with Governor Ferguson's office. I received the welcome news that the 9th Circuit has just decided that yes in fact, Washington State Department of Health does have jurisdiction over the detention center, and does have oversight authority and the right to demand access and assess conditions of detainment in that place. But of course, GEO Group appealed that ruling. Because they don't care how much time and money they waste. They are making money, and every shred of regulatory oversight or public pressure makes it harder for them to graft off our taxpayer money by depriving human beings of the very basics of dignity. If you find it hard to believe that my husband would be targeted for his refusal to work for the FBI, I encourage you to read this article. Writing this all out to you helps. I've been looking for days now for the time and space to simply grieve what they stole. A loving husband. A tender father. A skillful craftsman. A passionate philosopher. A multilingual poet. An international traveler. A devoted brother, uncle, and son. A fiercely independent spirit. A generous and cheerful soul. A grieving and wounded man, who pushes himself to serve because that gives him purpose and keeps him going. A responsible caregiver. A loyal soldier - loyal to principle , not mindlessly obedient. A true survivor, who transmutes pain into purpose. How much has he brought to this country? To our communities? To our lives? To my soul? I can't measure. And I don't even have time to mourn. It's 11:56pm on Friday night. I just got off the phone with him. Here's what he said: He 's still sick. He was able to see a medic during sick call today, and finally - finally \- got the doctor's note saying he can have a pint of milk with each meal to help keep the burning in check. This outcome might have had something to do with me showing up at their front desk with an unopened box of baking soda, escalating to a supervisor, and insisting that my husband was suffering and needed help. Coupled with the media coverage and public pressure - thank you all - we got somewhere. Now, to get better care foreveryone in there... or better yet, to shut down the facility entirely, and every other one like it! The medic told him to go get some tests. On his way to get those tests, he was told by a guard to go back to his pod. He's learned not to try to explain anything, the guards don't listen or care. So he still hasn't gotten those tests. They 're severely limiting his communication. All detainees get up to 120 minutes on the tablets every day. Heavily monitored, of course - but available for video calls, music, etc. Calls can be up to 30m. Three days running, Zahid's account has been arbitrarily limited to 20m, for everything \- that's phone calls, legal research, the works. He can't communicate properly, and can't put any real effort into his case. Several times - and this happened on a call with me yesterday - the allotted time expires and cuts off even when he hasn't used all 20 minutes. They're deliberately trying to cut him off. And they know who he is. Guards laugh and comment about him being "famous," the one on the media. They've told him - and us - point blank that they don't know why he's in there. Zahid still calls them "bro." I hear him do it, during visits. Bless his generous heart. In addition to the tuburculosis outbreak, there's a skin rash outbreak of some kind in there. Great. Just great. This case is not just about my husband. It's about whether states will allow their residents to be dehumanized, detained in for-profit cages, and smeared by federal agencies acting without accountability. Washington has both the authority and the responsibility to defend its people when the federal government abandons decency, legality, and humanity. Oversight of detention centers, refusal to cooperate with unjust enforcement, protection of immigrant communities, and assertion of state sovereignty are not optional--they are necessary. If the federal government will not honor its own Constitution, then the states must. For Zahid, for our children, and for the thousands of families like ours, it's time to stand up. If Washington dares to use its full power to defend its people, Zahid's fight will not be in vain--and our children will inherit a state that could have cowed, but chose courage. THAT would be a legacy worth fighting for. You 're currently a free subscriber to "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry. #
* * *
---
# Our Kids Deman Action
---
| | |
---
| |
# **Every day, 125 people in our country are killed with guns. **
Even more are wounded by gunfire, and countless people and communities are traumatized and forever changed by the devastating impact of gun violence.

It is unacceptable that we accept these figures as normal.

As a teacher and principal, I have seen and felt the impact that losing a young person to gun violence has on a community firsthand.

As a student, I remember where I was on April 20, 1999, and the newfound fear and anxiety I felt going to school -- a place I have always held sacred.

It breaks my heart that students today have always lived with that fear, have always practiced active shooter drills and too often have lost friends to gun violence.

**It gives me so much hope that despite the "normalcy" of it all, they know it is anything but. **

Yesterday, students from all over our city hosted a walkout, demanding action to address the crisis of gun violence in our communities.

They know there isn't time to waste, it isn't enough to just acknowledge there is a problem and there isn't an age requirement to effect real change.

I was so honored to stand beside them, and I am committed to working with them towards real, proven solutions to address gun violence in our state:

**Intentionally creating places for our younger people to build community, reducing evictions and increasing housing security, and strengthening our education and workforce pipelines. **

Our students are leading with a sense of grace, conviction and dedication to a better future that we should demand of every leader.

I am so grateful to every single student who said, "**Enough is Enough**." Know that you are creating change.
---
| |
# See You Later, Sellouts
---
| | | |
---
| | I joined Democratic Statehouse colleagues at the Indianapolis Airport as Statehouse Republicans were jetting off to D.C. to demand accountability as they attempt to sell out Hoosiers for political favor.

To those Indiana Republicans who were beckoned to D.C. to be a part of this administration's latest scheme, **we see you.**

No matter how much you try to hide, Hoosiers see you too, and they deserve a whole lot better than your brand of politics.

I made two calls to my Republican colleagues at a press conference in the Indianapolis Airport
* If you support this ill-disguised power grab, commit to forgoing your taxpayer-funded daily allowance if we have a special session.
* Ditching Hoosiers for D.C.? Provide proof that not a single cent of taxpayer dollars was used for it.

It is time to put YOUR money where your mouth is, not just the taxpayer's dime. Because the single moms who can't afford child care, the seniors on fixed incomes getting priced out of their electric bills and the families who are doing everything right but just can't keep up with rising costs that are only continuing to go up shouldn't have to pick up the tab for your power grab. I refuse to stand by and watch the people I swore to serve be defrauded by our government. I refuse to stand by while the work of generations of freedom fighters, activists and ancestors sits in the crosshairs of those who wish to disenfranchise my community and others like it. I will fight this every step of the way, and I know I stand with a whole lot of folks in this state who are right there with me, because they are sick of being taken advantage of by a supermajority.
### Want to be involved?
> 🔴 **Call the Senate: (317) 232‐9400** 🔴 **Call the House: (317) 232‐9600** **🔴 Call the Governor: (317) 232‐4567**
>
## **Tell them NO to gerrymandering. **
---
* * *
# **Child Care Slashed While Republicans Continue to Consider Costly Special Session**
Thousands of Indiana families are facing devastating news: the state is slashing funding again for child care. Reimbursement rates for providers are being cut by up to 35%, a move that will force many centers to close, push parents out of the workforce and leave children without the care they depend on. At the same time, Republican leaders are considering spending $250,000 on a special legislative session--not to fix child care or support working families, but to redraw congressional maps at the request of Donald Trump. The session would cost taxpayers an estimated $33,000 per day. **What the Cuts Mean for Families** The Family and Social Services Administration (FSSA) announced reductions to payments for providers through the Child Care Development Fund (CCDF):
* 10% for infants and toddlers
* 15% for preschool-aged children
* 35% for school-aged children

The CCDF program currently serves more than 55,000 children across Indiana. With providers already stretched thin after cuts to On My Way Pre-K and capped CCDF enrollment, these new reductions are expected to drive many out of the system entirely. That means fewer child care options, longer waitlists and higher costs for parents. **What the Cuts Mean for Students** Indiana recently saw a 5% increase in reading scores across the state, reflecting progress in early education and literacy initiatives. However, this statewide shift has not been matched with the funding necessary to support the programs that make these gains possible. Early childhood programs that invest in reading, spelling and foundational learning have faced cuts, leaving students without critical resources. Funding was also left out for the Dolly Parton Imagination Library, which provides free books to Hoosier children aged 0-5, regardless of income. Eliminating or underfunding these programs undermines the progress Indiana has made in early literacy and puts children at a disadvantage before they even enter school. How do we expect our Hoosier children to succeed when the tools for success were taken from them? **Missed Opportunities to Act** During the 2025 legislative session, Senate Democrats put forward funding solutions and amendments to prevent this crisis. Republican leadership blocked those efforts. Instead, they approved:
* Over $500 million for private school vouchers for families making over $250,000
* Tax breaks for corporations for the next 50 years
* A helipad at the Governor's mansion

Now, while families face the loss of affordable child care, the Republican supermajority is considering pouring money into a Trump-backed special session to change the rules of Indiana's elections. **What Senate Democrats Are Fighting For** Senate Democrats are calling for immediate action to:
✅ Reverse the CCDF reimbursement cuts
✅ Fully fund the child care system Hoosier families rely on
✅ Reject any attempt to waste taxpayer dollars on a special session that serves political interests instead of working families
---
| | |
* * *
# Milestone Bill Signings
---
## _[HEA 1521](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=25aa6993c4489e9183ceab29a248574a3ff63025f19ad7b7d11e96ce4bcaa7ff1a9a09129c8d751eb172e6e97d0c6d1622e6da590f568969 "HEA 1521")_
---
| | |
---
HEA 1521 is the House version of my bill, SB 33, which puts guardrails and guidelines in place for how your genetic privacy is handled.

After working on this language for two years alongside Rep. Kyle Pierce, we finally passed it with bipartisan support.

**This bill ensures the following: **
* _Informed Consent:_ Require informed consent for collecting, storing and sharing genetic information.
* _Access and Control:_ Ensures individuals have the right to access their genetic information and have the ability to control who can access it.
* _Research Protections:_ Balance individual privacy with scientific research.
* _Non-Discrimination:_ Prohibit discrimination based on genetic information.

---
## _[HEA 1289](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=25aa6993c4489e9121acf159e39e7c0956e50a66c7d2f936073cef8457d7bbf728affe85a4d4af166698758005653d25dc8642c99f4e700e "HEA 1289")_
---
|
---

HEA 1289, a bill authored by Rep. Carey Hamilton, which I was proud to sponsor, expands the definition of workforce-related programs to include a work-based learning program or transitional jobs program.

This expansion would help organizations like [RecycleForce](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=25aa6993c4489e91ceab23185c09c0166200c49b1f9aa0e4dd461d292da94812956fe281a5b9b76f7ee2d291d93913a9c7d035a73710f6a5 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=9fc8bd7b244c7a5ecac6d0ad018e2e6f3e5c0331bd78d5f59b7791e22769728d963383e4d165d478add72f60fc0b9253e56881cd1d61aeab__;!!FlTQaCg!g0-c19Mw0hqUu5kjb8olM8o98ZJCIBO-oQ6n93m7DA29ohY9WaZUNY6rVkEHQEaOJhhH2_A4FusWabSpP4Gy7pMESYw$"), which is a great avenue for those released from incarceration to get workforce development and reduce recidivism.

This bill will make Indiana more competitive for federal funding that makes organizations like RecycleForce possible.
---
| | |
* * *
# Honoring the Legacy of Rep. Bill Crawford
---
| | |
---
Humbled and grateful don't do it justice.

Thank you to the Indy Black Chamber of Commerce for your tireless advocacy and support of Black and Minority owned businesses. The work you all do only adds to the significance of being the recipient of this year's Bill Crawford Politician of the Year Award.

**The weight of being honored with an award bearing the name of Rep. Bill Crawford is not lost on me.**

Rep. Crawford served District 98 in our Statehouse for 40 years, to my knowledge, the longest tenure for a Black state legislator in our country's history.

As the first Black Chairman of our Ways and Means Committee, he wrote three state budgets; his commitment to our state, our city and every Hoosier shining through each.

Rep. Crawford's dedication to public service, his care for his community and his consideration for those he needed a hand cannot be overstated and constantly serve as an inspiration.

I am so proud to call Indy home, to work for you and to stand alongside in our fight to make Indiana better every day.
---
| | |
* * *
# Hardon Education: Ribbon Cutting for New Campus
---
| | |
---
One step closer to addressing our nursing shortage

I was so glad to join Hardon Education at the ribbon-cutting ceremony for their brand new campus!

For over a decade, Hardon Education has strived to provide accessible education and training for folks working towards a career in health care -- offering accredited certification paths to roles such as medical assistant and nurse assistant.

With this new campus, I know they will continue to grow their impact on our community, prepare more students for our workforce and further address a critical shortage in our health care space.

Interested in learning more about Hardon education?
**[Visit their website here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=25aa6993c4489e912252af831f7154fb9bd18a557e4c4b837a6d7eb11e359a2a4bd5f116e870ac55189cbae7e9d6a40d0e1f6726fe8f5695 "Visit their website here")**
---
* * *
# **My Interim Committee Assignments**
---
|
---
| | |
* * *

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- Our Kids Deman Action | | | | | Every day, 125 people in our country are killed with guns. Even more are wounded by gunfire, and countless people and communities are traumatized and forever changed by the devastating impact of gun violence. It is unacceptable that we accept these figures as normal. As a teacher and principal, I have seen and felt the impact that losing a young person to gun violence has on a community firsthand. As a student, I remember where I was on April 20, 1999, and the newfound fear and anxiety I felt going to school -- a place I have always held sacred. It breaks my heart that students today have always lived with that fear, have always practiced active shooter drills and too often have lost friends to gun violence. It gives me so much hope that despite the "normalcy" of it all, they know it is anything but. Yesterday, students from all over our city hosted a walkout, demanding action to address the crisis of gun violence in our communities. They know there isn't time to waste, it isn't enough to just acknowledge there is a problem and there isn't an age requirement to effect real change. I was so honored to stand beside them, and I am committed to working with them towards real, proven solutions to address gun violence in our state: Intentionally creating places for our younger people to build community, reducing evictions and increasing housing security, and strengthening our education and workforce pipelines. Our students are leading with a sense of grace, conviction and dedication to a better future that we should demand of every leader. I am so grateful to every single student who said, "Enough is Enough." Know that you are creating change. | | See You Later, Sellouts | | | | | | I joined Democratic Statehouse colleagues at the Indianapolis Airport as Statehouse Republicans were jetting off to D.C. to demand accountability as they attempt to sell out Hoosiers for political favor. To those Indiana Republicans who were beckoned to D.C. to be a part of this administration's latest scheme, we see you. No matter how much you try to hide, Hoosiers see you too, and they deserve a whole lot better than your brand of politics. I made two calls to my Republican colleagues at a press conference in the Indianapolis Airport If you support this ill-disguised power grab, commit to forgoing your taxpayer-funded daily allowance if we have a special session. Ditching Hoosiers for D.C.? Provide proof that not a single cent of taxpayer dollars was used for it. It is time to put YOUR money where your mouth is, not just the taxpayer's dime. Because the single moms who can't afford child care, the seniors on fixed incomes getting priced out of their electric bills and the families who are doing everything right but just can't keep up with rising costs that are only continuing to go up shouldn't have to pick up the tab for your power grab. I refuse to stand by and watch the people I swore to serve be defrauded by our government. I refuse to stand by while the work of generations of freedom fighters, activists and ancestors sits in the crosshairs of those who wish to disenfranchise my community and others like it. I will fight this every step of the way, and I know I stand with a whole lot of folks in this state who are right there with me, because they are sick of being taken advantage of by a supermajority. Want to be involved? 🔴 Call the Senate: (317) 232‐9400 🔴 Call the House: (317) 232‐9600 🔴 Call the Governor: (317) 232‐4567 Tell them NO to gerrymandering. Child Care Slashed While Republicans Continue to Consider Costly Special Session Thousands of Indiana families are facing devastating news: the state is slashing funding again for child care. Reimbursement rates for providers are being cut by up to 35%, a move that will force many centers to close, push parents out of the workforce and leave children without the care they depend on. At the same time, Republican leaders are considering spending $250,000 on a special legislative session--not to fix child care or support working families, but to redraw congressional maps at the request of Donald Trump. The session would cost taxpayers an estimated $33,000 per day. What the Cuts Mean for Families The Family and Social Services Administration (FSSA) announced reductions to payments for providers through the Child Care Development Fund (CCDF): 10% for infants and toddlers 15% for preschool-aged children 35% for school-aged children The CCDF program currently serves more than 55,000 children across Indiana. With providers already stretched thin after cuts to On My Way Pre-K and capped CCDF enrollment, these new reductions are expected to drive many out of the system entirely. That means fewer child care options, longer waitlists and higher costs for parents. What the Cuts Mean for Students Indiana recently saw a 5% increase in reading scores across the state, reflecting progress in early education and literacy initiatives. However, this statewide shift has not been matched with the funding necessary to support the programs that make these gains possible. Early childhood programs that invest in reading, spelling and foundational learning have faced cuts, leaving students without critical resources. Funding was also left out for the Dolly Parton Imagination Library, which provides free books to Hoosier children aged 0-5, regardless of income. Eliminating or underfunding these programs undermines the progress Indiana has made in early literacy and puts children at a disadvantage before they even enter school. How do we expect our Hoosier children to succeed when the tools for success were taken from them? Missed Opportunities to Act During the 2025 legislative session, Senate Democrats put forward funding solutions and amendments to prevent this crisis. Republican leadership blocked those efforts. Instead, they approved: Over $500 million for private school vouchers for families making over $250,000 Tax breaks for corporations for the next 50 years A helipad at the Governor's mansion Now, while families face the loss of affordable child care, the Republican supermajority is considering pouring money into a Trump-backed special session to change the rules of Indiana's elections. What Senate Democrats Are Fighting For Senate Democrats are calling for immediate action to: ✅ Reverse the CCDF reimbursement cuts ✅ Fully fund the child care system Hoosier families rely on ✅ Reject any attempt to waste taxpayer dollars on a special session that serves political interests instead of working families | | | Milestone Bill Signings "HEA 1521" | | | HEA 1521 is the House version of my bill, SB 33, which puts guardrails and guidelines in place for how your genetic privacy is handled. After working on this language for two years alongside Rep. Kyle Pierce, we finally passed it with bipartisan support. This bill ensures the following: Informed Consent: Require informed consent for collecting, storing and sharing genetic information. Access and Control: Ensures individuals have the right to access their genetic information and have the ability to control who can access it. Research Protections: Balance individual privacy with scientific research. Non-Discrimination: Prohibit discrimination based on genetic information. "HEA 1289" | HEA 1289, a bill authored by Rep. Carey Hamilton, which I was proud to sponsor, expands the definition of workforce-related programs to include a work-based learning program or transitional jobs program. This expansion would help organizations like "$", which is a great avenue for those released from incarceration to get workforce development and reduce recidivism. This bill will make Indiana more competitive for federal funding that makes organizations like RecycleForce possible. | | | Honoring the Legacy of Rep. Bill Crawford | | | Humbled and grateful don't do it justice. Thank you to the Indy Black Chamber of Commerce for your tireless advocacy and support of Black and Minority owned businesses. The work you all do only adds to the significance of being the recipient of this year's Bill Crawford Politician of the Year Award. The weight of being honored with an award bearing the name of Rep. Bill Crawford is not lost on me. Rep. Crawford served District 98 in our Statehouse for 40 years, to my knowledge, the longest tenure for a Black state legislator in our country's history. As the first Black Chairman of our Ways and Means Committee, he wrote three state budgets; his commitment to our state, our city and every Hoosier shining through each. Rep. Crawford's dedication to public service, his care for his community and his consideration for those he needed a hand cannot be overstated and constantly serve as an inspiration. I am so proud to call Indy home, to work for you and to stand alongside in our fight to make Indiana better every day. | | | Hardon Education: Ribbon Cutting for New Campus | | | One step closer to addressing our nursing shortage I was so glad to join Hardon Education at the ribbon-cutting ceremony for their brand new campus! For over a decade, Hardon Education has strived to provide accessible education and training for folks working towards a career in health care -- offering accredited certification paths to roles such as medical assistant and nurse assistant. With this new campus, I know they will continue to grow their impact on our community, prepare more students for our workforce and further address a critical shortage in our health care space. Interested in learning more about Hardon education? "Visit their website here" My Interim Committee Assignments | | | | News Around Our State | | | "" "" "" "" COMMUNITY RESOURCES To view my community resources guide, "click here. name: Team Downing
subject: We're waiting on you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
The Left won’t like your answer...

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._4LTk8XhNBEtBq9w)Trump Poised to Remove Noncitizens from Census🚨**BREAKING NEWS:** President Trump is again leading the charge to protect the integrity of our democracy – **this time by ensuring that only U.S. citizens are counted in the official U.S. Census.**
Peter, for far too long, blue states have inflated their political power by counting illegal immigrants in their census totals, gaining extra congressional seats and electoral votes as a result.
_That ends now._
This bold move strikes at the heart of the Democrats’ scheme to manipulate our system and tip the scales in their favor.
This is about restoring fairness, upholding the rule of law, and ensuring that American citizens, **not illegal aliens** , determine our political future.
But make no mistake: the Left is desperate to block this effort, because without inflated census numbers, they’ll lose their power. That’s why we need every Patriot to step up now. **
****[Sign our Official Petition to Remove Illegal Aliens from the U.S. Census:](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-Pg)**[ SIGN THE PETITION
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Don’t let them rig the system any longer. Demand a fair, lawful count now.**_Stand with President Trump and defend the integrity of our elections and the U.S. Census._**
Thank you, Peter,
Conservative News Alerts (via Team Downing)| |

## F-35 Jets Sent to Caribbean Drug Fight
The U.S. will [deploy 10 F-35 fighter jets to Puerto Rico](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMGupCAQRb9Gd3RKEB0XLGbj7s12lgal0HqhwUDZHf9-wvQnvE3lJjc5qXP_fi1flgLF_Y99omGflojvEpAZ8-KV_kYuDs-QbnQYUiwdZwqLBKkFTAKGxVkK99K3znhEiapF04167LSc9NgeRutB9uBRK1xXGHup3K_BqdFN2CHYtSVTaTDB0AFINT6s3wa3yl5t2gNuqukBHXHKj-9EkQ_04U4vzI8tPdtgDuazNOp3I-dGzvE-U-FaNXKu4EbOMNVT01VE9fukjxfFXXQgPO0HYxZVWHAS54WZk8i0JUHxUwu7W4qFhcvXLjabGUMRJV15w8pss3Hnm0KgMoxND_vTUvj_Jf9o2peR_wIAAP__P4aNQg) in an expansion of its drug cartel fight, just days after a lethal strike by US forces destroyed a boat the White House said was carrying a 11` Venezuelan narco-terrorists. On Thursday, two armed [Venezuelan F-16 fighter jets flew over the USS Jason Dunham](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OtCAYha8GOwy-_BgLiq-xm6_d0jDwMjJBMMBo3KvfuLew3UlOck6e5-uxPEyIIb3-mw1183lJeNaIrWFZPJdvbNXhHvOFDmNOdWglxAUYSMomytTiTIjXIjqnPSIg71APoxwHCZMcu1VLxTjA4JSTAqyfwCshlLN8kMICjl3Q9xqbmBoYAz72xlvlniC4lZ6h5UQwdKHl0r9zSG1FH698YOlt3rqo19b2Svg_AjOB-TzP3j7rTXH3BOY7EpgPTPj9wWioD6-1YaE3G03muGhdw05b-Ww73Yz7lExg7op2-xliDFWNRLDXZkL8vWx_8nRo-AkAAP__7NZ9Gw), according to multiple Defense Department officials who described the action as a "show of force."

Apart from the Dunham, the Trump administration has deployed [at least seven more warships to the Caribbean](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOqzAQgOHTmI7IDLYJhYvX0OW1WyKDx2GiwUa2k4g9_Sp7ha1_6Sv-r9t8c8QU7__djraGNEd8F8ZaMc-h1w-sxePB6USPnGLpaiaeQYJu5dhKM3tHfM6q8TYgAvYN2m7QQ6dh1EOz2XFRI6jFhaD6BbzxDjtjdGdwQRyGriH70eQoTScl9MPFhdX4BVS_6iBx7YWS6KmmfHkkinXDwGd6Yb6saW_YbrUeRfT_BEwCprrhRsyfJmA6EtN6Cpg8BowFBUxaXa9K6_aFEb-fyK5dXa7IpX2Wdiem6vLZVoyFUiwCpiZbf7yJmYoZhJL33dGv39Q_DXtZ-AkAAP__nLF_6g), along with more than 4,000 Marines and sailors in its effort to combat drug cartels in the region. The F-35s—the U.S. military’s most advanced fighter jets in service—are due to arrive next week, a source close to the Trump administration said.
## Tesla Offers $1 Trillion Comp Plan for Elon
Tesla has proposed a new compensation agreement for CEO Elon Musk, [potentially worth up to nearly $1 trillion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAURL_G7rDggnFcULzGXV67pUXgEhNhsOBuIv_9yvsLW89oRud83de7jSnm53-7o6FQ1oyflpAI6xrk-EJqHo9UTvSYSm6CakwrcBgZnxnXq7cxnavqvQmIgLJHI6ZxEiPM49Rv5sadCqCU1-FhZyukdje8TQBeam859NFca3zmWnAOchpscNo_QEk3Bo5Odoqjj1Tq8Cox04YhneWNdXBl75PZiI7WyX8dLB0sIWabHQ6n3Uq5Gh0sF1IHC2FLlpUQsDb2nY-KDj1mQs8Eu7BSLJkJIWYlQMlhoz311fjjc0VNT53iz93G9HtMf7L1NvATAAD__8cKfig), a massive package without precedent in corporate America.

The plan, which requires shareholder approval, is meant to incentivize Musk to spend more time with the struggling car company. The full payout requires him to hit several aggressive benchmark targets. To reach the first target, Tesla needs to reach a [market valuation of $2 trillion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFyhCAQBuCnwQ5nWUTPgiIp7C5NipQOyuJxh-IAdze-fca8Qurd-ef__p_reDU--G35Mivp4uK40TsHKoXS6KS6U8mW9hAPshTilkVJPowIqDj0HNrRGh-OsamsdkRIsiItOtUJhb3qqpt2oieYJuskQH9pGiGVBSXR9bK9TKqvvD7ToIdWAKDsauPm1k7YyFk5oFmyBsj6ElN9j34rN3LhiC9K9RzXKuhbKXtm8oPhwHAw03wK6iWeZ4bD5zP7jXJmOLx9ou8S08FwODF8feYHD34jLvjpCj5ufDcH3838MAvxQjkYLlDhRSlUVdJ2f59_ue1YA8tqfPirUf613UvjbwAAAP__NQyCWA) and achieve 20 million vehicle deliveries, vs. fewer than 2 million in 2024. Eventually, for the full payout, Tesla would need to reach a market cap of $8.5 trillion. The proposal would also require 1 million robotaxis in commercial operation and the delivery of 1 million artificial intelligence bots. Musk would need to remain with Tesla for at least seven and a half years to cash out on any stock, and 10 years to earn the full amount.
## Chart: How Salaries Shift Over a Career
A new visualization of Bureau of Labor Statistics data highlights [how salaries evolve throughout the career](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQAL8GOiNjGxwKF9fQ5dor0YLXsNGCke0E8fenvF94_WhGmn_P6QnEdKx_YUdXQpwOvDJjKZimoLsXluzx5HijR45HbksinpRUnZCDkP3kgfieTO1dQFSoa3St7WzbqaGz9eaktcrIhx6GWZlO-9DKYGCepV1UMOFRk_va5CD7VkqlbQNh6f2sjF66IHHRlZHoqcTUvCIdZcPAd_xgapa41-y2Us5c6T-VGis1XtfVfCi_gRc4qQBTLl-wUuOyQSroxY6e4BBvkUUGhkSYxXwLWFGsKb7PSo11cv68iJlybysj1x2If3rlV5M-Tv0PAAD__6BTfAU) of the average employee (and not an Elon Musk). Teen workers (ages 16–19) earn the least, with a median salary of $33,280, almost half the national median of $62,192. Pay rises quickly in the 20s and 30s, reaching a median salary of $59,228 for those aged 25–34. Salaries peak between 45 and 54 at $70,824, reflecting career stability and leadership roles, before tapering slightly as a person ages through their 50s and early 60s. Interestingly, workers over 65 still earn a median pay of around $62,296, slightly more than younger professionals in their late 20s and early 30s. [See the chart here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQAL8GOiNjGxwKF9fQ5dor0YLXsNGCke0E8fenvF94_WhGmn_P6QnEdKx_YUdXQpwOvDJjKZimoLsXluzx5HijR45HbksinpRUnZCDkP3kgfieTO1dQFSoa3St7WzbqaGz9eaktcrIhx6GWZlO-9DKYGCepV1UMOFRk_va5CD7VkqlbQNh6f2sjF66IHHRlZHoqcTUvCIdZcPAd_xgapa41-y2Us5c6T-VGis1XtfVfCi_gRc4qQBTLl-wUuOyQSroxY6e4BBvkUUGhkSYxXwLWFGsKb7PSo11cv68iJlybysj1x2If3rlV5M-Tv0PAAD__6BTfAU).

On this day in 1901, was shot twice in the chest by anarchist Leon Czolgosz at the Pan-American Exhibition in Buffalo. He rose briefly before collapsing, saying, “ Be careful how you tell my wife.” **Did you know there were 570 tunnels in the U.S., and over 100 of them are in California alone? On Thursday, two armed , according to multiple Defense Department officials who described the action as a "show of force." Apart from the Dunham, the Trump administration has deployed , along with more than 4,000 Marines and sailors in its effort to combat drug cartels in the region. The F-35s—the U.S. military’s most advanced fighter jets in service—are due to arrive next week, a source close to the Trump administration said. Tesla Offers $1 Trillion Comp Plan for Elon Tesla has proposed a new compensation agreement for CEO Elon Musk, , a massive package without precedent in corporate America. The plan, which requires shareholder approval, is meant to incentivize Musk to spend more time with the struggling car company. The full payout requires him to hit several aggressive benchmark targets. To reach the first target, Tesla needs to reach a and achieve 20 million vehicle deliveries, vs. fewer than 2 million in 2024. Eventually, for the full payout, Tesla would need to reach a market cap of $8.5 trillion. The proposal would also require 1 million robotaxis in commercial operation and the delivery of 1 million artificial intelligence bots. Musk would need to remain with Tesla for at least seven and a half years to cash out on any stock, and 10 years to earn the full amount. Chart: How Salaries Shift Over a Career A new visualization of Bureau of Labor Statistics data highlights of the average employee (and not an Elon Musk). Teen workers (ages 16–19) earn the least, with a median salary of $33,280, almost half the national median of $62,192. Pay rises quickly in the 20s and 30s, reaching a median salary of $59,228 for those aged 25–34. Salaries peak between 45 and 54 at $70,824, reflecting career stability and leadership roles, before tapering slightly as a person ages through their 50s and early 60s. Interestingly, workers over 65 still earn a median pay of around $62,296, slightly more than younger professionals in their late 20s and early 30s. . | The following stories are featured exclusively on The Flyover Podcast—a daily show that gives you the most important headlines in under 15 minutes, straight from the heart of the country. ➤ Officials are concerned after payrolls increased by only 22,000 in August, far below forecasted numbers. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. ## Tesla Offers Musk $1 Trillion Package
Austin-based Tesla has drawn up a compensation package for CEO Elon Musk that would be worth [up to $1 trillion](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAYhJ8Gb1iAjQkDQxdv6drR-gM_CQoGC2gcv33lSn2Cbnc66U7ffV2XK4QY0v0TVjTt7fOScK8RW8OyYMypthJiDDm5HCOU7D2WtggmJGWasmlxEOKxjJ0zN-Y079BwJRWX03jR3cNoJxmbmL1o7cXgOVg1MGU5qFF6eZu6YM4yptnEOeNC9U4q7gYuRu-AWwtkZOhCy6VvD2z4hurjkV9YepvXLppHa1slwwcRMxHzvu-9vdWT4syJmE9JxHzC0PW7PmnDGoEm3KnN64apQgs50Q0OuoF9wh0pp3_YRMxdMW7bT1snRUZ2XyHE3_H2v8teRvwEAAD__9CEgo0) if the electric vehicle maker hits a set of aggressive targets over the next decade, according to a filing published Friday. The package, which could make Musk the [world’s first trillionaire](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkT2O4zAMRk9jdwxkWbYmhYtt0s22WxqMRMdEaMmQmGRy-4V3MCfYisXj38P353P-RBZOt9-40aRfS54TvaqQKpWZJKeqhUU4p5hFsORloaKzNXYAcwYzzhFZ3rNr43Q18dy1NHV-8N0wuo9zu07Oj4MnxHCNo-tD74bem_HDIHrno-9bno5l5mzGrjOd9ac4-C72nXVLxC4EbJyhyJrLSVdS-sK6yDs_qZxC3lqZVtW9Nv2vxl4ae7nzhvo8UGMvh8tRUDkneOUisbGXQwu2R71DyA-JcKVvVGHhUhV-jJELwSNFKpDoBUpVEHZ8w47hjjcCEgpaOMCTwspBqEJdsdCaJVKpEPK2U6rf13-GSr5m5VABi_LCgVGAk5II3ygFgphvBFoe2w57Fj562zLF_XV8VUffOHPbkOWfvv5faM_J_g0AAP__lqK1kg), is meant to incentivize the world’s richest man to prioritize his energies on Tesla—something shareholders have suggested he has neglected while working with the White House. The company’s aggressive targets include reaching a market cap of $8.5 trillion in 10 years—eight times its current value—growing vehicle deliveries by about 10 times, and producing 1 million humanoid robots. Shareholders must approve the package in a November vote.
## Texas Republicans Sue for Closed Primaries
The Republican Party of Texas (RPT) has sued the state to [end open primaries](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO5CAURE-DMyzA2IwDgk2czaYbWr_hM0aLDYI_7fbtV27tDSatkp6q3p_P9RNiisfXb9jR0ivk9cCzJSTCumLKR6MaU4r58DklqDkErLQqoUYuZi6m1UNM16o7bx_Cz7JDK81o5Djpj7nbbBhgCCM4wMEMZnqMk9PDh3YyODPNOnTR3jAxi0lKIZXp_WikH6TSwYN0DpgW6CPl2tOGhC9oIV35ibV3ee-S3YhKY8MvphamlvM8-78vOO6SqeV-w9RScooUHST-P6hYvh8pOjh4gUoXz4G_2bx9Y-ONgJA3uBrPBQ9eatyhRmz8GXMCwsYjNR4qIm8F0W1MLV21vpy3rTYZpsXXDjG9R9LP1D6t-hcAAP__kwiSiA), arguing that allowing Democrats to vote in the Republican primary is a violation of GOP voters' First Amendment right of association. The current rules, in place for decades, allow citizens to vote in either Republican or Democratic primaries, but not in both primaries during the same election cycle. _“The First Amendment entitles political parties to determine who they associate with to select their nominees for public office,”_ the RPT argues in the suit, which follows a 2024 by-law change that only allows registered Republicans to vote in Republican primaries. The lawsuit was filed with a U.S. District Court in North Texas and suggests that [crossover voting](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHSoyAURp8GOxwgKLGg2MYu227poFz0zl7BARKTt98x-wh__835zpw_j-nhkDCuv90Otr5DmiKchaBWyBNQiqVmJMIUfSJyOYUAuU5KqI6LgYt-8g7pM-nG21n4QTZgpemM7Hp9H5rNGjNobTonoO_vS78YN5u7CmIIRsxBhQbtBROD6KUUUpnWd0b6m1Q6eCeXxTEtwGNNua0bVHi7EuiTXpDbJe0N2a3Wo7DbL6ZGpsbzPFu3u0s6HZgi_N8xNc6UVqbG642pcWBq1EyNy4YH356x8i-ar-ngAQk4ubM8sfIC8BfjyhdKBTw_Ml50KE22_jivNqU3TIt1d0hfpfqzkC-r_gUAAP__swKJhA) allows Democrats to sway GOP primary elections.
## Tiny Homes Coming to Fast-Growing Town
Two-story tiny homes are now for sale in North Texas as homebuilder Lennar launches its “[Dream Collection](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO6yAURVeDOyx4BhMXFL9xl99OaRF4xEgYLPwUJ7sfxVuY-l6dI52f-3J3Kafy_O82tPSOdSl4HhmJsC2YazmopZxTLaHm7FqNERstIEBzMXExLsGl_FlUF-xDhEl2aKXRRupR3aZutehvMT6UUPqBUkd9A2_8NDk_mEGbwXfJfmFiEqOUQoLpgzYyDBJUDE5675gSGBLV1tOKhG93xPypL2y9r1uX7Uq0H2z4x2BmMJ_n2fu11fJdGcxr3fBgMLtGyWdkMO8tFY9UC79gnFL58OvGM5biGgcpBhhH6Pd175oN-_lNcIyGKfHcXMqXmf7W62XhNwAA__9qkIDX)” in Princeton, the fastest-growing city in the U.S. [Each unit](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQhZ8Gd7YA_2AKim3c3W23tCZmHCONmQhQSN5-Zb_C7Uaa7xwdff9-1h8IFOLzL5zoymfnNWLNhKVgWpE45pICUeDomQgS7zumsmqpx1baVk6rh0DfdWi8e0hvVYNOmdGocRpm2xzO-FlKC_jYduXn3hqNcrRosJ_mh_RzE9xVJq2clJJKm86PRvle6WH3oLYNxCDRh8KpKwcW_EDe6ctvTN3GZ0PuKOWVRf9H6EXopdbaEcYI91voJWJtDz4xC73caaGXDLGFWDgGFnrZOL4xZRR62YkTtCeC53qBPiGc7cZEuJXA8UKQyn0MUs3DqJUd-yY5_6qXpzwZMcjnCYHueeV3Ut9O_w8AAP__VZ2Mtg) measures 661 square feet and includes one bedroom, two bathrooms, a loft, and a combined kitchen-living area, with prices starting in mid-$100,000s The homes [target first-time](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQhZ8Gd0QwBhMXLrZxd7fd0uJnSJDGEOHZ6-TtV95XuPXROTrf9-dr-_KFSn389jsu_M5tq3gehMzYN6RWD-6FqLSaGpHvLWfsvIECK9Us1bQlX-izmSEtQaVZD7hoZ522k7nPw3OBMZsQwHoFFhJMd4DZuBDBaIfWhKEs15ia1aS10uBuyTqdRg0mJ69j9MIoTIVbv_ETGd_-yPRp39hvse0DLU_m1yHGXwJWAet5nrcze3-FAlbfuURCAevFJWClFj0JWGMjKlXG9rfyR8D66qVG5FYll_qRz7bjIbkQ-QfK7Pt-leHu5BQsBhydHO18lybMTgaEJLMbzYgJcUx66Et6nZe3Y3LCqMfuC_2_yz-T_L3AvwAAAP__sBuQIw) home buyers in an area where the housing supply is limited and space for new development is tight. Residents will have access to a community pool, a playground, and a community center.

Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Tesla Offers Musk $1 Trillion Package Austin-based Tesla has drawn up a compensation package for CEO Elon Musk that would be worth if the electric vehicle maker hits a set of aggressive targets over the next decade, according to a filing published Friday. The package, which could make Musk the , is meant to incentivize the world’s richest man to prioritize his energies on Tesla—something shareholders have suggested he has neglected while working with the White House. The company’s aggressive targets include reaching a market cap of $8.5 trillion in 10 years—eight times its current value—growing vehicle deliveries by about 10 times, and producing 1 million humanoid robots. Shareholders must approve the package in a November vote. Texas Republicans Sue for Closed Primaries The Republican Party of Texas (RPT) has sued the state to , arguing that allowing Democrats to vote in the Republican primary is a violation of GOP voters' First Amendment right of association. The current rules, in place for decades, allow citizens to vote in either Republican or Democratic primaries, but not in both primaries during the same election cycle. “The First Amendment entitles political parties to determine who they associate with to select their nominees for public office,” the RPT argues in the suit, which follows a 2024 by-law change that only allows registered Republicans to vote in Republican primaries. The lawsuit was filed with a U.S. District Court in North Texas and suggests that allows Democrats to sway GOP primary elections. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b09d245da6f64e7c992da5d69c488790&_e=fvkVXkY9UwvK42Dbb2_KKlfdsvzWpgOCxONpqDT8NOfJ2zSP6IO_CiiUWKWxhRGlPzIfee8KpY2RiJhxvUlcKZLKFOgilKmdpk8IaTLGwQmkQ8rBHTwS6T2hUI5rUSHnNjInwn3CcAIXvHTgeq_f9ADETshuAC7kBj8fHDAp6FqBW7R81I9w0Bur--ZEtmZPibGuVPV-i1xcdFL7VkPthOVYSiYrgQTac3BnEn0EVKikhS2-TEnTDntvqy9JUdZsO8rvo3gv3_FHwvdQiIslKZCtGrRBhv-VNNPFFrB89DWMv8RbcavF42c8RpIw2ILxNAWszXs8_gEEYes3hrCSeZXmIa_QP13iCzP-ox5KL--UIGsyndFrMc41sd-bu5h10_dkEZiz74eeciQGTycDuLG1n-aPjWE4Kb3uiDs1rYD2yJbsgKfHur6j2HKGOg_9JZeQ7U88AVlqHfqrUFjqHUbrCanZ5v1O8aaZuhd9rYAzx4W8njV68j-IAjtcyrhbIgl3TNl7NKDTCd7B4NeMGl_qvtN1yZGmpObW89wu-2Dd_xzKgdpRhfMkCjOBkqfDn_lZ8285GpWimlClCYWxLQwEblqAW0NENovfnBHXJanJmCzeS7_KoDy7f9nTBbsKDvJhMM7aEw-GWTZsnzyw8w%3D%3D)

Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b09d245da6f64e7c992da5d69c488790&_e=fvkVXkY9UwvK42Dbb2_KKlfdsvzWpgOCxONpqDT8NOfJ2zSP6IO_CiiUWKWxhRGlPzIfee8KpY2RiJhxvUlcKZLKFOgilKmdpk8IaTLGwQmkQ8rBHTwS6T2hUI5rUSHnNjInwn3CcAIXvHTgeq_f9ADETshuAC7kBj8fHDAp6FqBW7R81I9w0Bur--ZEtmZPibGuVPV-i1xcdFL7VkPthGJgGboW7wVFvQOM5hK1jsgnXmI3QtgmwIyf4EA5ej6xuWRQ_AbCGbY-QaXKiNZ6GSrYbxtzqomjXxLju6mmRusL1KeY5ZmxEDrvrhjnV9BnteObFcGXsvFRLO9IgbwOlinEriZoZnkahYLCv2IbvJaqzEuaowkUqyGGRYE072OlbMwPG3IDGw3pjGMLKs3yY0kQAjV_OUdknVYmGYLWbKVQPFQObJJxl6Q6_ZgvdBOftUdxf_NGH-qDZWjHZLmVc16g24KOklZh0ufOGfh__7uwqcuEEocd1GBOs0fxGZBdR8xzl0adtB2f-QHizYRB-S8ytQd5Oil3acitAXQyV78-GySGd3IDFmKeMNRu5538MGvDgdqa2ezaMrBLM54ZycSeRDgxebHtZAOaQuEDCN5XwRLXBp-rSxD1eRAg9aYx3YHLAU4eVk8FTslfC2CQEA%3D%3D)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b09d245da6f64e7c992da5d69c488790&_e=fvkVXkY9UwvK42Dbb2_KKlfdsvzWpgOCxONpqDT8NOfJ2zSP6IO_CiiUWKWxhRGlPzIfee8KpY2RiJhxvUlcKZLKFOgilKmdpk8IaTLGwQmkQ8rBHTwS6T2hUI5rUSHnNjInwn3CcAIXvHTgeq_f9ADETshuAC7kBj8fHDAp6FqBW7R81I9w0Bur--ZEtmZPibGuVPV-i1xcdFL7VkPthHjOcQU7hn1FBLl7AAiKGvR3mZW1KwDUwFsw7cTfaRl15GW6tdQU2anuuqROivAT6OgBvSu2_ydJJfq3R2F8yInipXHpA1O47WW4wicU-hUQ-jb7-8dseZCpz9BkxFjIv0ciadOIZzYS6zFbl3j3aulVQDEZl0BaTlQl75oRT5iQ2NRzL7XSluHAD33QVHamVyCPuc7BX7P7mW17dU522fIQHI3KxnI_p_SLtVwTFE9VcvmXnGKbQ8WF6iP0Ig2ZYq8v59T1JzLNATVlbbq5iV1Wjh96dxvYljzebgNvl8jD6TpnFMbrhiF_xaYFj3re34jtWC8wJSIkdQaxu3yR7jzXkeVbyXINYa5ehV_sGAUJ6aWbtF-QlnIJzHIQItXYu5m48W64OViBLL_yfLaY_NxO31S4iXcJtTv5gQ-E7OxhqSni3Umm6zjqAc-UMOwb4g%3D%3D)
