body:
An outright Marxist...
| **_A SECURE BRIEFING AUTHORIZED BY REP. JIM JORDAN_**
---
Friend,
---
I never thought I’d see something like this happen in the United States of America...
---
_**But fueled by millions of dollars from radical Left-wing donors, socialists and outright communists are _TAKING_ _OVER_ the Democrat Party to force their Marxist agenda on the American people! **_
---
_**...Mamdani and Progressives Rake In Cash as Democrats Remain Divided**_
**“Far left’s prolific fundraising shows appeal to party’s base”**
[Source: _Wall Street Journal_]
---
The unfortunate reality is that in politics, money often leads to political power.
---
The Democrats are only going to get _more extreme_ as they become more and more dependent on cash from radicals who hate America and the values that make our country great.
---
I don’t even want to begin to imagine all the horrible things these extremists would do if they took back the People’s House in the midterms...
---
_**But I know the first thing on the agenda would be _IMPEACHING_ President Trump! **_
---
It’s no exaggeration to say that the fate of Trump’s presidency and his America First agenda all depends on Republicans winning the midterms!
---
**Given just how dire the stakes are, I’ve teamed up with the House GOP Leadership Chair to help Republicans build our own war chest earlier than ever before – and we’ve set an ambitious target of 1,000,000 new grassroots contributions before the end of the month.**
---
It’s vital that we offset this influx of cash that’s flowing to the most extreme Democrats with our own influx of contributions from America First patriots like YOU, Friend.
---
Remember, it’s not the size of your contribution that matters. What’s important is the sheer number of patriots who step up to help fight for President Trump’s agenda when it matters most.
---
_As long as the America First movement remains united, we can always _OUTRAISE_ the Democrats – no matter how many millions they haul in from their radical donors! _

clean_body: An outright Marxist... | A SECURE BRIEFING AUTHORIZED BY REP. JIM JORDAN Friend, I never thought I’d see something like this happen in the United States of America... But fueled by millions of dollars from radical Left-wing donors, socialists and outright communists are TAKING OVER the Democrat Party to force their Marxist agenda on the American people! ...Mamdani and Progressives Rake In Cash as Democrats Remain Divided “Far left’s prolific fundraising shows appeal to party’s base” [Source: Wall Street Journal] The unfortunate reality is that in politics, money often leads to political power. The Democrats are only going to get more extreme as they become more and more dependent on cash from radicals who hate America and the values that make our country great. I don’t even want to begin to imagine all the horrible things these extremists would do if they took back the People’s House in the midterms... But I know the first thing on the agenda would be IMPEACHING President Trump! It’s no exaggeration to say that the fate of Trump’s presidency and his America First agenda all depends on Republicans winning the midterms! Given just how dire the stakes are, I’ve teamed up with the House GOP Leadership Chair to help Republicans build our own war chest earlier than ever before – and we’ve set an ambitious target of 1,000,000 new grassroots contributions before the end of the month. It’s vital that we offset this influx of cash that’s flowing to the most extreme Democrats with our own influx of contributions from America First patriots like YOU, Friend. Remember, it’s not the size of your contribution that matters. What’s important is the sheer number of patriots who step up to help fight for President Trump’s agenda when it matters most. As long as the America First movement remains united, we can always OUTRAISE the Democrats – no matter how many millions they haul in from their radical donors! --- ]() Thank you, Jim Jordan Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Affordable Energy is Key to Economic Growth
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/msecongrowth?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
**This week I went to Washington DC to do something I love: talk about Mississippi’s successes! **

The Magnolia state is among the faster growing states in America right now, having been bottom of the class for decades. Since Tate Reeves became governor, over $40 billion of investment has poured in. Hardly a week goes by without news of another mega investment deal.

Speaking at _Americans for Tax Reform_ , I highlighted how smart public policy implemented by our state’s leaders—flat tax reform in 2022, income tax elimination this year, and labor market reforms in 2021—has helped drive this growth.

**But there’s another critical factor: affordable energy. **

That’s perhaps why I was especially thrilled to meet Secretary Chris Wright, President Trump’s Energy Secretary, who is championing energy abundance for America.

Under his leadership, the U.S. is prioritizing robust energy production to fuel economic growth, with a strong emphasis on the critical role of oil and natural gas. Secretary Wright has helped America become a leading energy exporter.

He has decisively rolled back the Biden administration’s “economically destructive” net-zero emissions policies and championed the advancement of nuclear power, including innovative small modular reactors.

Wright is also cutting red tape to streamline energy project approvals and eliminating impractical efficiency regulations for electrical appliances.

In the spring next year, MCPP has plans to host one of our Speaker Series lunches that will look in more detail at energy policy and how energy is becoming such an American success story.
---
|
---
_Karoline Leavitt, White House spokeswoman and Howard Lutnick, US Secretary of Commerce._
| **It is good to see leaders at both the state and federal level implementing policies that prioritize growth and prosperity.**

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=28bcd7128f&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=ecf65c5a9a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=ecf65c5a9a).

clean_body: | | | | | | If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind. | Dear Friend, This week I went to Washington DC to do something I love: talk about Mississippi’s successes! The Magnolia state is among the faster growing states in America right now, having been bottom of the class for decades. Since Tate Reeves became governor, over $40 billion of investment has poured in. Hardly a week goes by without news of another mega investment deal. Speaking at Americans for Tax Reform , I highlighted how smart public policy implemented by our state’s leaders—flat tax reform in 2022, income tax elimination this year, and labor market reforms in 2021—has helped drive this growth. But there’s another critical factor: affordable energy. That’s perhaps why I was especially thrilled to meet Secretary Chris Wright, President Trump’s Energy Secretary, who is championing energy abundance for America. Under his leadership, the U.S. is prioritizing robust energy production to fuel economic growth, with a strong emphasis on the critical role of oil and natural gas. Secretary Wright has helped America become a leading energy exporter. He has decisively rolled back the Biden administration’s “economically destructive” net-zero emissions policies and championed the advancement of nuclear power, including innovative small modular reactors. Wright is also cutting red tape to streamline energy project approvals and eliminating impractical efficiency regulations for electrical appliances. In the spring next year, MCPP has plans to host one of our Speaker Series lunches that will look in more detail at energy policy and how energy is becoming such an American success story. | Karoline Leavitt, White House spokeswoman and Howard Lutnick, US Secretary of Commerce. | It is good to see leaders at both the state and federal level implementing policies that prioritize growth and prosperity. Have a wonderful weekend! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | Ps. My good friend (and God father to my daughter) Lord Daniel Hannan is speaking in Jackson in a few weeks. There are still a handful of places available – please come and listen to what he has to say! | | |

name: GavinNewsom.com
subject: One month left.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
Here's the situation:

Ballots drop in California **one month from today**. That means people will start voting in just weeks.
And Donald Trump’s allies know it.
One right-wing extremist has already poured **$20 million** into attack ads to help Donald Trump defeat us. Their plan is simple: drown us out, redraw the maps in other states, and hand Trump control of Congress.
But here’s the truth: **we can beat them**.
This campaign is powered by people -- more than **500,000 donations** from Californians and supporters across the country who are standing up for fair maps and fair elections.
Now we need you. Because if we can fully fund our ad program before ballots drop, we can stop Trump’s allies in their tracks.

body:
Trump wants to DISMANTLE USPS!?
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20250906_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=6&akid=21111%2E878179%2EZjbA1-) **Millions of Americans rely on the USPS for bills, Social Security checks, medication, mail-in ballots, and more — _but Trump doesn’t care._**

We can’t let him PRIVATIZE and DESTROY it — but we NEED your help!

[**As a top grassroots Democrat, will you sign our petition to stand with the USPS? We need 150 signatures from your state today! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20250906_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=7&akid=21111%2E878179%2EZjbA1-) | [ADD MY NAME: STAND WITH YOUR LOCAL USPS OFFICE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20250906_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=8&akid=21111%2E878179%2EZjbA1-)

**FACT #1:** Donald Trump has been foaming at the mouth to PRIVATIZE and DESTROY the U.S. Postal Service as we know it!

**FACT #2:** The USPS recently confirmed that more than 10,000+ postal workers will be laid off — _**your local post office could be next!**_

**FACT #3:** This is Trump’s latest attack on YOUR right to vote — he’s going after the USPS and mail-in ballots because he wants to RIG the 2026 election!

[**THAT’S WHY WE NEED A SURGE OF 150 TOP DEMOCRATS TO STAND WITH USPS: Add your name by MIDNIGHT and defend your local Post Office from MAGA destruction! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/save-usps/?source=VPP_20250906_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=9&akid=21111%2E878179%2EZjbA1-)

subject: Something to watch out for now that the U.S. Senate is back in session
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
It’s time to stop this modern-day poll tax. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114715653/567922761/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250906_T1_SenateBackinSession_v1s1&source=bsc_emm_ffa_20250906_T1_SenateBackinSession_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGYyMmYzYS0yMjhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1eBHR6S4lpl61Nl24XeoLU18L5yeN-ie6o26K8pv6Es=&emci=40ef30ae-5d8a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=28f22f3a-228b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1037277)

| | **MAGA lawmakers in Congress are just one step away from passing the SAVE Act** — a modern-day poll tax that could disenfranchise tens of millions of Americans. They’ve already gotten the bill through the House. Donald Trump has already promised to sign it into law if it reaches his desk. And the far right has a plan to pass it through the Senate. The bill’s backers want “to convince lawmakers to attach the SAVE Act to a must-pass piece of legislation this fall — likely either a continuing budget resolution or the National Defense Authorization Act,” according to reporting from _Democracy Docket_. And radical groups like the Tea Party Patriots are rallying their base — including through a new bus tour — to pressure senators into getting it over the finish line. **Now that the Senate is back in session for the fall, we’re entering a new phase of the fight to stop it. We need to demonstrate that there is strong, widespread opposition to this dangerous bill.** **[Add your name to say that our leaders should be protecting the right to vote, not restricting it. And let’s show that the American people are demanding the rejection of mass disenfranchisement schemes like the SAVE Act.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114715656/567922763/758761108?contactdata=9w+SJmjJo0y4Kl4yWSea/gyl1FyNpA5SqSV+mH8kEJx80oC7CC3YU5o9H0yOQIwRgEc2/TXlpMWU+zFL5Auwnt3eteDRDs1MNAt5LBlMEKbp/J17WiN89EZt2IJO6uGC&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250906_T1_SenateBackinSession_v1s1&source=bsc_emm_ffa_20250906_T1_SenateBackinSession_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGYyMmYzYS0yMjhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1eBHR6S4lpl61Nl24XeoLU18L5yeN-ie6o26K8pv6Es=&emci=40ef30ae-5d8a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=28f22f3a-228b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1037277)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114715658/567922765/758761108?contactdata=9w+SJmjJo0y4Kl4yWSea/gyl1FyNpA5SqSV+mH8kEJx80oC7CC3YU5o9H0yOQIwRgEc2/TXlpMWU+zFL5Auwnt3eteDRDs1MNAt5LBlMEKbp/J17WiN89EZt2IJO6uGC&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250906_T1_SenateBackinSession_v1s1&source=bsc_emm_ffa_20250906_T1_SenateBackinSession_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGYyMmYzYS0yMjhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1eBHR6S4lpl61Nl24XeoLU18L5yeN-ie6o26K8pv6Es=&emci=40ef30ae-5d8a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=28f22f3a-228b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1037277)
---
This legislation could block huge swathes of eligible voters from getting registered because of new requirements to show specific, costly, and inaccessible government documents.
And it’s part of MAGA’s anti-democracy agenda, which aims to shield out-of-touch politicians from getting held accountable by voters in truly free and fair elections.
At Fair Fight Action, we’ll continue raising the alarm about the SAVE Act’s harms, mobilizing Americans to contact their senators to demand that they vote NO, and advocating for policies that ensure equal access to the ballot box.
But we need activists like you to help keep up the pressure.
[**Will you sign on here to say that you oppose measures like the SAVE Act to shred voting rights? The Senate could bring this bill to a vote any day now, and we’ve got to show that the American people are against it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114715661/567922767/758761108?contactdata=9w+SJmjJo0y4Kl4yWSea/gyl1FyNpA5SqSV+mH8kEJx80oC7CC3YU5o9H0yOQIwRgEc2/TXlpMWU+zFL5Auwnt3eteDRDs1MNAt5LBlMEKbp/J17WiN89EZt2IJO6uGC&refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250906_T1_SenateBackinSession_v1s1&source=bsc_emm_ffa_20250906_T1_SenateBackinSession_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGYyMmYzYS0yMjhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1eBHR6S4lpl61Nl24XeoLU18L5yeN-ie6o26K8pv6Es=&emci=40ef30ae-5d8a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=28f22f3a-228b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=1037277)

clean_body: It’s time to stop this modern-day poll tax. | | | MAGA lawmakers in Congress are just one step away from passing the SAVE Act — a modern-day poll tax that could disenfranchise tens of millions of Americans. They’ve already gotten the bill through the House. Donald Trump has already promised to sign it into law if it reaches his desk. And the far right has a plan to pass it through the Senate. The bill’s backers want “to convince lawmakers to attach the SAVE Act to a must-pass piece of legislation this fall — likely either a continuing budget resolution or the National Defense Authorization Act,” according to reporting from Democracy Docket. And radical groups like the Tea Party Patriots are rallying their base — including through a new bus tour — to pressure senators into getting it over the finish line. Now that the Senate is back in session for the fall, we’re entering a new phase of the fight to stop it. We need to demonstrate that there is strong, widespread opposition to this dangerous bill. | This legislation could block huge swathes of eligible voters from getting registered because of new requirements to show specific, costly, and inaccessible government documents. And it’s part of MAGA’s anti-democracy agenda, which aims to shield out-of-touch politicians from getting held accountable by voters in truly free and fair elections. At Fair Fight Action, we’ll continue raising the alarm about the SAVE Act’s harms, mobilizing Americans to contact their senators to demand that they vote NO, and advocating for policies that ensure equal access to the ballot box. But we need activists like you to help keep up the pressure. In solidarity, The Fair Fight Action Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. If you would like to receive fewer emails from us, please click . If you would like to no longer receive emails, please . | | PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION

subject: This truly couldn’t get any worse

body:
This is urgent, Peter.
Peter, Chris Pappas here.
**National Republicans are recruiting John E. Sununu for U.S. Senate here in NH — and I need you to know what that means.**
Sununu represented New Hampshire in Congress nearly _twenty years ago._ And throughout his time in DC, he put special interests ahead of Granite Staters every chance he got.
**_His record speaks for itself_ — he voted against lowering drug prices, repeatedly voted to restrict abortion access, and led efforts to privatize Social Security.**
And what has he done since leaving office? Joined a lobbying firm that represented corporate special interests. Now he’s national Republicans’ handpicked candidate for this race. With name recognition like his, this is an all-hands-on-deck moment.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Trump is trying to rebrand his Big, Ugly Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Americans hate this bill, and no amount of flashy rebranding will change that.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2632%2E4032634%2Esu67Sy)
---
Did you see this update? Trump is telling Republicans to rebrand his “One Big Beautiful Bill” as the “Working Families Tax Plan Bill.” Give me a break. A new name won’t change that this bill **rips health care away from millions of people** to fund tax breaks for billionaires. A new name won’t change that this bill **raises the cost of prescription drugs by 900%** for people on Medicaid. A new name won’t change that this bill **kicks 7 million people off of SNAP benefits.** Americans hate this bill. According to a new poll, more than 64 percent of voters view it unfavorably, including two-thirds of non-MAGA Republicans. No amount of flashy, poll-tested branding can make up for the real pain and destruction working families will feel. This is Trump’s classic playbook: Says he supports working families, but pushes policies that actually make life harder for them. **I’m not letting Trump perform this double act with no consequences. I’ll keep calling out his lies, and I’ll keep going to red states to connect with voters and bring them into our movement — one that’s actually fighting for working families through plans like universal child care, paid leave, and taxing the rich.** [**If you’re with me in this fight, please chip in $28 or whatever you can to help power this critical work.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3139?amount=28&t=8&akid=2632%2E4032634%2Esu67Sy)

subject: SHOCK: DOJ Deputy Chief’s Epstein Revelations
body:
I was sitting with my team in a hotel room, waiting for our brave undercover journalist (UCJ) to return from her date with a man named Joseph Schnitt.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1399201/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvR1lFMnIyZmhBVw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDY/LbmNsMFpyU3hwQg/qP2hpZHM9bmNkQUJ1NEtEaERvMW1scw/gaLw1kA/s5of01b4f7c)

| | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Dear Patriot,

I was sitting with my team in a hotel room, waiting for our brave undercover journalist (UCJ) to return from her date with a man named Joseph Schnitt.

It was no different than the hundreds of other times I waited for a UCJ to return safely. **I'm always nervous, like a dad waiting for his daughter to return home from a night out.** I'm not thinking about the content they recorded, I want them back safe, then we can get to the work.

We go through great lengths and adhere to strict rules to ensure their safety. Still, I always worry about these young women who are going undercover to bring these stories to you.

[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
When our UCJ made it safely back to the room, I breathed a sigh of relief. The editors began their work to pull footage and cast it on the television in the room so we could have her debrief us, minute by minute.

As those scenes began to unfold, I knew immediately that we had so much more work to do as we verified that Mr. Schnitt was who he said he was and knew what he was talking about . . . **because the allegations he made to a woman he just met were SHOCKING.**

**[**Watch here and help cover the costs**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
**[**of this expensive investigation.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**

We verified that Joseph Schnitt is the Acting Deputy Chief of the Office of Enforcement Operations within the Department of Justice.

**This guy made it clear he knew his stuff** , but we had to make sure of it.

Schnitt nonchalantly spoke of the "**thousands and thousands of pages of files** " related to Jeffrey Epstein that “**they’ll redact every Republican or conservative person in those files, leave all of the liberal, Democrat people in those files**.”

The DOJ official went on to say that **Ghislaine Maxwell** was **moved to a lower security prison IN VIOLATION of** the Bureau of Prisons' **policies** , and stated that the human trafficker was transferred as "**A benefit to keep her mouth shut**."

Shnitt disclosed his intimate knowledge of the federal prison system and his regular work with different agencies related to it.

[**Watch the eight-minute video yourself**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.), and after you do, please [**help us fund the remaining costs of this investigation that kept climbing, and start the next one.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

We have no shortage of leads to pursue and dives we can take that will lead to more exposés like this one. But it all comes down to whether or not I can afford to continue to put teams in the field to make that happen. [**Please, be the one who keeps us going by donating today.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

With your backing, we won't slow down. But, without it, the leads die on the vine and the truth remains hidden.

So, please [**donate what you can today to help us continue pushing forward and shining a light into the darkness**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).

Thank you for all that you do, and as always, stay tuned.

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. [**After you watch, please donate whatever you can affor**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)d. We have multiple investigations in progress, and I haven't yet covered the costs of the report you're about to watch. [**Any amount helps, and I won't forget that you chose to keep us going**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).

---
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1399201/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDY/LbmNsMFpyU3hwQg/qP2hpZHM9bmNkQUJ1NEtEaERvMW1scw/gaLw1kA/s9n228a7fa9)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: The United States does not need a Department of War
body:
Only somebody like Trump could think changing the Department of Defense to the Department of War was a good idea. A person who used his money and privilege to get a doctor's note to dodge the draft, while kids who didn’t have it went to Vietnam to fight.
#

Peter, take it from someone who’s been there.
War isn’t cool, or fun. War takes the best of us and leaves everybody else dealing with it. You aren’t the same person after you come home. It isn’t anything to glorify.
Only somebody like Trump could think changing the Department of Defense to the Department of War was a good idea. A person who used his money and privilege to get a doctor's note to dodge the draft, while kids who didn’t have it went to Vietnam to fight.
This is the same guy who called fallen troops “suckers” and “losers.” It’s an insult.
If Trump wants to turn the military into his own personal force he isn’t getting any help from me. He’s got to come to Congress if he wants to turn the Department of Defense into the Department of War, and I’m not giving him my vote.
We need to convince my colleagues to do the same.
[**I need your help: Tell Congress the United States does not need a Department of War, and to vote against this ridiculous rebrand.** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_250906_dept_of_war/?source=em250906-1-rem&akid=3966%2E734936%2ESujNDF) Thanks, Ruben

name: VoteVets
subject: Say NO to the Department of War
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
It would take an act of Congress to change the Department of Defense into the Department of War, and VoteVets is not going to let it happen.
#
Peter — It’s called the Department of Defense for a reason.
War must always be a last resort. America is great because of our restraint, because we care about our Troops, and because we put defense before war.
Iraq, Afghanistan — those were avoidable wars that tarnished America’s reputation, caused untold harm, and left thousands of Americans wounded and dead from combat and suicide.
That’s what an America that puts war first looks like. That’s the America Trump and Hegseth want. But that’s not our America.
It would take an act of Congress to change the Department of Defense into the Department of War, and VoteVets is not going to let it happen.
[**It might sound like a small act, but we’re asking you to sign this petition and tell Congress: No Department of War. They want you to think your voice doesn’t matter. It does — but only if you use it.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250906_vv_dow/?refcode=em250906-1-120&akid=34594%2E3013755%2ExR4p6K)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250906_vv_dow/?source=em250906-1-120&akid=34594%2E3013755%2ExR4p6K)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

For the past 8 years, Aftyn Behn has been organizing in rural and small-town communities. She is an advocate for women and a national expert in rural voter engagement. Now she is running in the special election for U.S. Congress in Tennessee, District 7.

Aftyn is a phenomenal example of what we stand for at Her Bold Move. While too many organizations are running away from abortion ban states, we understand our responsibility to run towards them. We know that the women in those states are living under dangerous conditions, and the ONLY way to solve that is by increasing the amount of women they have representing them in government.

When you support Her Bold Move, you are supporting an incredible slate of fearless, progressive women candidates who are working to chip away at the male supermajorities in government that are costing women their lives. We are thrilled to be supporting Aftyn in her special election, but we need your help.

**Aftyn is the only woman running in a crowded Democratic primary. The men in her primary are simply not strong advocates for the women in Southern states, for whom the situation is dire.**

[**This primary is coming up in early October. The winner (which is likely to be Aftyn) will face off against a staunchly anti-choice, anti-woman, GOP man. body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj20750npa2bmkkay7stmu9ljw2el6y9e7qmeyqjnjg8umfwlvjjgmkugjl5nn2uswqma0gwtpwvoqmdeo4fg&__stmp=t265xl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t265xl&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3mbmoqy92m6lhuor1sj7mj99owy6qem0oabrgfu0wy43299ou97y7vtmsghkcj943m3nizd2cqs1dh99j4mefy4ld0fe7aa53zu53v82nmhq4sv6h4p8qrj1nefyj10d7jhtl1i19t&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t265xl&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t265xl&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t265xl&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t265xl&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3mbmoqy92m6lhuor1sj7mj99owy6qem0oabrgfu0wy43299ou97y7vtmsghkcj943m3nizd2cqs1dh99j4mefy4ld0fe7aa53zu53v82nmhq4sv6h4p8qrj1nefyj10d7jhtl1i19t&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t265xl&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t265xl&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: Sherrod Brown is the leader we need to fight for workers in Ohio and across the country. | = $10. That’s how much Sherrod Brown and Off the Sidelines PAC are asking folks like you to donate to help flip Ohio’s Senate seat. $10 because Sherrod just announced that he’s running again – giving us the leader we need to win in Ohio! $10 because as you read this, corporate special interests are planning to do and spend whatever it takes to crush his momentum. $10 because Sherrod’s closing in on a midnight deadline but still falling short of the $500,000 he needs to give this campaign the strongest start possible. We know $10 might seem small in the face of millions in GOP spending. But this is a grassroots movement, and when folks chip in $10 or even $20 at a time, it adds up quickly. name: Virginia Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Voters will begin to cast their ballots this month
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Voters will begin to cast their ballots this month in Virginia, in what is projected to be the most consequential and competitive election of 2025. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Voters will begin to cast their ballots this month in Virginia, in what is projected to be the most consequential and competitive election of 2025.** On September 19th, early voting opens in Virginia’s general elections to determine control of the state legislature, the lieutenant governorship, and the governorship. Democrats won the Virginia House in 2023 with a single seat by just 975 votes – an incredibly thin margin. [Every donation to the DLCC helps mobilize organizers and support state legislative campaigns in places like Virginia. Will you donate $7 to expand and hold Democratic majorities in states nationwide?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDFSMauhu6y669kwgxpsLsO-wouYVDaKEPjwkcdXF_B5P4yl126jBysUrOCX7cr4YGTslgguUkXWk0SlE5kPe1gsGmTWr-P2Y5U7IYFpoUpMD4yUiVU0A5M82SV1cZYWgElWt6_OyCq6YqPvDmRjd165BcaGSYHdSJpNYJmbiO8YEvZ3SMB3QxPrYNCzUlaeZzaCvpq6Ca-7BBjGMJhvg9b8RPF9tKgfSbOlwmOtJh6TDbVTKxNn_EZ7NQJOA7TdhLX42y_HaG3vlcEsTfY2K596ylo1VazkLFLpisEOBuwzLtXlmynzcxacYJpino85LAjDT4nouXgeEQoOycKS4lt6xDkLkW6mygk7xjuO8ks9iIMFkZSufKLUKC9-cOF822Wf9PHaxDaquo9hPsawwMHd66Sl1bFZJIGV8v5wop5DzKtHFGcx4AwSh4qWFMmsxRa8TCybkrBaX5H1kNGwP_yg/4jo/_7fqAF2dQkuOPcmdhKUK-A/h0/h001.pd4R6DaKTIIf1PwgQwpH_YuYRIRTLUtVdCLRXCTjXGk) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Our win in 2023 blocked Virginia’s far-right governor from enacting his extreme MAGA agenda and the Republican takeover of our public schools. Just 975 votes made the difference in the lives of millions of Virginians.
This year, we have the chance to do the same and give future Democratic Governor Spanberger the legislative majorities she needs to lower costs for Virginians.
[A contribution of $7 provides the DLCC with resources to strengthen Democratic majorities nationwide in battleground states like Virginia and beyond. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDFSMauhu6y669kwgxpsLsO-wouYVDaKEPjwkcdXF_B5P4yl126jBysUrOCX7cr4YGTslgguUkXWk0SlE5kPe1gsGmTWr-P2Y5U7IYFpoUpMD4yUiVU0A5M82SV1cZYWgElWt6_OyCq6YqPvDmRjd165BcaGSYHdSJpNYJmbiO8YFGKxLOeyNnWOhOvApnHSgUNXBo6oKvhJUiPyEMdjsciIr1J0qenf-22DUQNELphCdfdlS1G_G8JHG1wcJeAC3mSQjJIQCAQjml8MfkZK_-VgDmf6QNNQ4uEghbCQq_Z2h4rzHrS0uXIjvNpuR39dfz3x-my7_uQnEKZplci4USKDSH05E61QNamcWbqjqxD26rSf0Ute-k9LGbZNW_lP4R98pTEVFyViDEwWSsJlkkqiqRmjiHhK1-ZA3asorXSxIXD8SEeNLJ0kdwgbzZLxxuX83TNqIzRnDgg0aobDj3Xw/4jo/_7fqAF2dQkuOPcmdhKUK-A/h7/h001.1x5gIUT9sN3UXldBifN69mlbgWkkCL9v3MGl4su6-KE)

On September 19th, early voting opens in Virginia’s general elections to determine control of the state legislature, the lieutenant governorship, and the governorship. Democrats won the Virginia House in 2023 with a single seat by just 975 votes – an incredibly thin margin. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Our win in 2023 blocked Virginia’s far-right governor from enacting his extreme MAGA agenda and the Republican takeover of our public schools. name: Kelly Morrison
subject: Peter, I called for RFK Jr.’s immediate resignation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morrison for Congress
body:
https://kellyforcongress.org [https://kellyforcongress.org]
Hi Peter,
Earlier this week, I called for the immediate resignation of RFK Jr. Peter, I rang the alarm six months ago when he was first nominated to be the Secretary of the Department of Health and Human Services. He is uniquely unqualified for this role. He has no medical or scientific background, has never led a large organization, and has spread and profited from conspiracies around vaccines, mental healthcare, and reproductive healthcare. Just six months into his tenure, my worst fears are being realized.
I spent most of my career as an OB-GYN physician. I’ve seen firsthand the impact medical research, hospitals, and healthcare providers have on people’s lives. Conversely, I’ve seen how harmful the lack of access to medical advances and care is to people and communities.
Peter, we have to be clear-eyed about the danger RFK Jr poses to the health and safety of the American people. He is literally orchestrating the destruction of public health and his non-scientific, ideological takeover of HHS is putting lives at risk. He’s only been in this role for six months. Six months! We cannot afford to wait around to see what he does next.
Peter, I was elected to bring my experience as a physician to Washington. I will continue to be a fighter for what I believe in, and that includes funding scientific and medical research so the United States continues to lead the world in scientific breakthroughs that cure disease and improve people’s lives. We must commit to electing and appointing leaders who will be good stewards of our globally esteemed public health agencies. We cannot let corrupt and compromised leaders push conspiracy theories and non-evidence based polices to further their ideological and political agendas at the expense of the health and safety of the American people.
There is so much work to do, and I am just getting started. We are approaching our third end of quarter fundraising deadline of this year, and Republicans have been eyeing MN-03. I have to raise $45,000 by the end of the month to stay on track. Peter, I would be honored if you would consider contributing today to help us chip away at our goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=10] Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=25]
Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=50] Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email?express_lane=true&amount=100]
Donate Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/morrison-email]
Thank you for your continued support and partnership in this work, Peter.
With gratitude and resolve,
Kelly Morrison
https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress [https://www.facebook.com/KellyMorrisonForCongress] https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN [https://twitter.com/Morrison4MN] https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress [https://instagram.com/kellymorrisonforcongress] kellyforcongress.org [kellyforcongress.org]

If you only want to receive our most important emails, click here to receive fewer emails. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hHyPtKcXyUeK_xcY7BEsAQ2]
We’d hate to see you go, but if you want you can unsubscribe here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/4Dh5T9ni_kaWmPt-auzpZw2?unsubscribedata=JH3gqVSGt9ItEu%2FVPq%2FSAk5ahRjxCej%2BeZHuZR0kpd9MkAZSV52dpk2u9KSVtABH3GijKEgyX1I8lfhYs50bTXURYWEc2YS0WYDeaDNmsVhRJBgmsaj1%2FQQ4r9Cvi%2B4naok1Yq5AFy48upchm4HiB3Iij7J1%2FAyt6d4mCW8cvA3f4ZxKQaMWT6WJSDo09ScdaWxETCs653Rmv0A2jl%2FnPdzdsAKzOoa9ehGoIiscHbRn%2BqxzNDWH3XQUGwI5uS35pcM143eBN5A%2BfzY0ubluRNMM%2By1SwVksf82jwYqnRC85XS1GMr6lFWcIobBXRAUKv%2FU3tDPhSzc4EeHfhLtWRAtcMvtg%2F1Z2MmpzM5CGRThhOcCN%2FmWrEvWkU4I%2BEqWeK06SBSUIi%2BOMrNQjMi1nO35JUteC4YQJGOTtTjCYd2hdXrjWMyzL2Ihcw3S8ekIa] .

subject: Early Voting Starts Soon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
And Forward candidates need your help NOW!

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_1&n=1)
---
| Peter \-- Later this month, we’ll announce **26 exciting new Forward candidates** stepping up to run outside of the two-party system this November. No other organization is actively recruiting and supporting leaders like this – because no one else is willing to challenge the broken rules that keep voters silenced and shut out. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_1&n=2 "Chip In To Help Them Today!") [Chip In To Help Them Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_1&n=2)
---
From blatant partisan redistricting to closed primaries, the legacy parties are locked in their endless slap fight to win at all costs, treating voters as collateral damage and betting that we won’t step up to change it. Let’s prove them wrong.
**Forward is different. **The legacy parties continue to break the rules and justify it in the name of winning. If no one plays by the rules, why do they even exist? We are building a movement for the millions of Americans who want leaders to represent ** _them — _** _not party leadership and outside interest groups._
Here is why Forward is positioned to enact real change:
1. **Recruiting and backing real candidates.** From this November’s election to next year’s, in primaries, local races, and statewide elections across the country, Forward is working full-time to put real choices on the ballot.
2. **Standing up to rigged systems.** From gerrymandering to closed primaries, we’re taking on the barriers that silence voters.
3. **Building a true grassroots movement.** Powered by real, everyday people in every state, not party bosses or special interests.

With early voting kicking off in many states soon, the urgency couldn’t be clearer: the system is counting on us to stay sidelined.
We are ready to take the fight to both parties, but we can’t do this without support. Every dollar goes directly into building this movement and helping our candidates WIN.
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_1&n=3 "Help Forward Fight Back!") [Help Forward Fight Back!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_1&n=3)
---
**If you have been waiting for the right moment to step in, this is it.** The best way to show these candidates we have their backs is to fuel their campaigns from day one.
Thank you for stepping up. With your support, Forward is proving that real change is possible.
**Not Left. Not Right. Forward.**
Forward Party
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_1&n=4)
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_1&n=5) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_1&n=6) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_1&n=7) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_1&n=8) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=september_fundraising_push_1&n=9) Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. There is NO medical evidence that the COVID vaccine changes transmission or health outcomes for healthy children. **NONE****.**

Yet these bureaucrats pushed experimental shots on kids anyway, ignoring the science, silencing dissent, and destroying lives.

Now that RFK Jr. is cleaning house, they're running for the exits.

Peter — We'll keep this short and sweet. body:
There is nothing — absolutely nothing — that will divert my attention from the needs of Virginia families.

Peter, Donald Trump just attacked me from the Oval Office.
_But I will not be rattled._
I will not be intimidated by somebody who's fired thousands of Virginians, driven up costs, and closed our rural health clinics. _In fact, let the President come down to Virginia and answer for the chaos he's unleashed._
There is nothing — absolutely nothing — that will divert my attention from the needs of Virginia families.

| | **Fellow Patriot,**
**This foldable, lightweight drone lets you record ALL your epic adventures!** [**Get yours now!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21899/6374453/c18a2c5eab972a646bb5af1c9d4d6108ee08d8b9/d4fda2da9b2558e16c5ec5c7bad81513cf5b5f8c)

---

**Gravity Sensors** ... Detects ground and other obstacles and changes course automatically to avoid collisions.
And more!
[**Yes, Please Rush My Skyhawk 4K Drone to My Doorstep Today!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21899/6374453/c18a2c5eab972a646bb5af1c9d4d6108ee08d8b9/d4fda2da9b2558e16c5ec5c7bad81513cf5b5f8c)

No doubt you’ll find 100 uses for this drone!

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The leader that LA deserves
disclaimer_text: paid for by big-money Super PACs like AIPAC that have spent millions of
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Working-class communities across the country deserve working-class
champions in Congress. That’s why Justice Democrats just endorsed our
newest candidate of the 2026 cycle: Angela Gonzales-Torres.

Angela is running to represent California’s 34th district. Based in the
heart of Los Angeles, it’s one of the poorest communities in the state.
They face some of the highest rates of eviction notices, incarceration,
and unhoused students.

These Angelenos are represented by a Democrat, but no one is fighting for
them in Washington, DC. With their current Representative, Jimmy Gomez,
this community is underserved, and the extreme housing and affordability
crisis Angela and her neighbors are experiencing has gone ignored.

CA-34 needs a leader who understands the struggles of the community
firsthand, has a vision bold enough to address these challenges with the
urgency they demand, and isn’t afraid to speak up against the Democratic
establishment when it stands in her way.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250906-1-agt?refcode=em20250906-37000&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37000_1203867_duNOoy&akid=37000%2E1203867%2EduNOoy ]That’s exactly the type of representative Angela will be — if enough of
us come together and send her to Congress. Fuel her campaign right now >>

This is a working-class district where the median age is 37, nearly half
of community members were born outside the United States, and fewer than
40% of eligible voters voted in the 2024 primary election. CA-34 is
clearly not excited about Jimmy Gomez and is interested in electing a
different representative. We know Angela is the candidate to carry her
community’s desire for change over the finish line.

While Jimmy builds his personal wealth and cozies up to the real estate,
investment banking, and cryptocurrency industries that put profits before
people, the community he was elected to represent — Angela’s students,
friends, and neighbors — only continues to suffer.

CA-34 didn’t just wake up this cycle realizing their incumbent wasn't
working for them: for the last two election cycles, this incumbent has had
competitive primaries with 44 percent of the electorate voting against him
in the last election!

The only reason Jimmy is able to keep his seat is because he is bought and
paid for by big-money Super PACs like AIPAC that have spent millions of
dollars to keep him in office.

And those corporate PACs and Super PACs are getting what they paid for,
time and time again. Jimmy is one of the biggest recipients of AIPAC money
in the 2024 cycle — and he still hasn’t signed onto the ceasefire bill,
called for an end to the genocide, or signed on to the Block the Bombs
Act. He also pocketed more than half a million dollars from crypto lobbies
in 2024, and then voted to greenlight Donald Trump’s corrupt crypto
agenda, allowing Trump to continue to make billions of dollars off his
presidency.

But we can change that this cycle,
Peter, and kick corruption out of CA-34. By
building a groundswell of grassroots support for Angela, we can beat the
organized money machine keeping this corporate Democrat in office.

Justice Democrats has done it before with candidates like AOC and Summer
Lee — and with you by our side, we’ll do it again for Angela.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250906-1-agt?refcode=em20250906-37000&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37000_1203867_duNOoy&akid=37000%2E1203867%2EduNOoy ]Please, pitch in $5 or whatever makes sense for you to
power Angela’s campaign and help her defeat a do-nothing Democrat in next
year’s primary!

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250906-1-agt?refcode=em20250906-37000&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37000_1203867_duNOoy&akid=37000%2E1203867%2EduNOoy ]Contribute $5

Together, we can build a Congress that truly works for the working class.

— Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250906-37000-footer&t=1002&refcode2=37000_1203867_duNOoy&akid=37000%2E1203867%2EduNOoy

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=37000%2E1203867%2EduNOoy

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=66dde6e69e874f30898c0811c551bace&_e=2T0TaPhs0CZ60wYlJz_FgHIZgOdq2w13aJDwjfq1BMSyJYiwI4czwYsmGemDxWOTk0iyb0edwpTGDWiCipp2VXWd60Gbe5BUqGRD6AoGHyLIX3Tk732AYubCHRByzMpuXHZPe8x0J_ZZ1wd4kcCYzNZRlsE9-56Qvbas3cnBtfjmY1oPwyLp727A2LWsRgsilmwko4HSjr1LaNncvqu9Y9lPiqnWopvyokBnezPrZ5HLjemiTnO06_CDWH7XZrEf6W4dA4JsToaGwqPlOUXCkYWcc7UtRVLq5mV7Ha44OnRSIKZ0C9OEHoClSNTlhF2IxIcmozkKUUAYRnOKNtdLS98AL0yEePfKegNGpt2m-lGjodlvApyaBVNgtZGtLUbyR0OMH6clEp9On3xk5F0cRQ-K73XQPmk1bA9iY7Xx9HvmR6feADHnj665R1GFykbb-vrKO20lWdinW3abIsvtFzVIgpcbmHkJlf6GXp2QIFZRdQEqtUISFxBtoodZV19KJ4Y1Qigv89g8L5s5DgtrDo3ssFDuCE6n6v7TRxE6uPDcZ_sca0Omd3xhkYK2O5N5)

clean_body: Another Promise Made, Another Promise Kept | Peter, I worked with President Trump to deliver for Alabamians, and I don 't mean to float my own boat here, but we delivered. ROCKET CITY IS COMING TO ALABAMA! After Joe Biden moved the United States Space Force Command to Colorado for political reasons, President Trump announced it's coming back to Huntsville, Alabama. Another Promise Made, Another Promise Kept. | We need help in our military. And while we're not behind in space, we can be way ahead of China, Russia, and every other country in the world. Moving Space Command to Alabama not only creates over 30,000 new jobs for Alabamians, but it also gives America HUGE strategic advantages in space. Folks, I 'm FIGHTING TOOTH AND NAIL to continue advancing President Trump's America First Agenda. Moving Space Command to Alabama is just one of many ways that Alabamians can help President Trump. Thank you, Coach Tuberville Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville for Governor, Inc, All rights reserved.

| | Donald Trump just took another unprecedented action that should alarm every American. He used what's called a "pocket rescission" — something that hasn't been done in 48 years — to sidestep Congress and claw back $4.9 billion in promised foreign aid funds. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114729951/567964982/-1197072038?refcode=2025-09-06-pocket&recurring=&amount=4&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5b675af6-2d8b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjY3NWFmNi0yZDhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sw5IyCqNLJ4kOsvQ2IiODaa7p3l7Q8ErdJJP_HRT9yQ=) This isn't just an obscure budget maneuver. **It's part of a relentless attack on U.S. foreign assistance, which plays a vital role in protecting our national security and creating a more stable, peaceful world.** Foreign aid helps prevent global conflicts, builds partnerships that strengthen our economy, and demonstrates American leadership around the world. By undermining it, Trump is putting politics above security and setting a dangerous precedent by abusing presidential power to achieve his own agenda. We can and should have real conversations in Congress about how to reform foreign assistance to make it more effective. _But destroying it outright is not the answer._ I'm committed to working with my colleagues to safeguard this funding, hold the Trump administration accountable, and ensure America continues to lead with strength, security, and compassion. name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: the hardest decision I’ve made in this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
It’s a bold step, but we can’t be timid right now.
#
Peter, I just met with my senior team, and at the end of the meeting, I made a big decision:
**_I told my team to place a massive new ad buy across New Jersey — earlier than we originally planned for._**
Peter, I’m going to explain why we took this step, but if you support our decision to be bigger and bolder in our fight to defeat MAGA extremism here in New Jersey, **[I hope you’ll split a few dollars between my team and State Democrats Committee to help close our budget gap and fund this new ad buy →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94470?refcode=em20250906-9382&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9382%2E614464%2EgtR2nz)**
**[DONATE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94470?refcode=em20250906-9382&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9382%2E614464%2EgtR2nz)**
Here’s why we made this choice:
Jack Ciattarelli just made a massive investment in his own TV ads. $2,000,000 to be exact – and you can bet he’ll spend every dollar he can attacking me.
But we also know that when voters learn the truth about who I am, what I stand for, and how my vision for New Jersey differs from Ciattarelli’s, I earn their support.
**And we know that, with the polls this tight and the stakes so incredibly high, we can’t afford to let Ciattarelli’s attacks go unanswered. Now is the time for us to think big and fight back.**
This is how we do it, Peter. We’re going to get our message out everywhere. We’re going to make sure every voter knows the truth. And we’re going to do every damn thing within our power to win this fight for New Jersey’s future — and stop a MAGA lackey who takes marching orders from Trump from becoming our next governor.
**[Peter, to be candid with you, I made this choice because I believe that our grassroots team will come through the way you always have and help us power this campaign to victory. To close our budget gap and fund this big ad buy, we’ve set a goal of 100 online donations before midnight tonight. If you could step up and split a contribution between my campaign and State Democrats Committee, I would be incredibly grateful.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94470?refcode=em20250906-9382&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9382%2E614464%2EgtR2nz)**

[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94471?refcode=em20250906-9382&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=9382%2E614464%2EgtR2nz) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94471?refcode=em20250906-9382&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=9382%2E614464%2EgtR2nz) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94471?refcode=em20250906-9382&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9382%2E614464%2EgtR2nz) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94471?refcode=em20250906-9382&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9382%2E614464%2EgtR2nz) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94471?refcode=em20250906-9382&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9382%2E614464%2EgtR2nz) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94471?refcode=em20250906-9382&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9382%2E614464%2EgtR2nz) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94470?refcode=em20250906-9382&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9382%2E614464%2EgtR2nz)

name: Chris Pappas
subject: This is how we’ll protect patients from Trump’s “sick tax”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
This week I introduced the Protect Patients from Costly Care Act.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2225%2E582294%2EpBwh_L)
**As if sweeping cuts to Medicaid weren’t enough, Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress slipped a cruel “sick tax” into their One Big Ugly Bill.**
It forces Medicaid patients to pay new out-of-pocket fees before they can even see a provider — and it hands Big Pharma another handout by blocking certain drugs from Medicare price negotiations.
**_That’s wrong._** That’s why I introduced the _Protect Patients from Costly Care Act_ to repeal those harmful provisions and put patients first.
Because no one should be denied care just because they can’t pay up front. And no drug company should get a free pass to jack up prices on life-saving medications.
**This is why I’m running for Senate:** to deliver solutions that lower costs and protect families in New Hampshire and across the country.
But I can only keep up this fight with your support. [**Will you chip in $5 or whatever works for you to help us build the grassroots campaign we need to win?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250906_1_bigpharma?refcode=em20250906-2225&amount=5&refcode2=2225_582294_pBwh_L&akid=2225%2E582294%2EpBwh_L)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250906_1_bigpharma?amount=5&refcode=em20250906-2225&refcode2=2225_582294_pBwh_L&akid=2225%2E582294%2EpBwh_L)**
Together we can fight to lower health care costs, hold Big Pharma accountable, and make sure working families — _not special interests_ — have a voice in Washington.
Thank you for standing with me.
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250906-1?t=2&refcode2=2225_582294_pBwh_L&akid=2225%2E582294%2EpBwh_L)**

name: Team Moore
subject: Wes is not sitting back on the bleachers, Peter
body:
Being out on the playing field is a good reminder of something.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=565%2E1086043%2EQKdHOE)
Too many politicians in Washington are sitting on the bleachers — watching problems play out instead of staying in the game and taking action.
Marylanders deserve a governor who will run it into the endzone, Peter. 🏈
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250906-1?refcode=em-20250906-1&refcode2=565_1086043_QKdHOE&akid=565%2E1086043%2EQKdHOE)
Wes knows that sitting on the sidelines doesn’t help anyone. **We need a team-player who will ensure that we leave no one behind.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250906-1?refcode=em-20250906-1&refcode2=565_1086043_QKdHOE&akid=565%2E1086043%2EQKdHOE)
Here’s the deal, Peter: **This is going to be a contentious race.**
Republicans are already drawing up their playbook, and it’s clear they’re going to try to tackle this seat next year. But with a strong team like this one, we’ve got the grit and the game plan to keep delivering progress from Worcester County to Garrett County.
**[Will you toss $5 or $10 over to Wes Moore’s campaign so he can continue winning results for Maryland?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250906-1?refcode=em-20250906-1&refcode2=565_1086043_QKdHOE&akid=565%2E1086043%2EQKdHOE)**

— Team Moore
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250906-1&t=2&refcode2=565_1086043_QKdHOE&akid=565%2E1086043%2EQKdHOE)**

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33974?t=1011&refcode=email-20250906_v&akid=9343%2E5885482%2Ew_aAum ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

“We’re going in.”

Trump is putting troops in our streets — first D.C., now Chicago — and our
activists are mobilizing for rapid response TONIGHT.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33974?source=email-20250906&t=1061&akid=9343%2E5885482%2Ew_aAum ]Headline: Trump says federal troops are headed to Chicago. 'We're going
in.'

This isn’t public safety, it’s tyranny. Chicagoans are rising up — and Our
Revolution activists are on the ground, organizing a rapid response action
to show the power of the people against Trump’s police state.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33974?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250906nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9343%2E5885482%2Ew_aAum ]We need your support right now. We’ve hired new organizers and we’re
mobilizing our rapid-response teams to power the people’s resistance in
Chicago. Will you make a donation to fuel this urgent effort to protect
our communities from Trump’s authoritarianism?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33974?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250906nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9343%2E5885482%2Ew_aAum ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33974?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250906nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9343%2E5885482%2Ew_aAum ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33974?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250906nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9343%2E5885482%2Ew_aAum ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33974?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250906nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9343%2E5885482%2Ew_aAum ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33974?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250906nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9343%2E5885482%2Ew_aAum ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33974?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250906nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9343%2E5885482%2Ew_aAum ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

We REFUSE to let yet another of our cities be taken over by fear and
military occupation.

The grassroots must stand up in force and show that we will not accept
troops in our streets terrorizing our neighbors.

Trump’s tyranny must be met with resistance.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33974?source=email-20250906&t=1060&akid=9343%2E5885482%2Ew_aAum ]Headline: No Trump No Troops protest photo

The coalition in Chicago is crucial — and growing. And we have local
leaders standing on the side of the people.

"No federal troops in the city of Chicago! No militarized force in the
city of Chicago!" Mayor Brandon Johnson said yesterday at a rousing Labor
Day rally.

Illinois Governor JB Pritzker is also sounding the alarm – warning that
Trump’s agents plan to “raid Latino communities and say they're targeting
violent criminals.”

Let’s be clear: this escalation must be met with resistance. Together we
MUST draw the line and show overwhelming grassroots opposition.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33974?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250906nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9343%2E5885482%2Ew_aAum ]Our communities need back up and Our Revolution is proud to step in the
gap and channel resources to this emergency action. If you’re able, please
chip in what you can to help out. Solidarity.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

The grassroots must stand up in force and show that we will not accept troops in our streets terrorizing our neighbors. Trump’s tyranny must be met with resistance. [ ]Headline: No Trump No Troops protest photo The coalition in Chicago is crucial — and growing. And we have local leaders standing on the side of the people. "No federal troops in the city of Chicago! No militarized force in the city of Chicago!" Mayor Brandon Johnson said yesterday at a rousing Labor Day rally. Illinois Governor JB Pritzker is also sounding the alarm – warning that Trump’s agents plan to “raid Latino communities and say they're targeting violent criminals.” Let’s be clear: this escalation must be met with resistance. name: The Democrats
subject: How we will put your donation to work:
body:
---
Derek, ️We're reaching out to ask if you can make a donation to the DNC today. But first, we want to tell you exactly where your contribution will go if we earn your support today. ️As Republicans rip health care away from millions of people and attempt to rig the 2026 midterms in their favor, Democrats are fighting back. ️Here's what we've been up to:
* Reaching as many voters as we can to ensure they know the stakes right now — and it’s working. We’ve contacted 1.65 million voters, and in 2025 alone, Democrats have won or overperformed in 41 out of 42 key elections.
* Fighting fire with fire when it comes to redistricting. In California, Democrats are pushing to redraw the state’s map to counter Republicans’ gerrymandering in Texas.
* Investing in every single Democratic state party, well before Election Day. Democrats are committed to showing up everywhere and competing everywhere — in red, blue, and purple states alike.

️And this is just the beginning. We are committed to continuing to organize and mobilize against Trump while electing Democrats at every level of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. ️This is the kind of work our grassroots donations fund. And you might be surprised to hear this, but a LOT of our grassroots donations come from emails just like this one. ️**So now that we’ve explained where your donation goes, we're hoping you'll join thousands of Democrats making a donation to the DNC today.** [**Can Democrats count on you to contribute $3 to the DNC? body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114732249/567972880/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWEyMzgyYS0zMjhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9npfyHTLsE0C5xlx9VC08Qu5L2v4s9ZuHvBnlGTZe0Q=&emci=50acda16-ca73-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=45a2382a-328b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=13185894) Hey Derek, I first ran for Congress because I was tired of our government blowing off hardworking Western Pennsylvanians. And since I’ve had the honor of representing PA-17, I’ve been fighting for the things that matter most to our community—like creating new union jobs, defending the American Dream, and taking on corporate power. But with Republicans in total control of our federal government, and too weak to do anything to protect Americans’ fundamental freedoms and the American Dream, there’s a lot more work to be done. **That’s why I want to hear directly from folks in Cresco to ensure I’m tackling the issues that matter most to you and your families right now.** [**So if you have a moment, I’d really appreciate it if you would take our Priorities Survey and share your thoughts with me. clean_body: Hey Derek, I first ran for Congress because I was tired of our government blowing off hardworking Western Pennsylvanians. And since I’ve had the honor of representing PA-17, I’ve been fighting for the things that matter most to our community—like creating new union jobs, defending the American Dream, and taking on corporate power. But with Republicans in total control of our federal government, and too weak to do anything to protect Americans’ fundamental freedoms and the American Dream, there’s a lot more work to be done. That’s why I want to hear directly from folks in Cresco to ensure I’m tackling the issues that matter most to you and your families right now. | | Thanks for sharing your thoughts!
