name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Add your name: stop the misuse of the National Guard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
When the President threatens to send the National Guard into Chicago, I can’t stay quiet.

Let me be clear: this isn’t about public safety. It’s about political theater.

If this administration actually cared about safety, they’d be funding local police departments, restoring community policing grants, and addressing the root causes of violence. But instead, they’re doing the opposite: cutting support, stripping away health care and food assistance, and targeting immigrant families with fear-based enforcement.

I believe in a better path: one where we invest in our neighborhoods, build trust, and protect the civil liberties that keep us free

If you agree, I’m asking you to speak out. Add your name to our petition opposing the President’s plan to deploy the National Guard to Chicago: [https://go.nikkiforcongress.com/a/national-guard-deployment-1?refcode=em-9.6.25-all]

Sign the Petition [https://go.nikkiforcongress.com/a/national-guard-deployment-1?refcode=em-9.6.25-all]

We cannot allow this kind of dangerous overreach to become the norm. Let’s show just how many of us reject this misuse of power. We stand for real solutions, not scare tactics.

Thank you,

Nikki

Wait, before you go!
Nikki’s fighting back against the misuse of federal power, not just in Chicago, but across Central and Southern Illinois too.
While the President pushes fear and spectacle, Nikki is demanding real solutions: investing in public safety, defending civil liberties, and standing up for communities that are too often left behind.
But she can’t do it alone. This grassroots campaign depends on everyday people like you. Will you chip in $3 to help us push back on the MAGA agenda and keep this seat blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-q3-2025?refcode=em-9.6.25-all-b]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nb-q3-2025?refcode=em-9.6.25-all-b]

name: Team DASS
subject: Trump just gutted our election safety net. Again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114733489/567976612/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWEyMzgyYS0zMjhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KZnshBpIp076RZyx2YrGwSL9LlwMu6i5XiEQBHLPIjo=)
**➤➤ BREAKING: Election workers just lost critical protection from cyberattacks** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114733494/567976650/55160957?refcode=em-9.6.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWEyMzgyYS0zMjhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KZnshBpIp076RZyx2YrGwSL9LlwMu6i5XiEQBHLPIjo=)**
* * *
Friend. This is exactly what election officials feared. Donald Trump’s administration just slashed vital CISA support for state and local election offices – cutting off cyber threat intelligence, emergency response help, and trusted guidance that workers depend on. And the effects are already being felt: election workers are overwhelmed, getting doxxed online, and threatened routinely with violence. Software patches are falling behind, and misinformation campaigns are spreading faster than officials can respond. **This is an emergency. If we don’t act now, the next election could be the most vulnerable in modern history.** Trump’s allies knew exactly what they were doing when they dismantled these programs. They’ve repeatedly tried to shut down EI-ISAC, block grant funding, and sideline the very agencies tasked with keeping our elections safe. They want chaos. They want fear. And most of all — they want control. That’s why Democratic Secretaries of State are more important than ever. They’re stepping up to fill the vacuum and protect our elections from attacks both foreign and domestic. But they can’t do it alone. clean_body: | = ➤➤ BREAKING: Election workers just lost critical protection from cyberattacks = Friend. This is exactly what election officials feared. Donald Trump’s administration just slashed vital CISA support for state and local election offices – cutting off cyber threat intelligence, emergency response help, and trusted guidance that workers depend on. And the effects are already being felt: election workers are overwhelmed, getting doxxed online, and threatened routinely with violence. Software patches are falling behind, and misinformation campaigns are spreading faster than officials can respond. This is an emergency. If we don’t act now, the next election could be the most vulnerable in modern history. Trump’s allies knew exactly what they were doing when they dismantled these programs. They’ve repeatedly tried to shut down EI-ISAC, block grant funding, and sideline the very agencies tasked with keeping our elections safe. They want chaos. They want fear. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: The fake news media won’t show you this
body:
They said it was impossible...

| | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b7u2/?__vbtrk=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot, You won’t believe what happened when Turning Point USA visited college campuses in my home state of Illinois... We packed the quad at Illinois State. Then, we turned around and did it again at the University of Illinois, the auditorium bursting at the seams. _Not in Texas... Not in Florida..._**_But in the heart of one of the Left’s most treasured strongholds._** Hundreds of young patriots chanting “USA!”... waving flags... cheering for faith, freedom, and America! In deep “blue” Illinois.
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b7u2/?__vbtrk=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
[ **Join Turning Point USA**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b7u2/?__vbtrk=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
**When I started Turning Point USA 13 years ago, this all felt...** **_impossible._** It began in a dusty garage in the Chicago suburbs with just me... No money. No connections. But with a calling on my heart that said, _“Go fight for your country.”_ I believed we could turn the tide and light a fire in the hearts of young Americans... One student at a time. And so did patriots like you, friend. Now? **Students in "Red" and "Blue" states alike are breaking all the stereotypes you’ve been told about them...** They’ve been told to sit down and shut up. To go along with the Left’s narrative. To stay quiet if they love America. But instead, they’re standing up for America — LOUD AND PROUD. _Waving flags... cheering for their country... DEFYING the Left right in its own backyard!_ These young people are realizing: ✅ It’s OKAY to be proud of America
✅ It’s OKAY to love God
✅ And it’s more than OKAY to fight for what’s right **Friend, if you want to see even MORE students come alive for truth, for God, and for America...** Then now's the time to join our mission to DEFEAT the Left in our culture... for good. **[You just won’t be supporting a cause — you’ll be powering a cultural REVOLUTION. Make your gift today to join our movement.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b7u2/?__vbtrk=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
---
[ **Join Turning Point USA**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b7u2/?__vbtrk=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Patriot, this is your invitation to get off the sidelines — and into the fight. Together, we’re going to SMASH every cultural stronghold the Left thought they could keep. If we ignite this revolution in places like Illinois... we’ll do it in every corner of this country. And we won’t stop until we’ve defeated the Left in our culture war... for good. [_**So please, make your most generous gift today to Turning Point USA.**_](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b7u2/?__vbtrk=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b7u2/?__vbtrk=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
**P.S. Friend, thank you for reading this far, but before you go, I have one last thing to add... because it’s personal to me.** You know Illinois isn’t easy ground for a conservative.It’s where I was born. It’s where Turning Point USA began. And it’s where I always hoped we’d one day see a breakthrough. **When I visited my home state this year on the American Comeback Tour, I watched that dream come TRUE.** At Illinois State University, the crowd came early. Loud. Joyful. Unapologetic. They cheered at the top of their lungs every time I mentioned loving this country — or loving our Lord and Savior, Jesus Christ.Then that night, at the University of Illinois, I watched students flood the campus auditorium, with lines around the block, desperate to get a seat. They stood in the aisles. They crammed into every corner.**They cheered when I talked about truth... about faith... about fighting for a nation worth saving.**
---
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b7u2/?__vbtrk=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
**That was my home state!** And the Left CAN’T ignore what happened there.But this movement only grows if WE keep pushing.We need to reach MORE states. MORE campuses. MORE young hearts and minds._**[Friend, let’s take this momentum to every corner of the country – make your best gift to Turning Point USA today!](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b7u2/?__vbtrk=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_
---
[ **Join Turning Point USA**
**Make Your Gift Here**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b7u2/?__vbtrk=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE2ODg2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=316886&trkid=896752573&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

Now that Congress is back in session, I want to give you the chance to share your questions with me and my team.

So if you’re curious about the potential for a government shutdown, what’s going on with Trump’s latest executive orders, or anything else, **[submit your questions in our Ask Adam form, and I’ll do my best to address what’s on your mind.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202509-ask-adam.4d6ncc&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250906_AM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=4&akid=8962%2E5257348%2EVEV9ow)**

name: Mark Kelly
subject: It’s time to defend our elections (again)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Trump has set his sights on next year’s election. He’s mobilizing his Administration and his network of supporters to do whatever they can to make it harder to vote next year.
#

Hey everybody, it’s Mark.
It’s hard to focus on just one thing Trump’s doing at the moment, but I’m about to ask you to do that.
**Trump has set his sights on next year’s election.** He’s mobilizing his Administration and his network of supporters to do whatever they can to make it harder to vote next year.
The main angle he’s working on is to attack voting by mail.
Why that, specifically? In short, because it works. Because it’s been done for decades, because it widens the pool of people who can participate in elections, because it’s safe, because it’s secure. In my home state of Arizona, 75% of voters mail in their ballots, and we’ve been doing it for 20 years.
This isn’t something we can afford to ignore. We have to take threats to voting very seriously, because Trump definitely is. He knows the only way he can keep his grip on power is by preventing us from winning majorities in the House and Senate.
What we don’t defend now, we are likely to lose. So, today, I’m asking you to take one small action.
I’d like you to add your name and personally endorse voting by mail. Then, I’d like you to tell your friends, your family, and your community that this is important to you. And then, person by person, we’re going to build a sustained grassroots movement aimed at defending our elections.
[**It starts here, though. So, if you’re with me, would you please add your name and endorse voting by mail? It’ll take five seconds. Really.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/vbm_signup_em_sept25/?source=em250906-1-700k&akid=6179%2E6688874%2EijA1HL)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/vbm_signup_em_sept25/?source=em250906-1-700k&akid=6179%2E6688874%2EijA1HL)**
Thanks very much for your help.
\- Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6179%2E6688874%2EijA1HL).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: they voted to make America hungrier, poorer, and less healthy.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
I’m sounding the alarm to expose the very real pain Republicans voted to inflict upon the American people.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114735606/567983431/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDc1M2Q4MS0zNThiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=65xnH841kmA7Nnl3b4KoYfszKtLHU8TKdCEuEB0GZm4=) Team, Andrea Salinas here. Ever since Donald Trump signed the Republican budget into law, I’ve been sounding the alarm everywhere I can — online, in the media, and across Oregon — to expose the very real pain Republicans voted to inflict upon the American people. Here are the facts:
* An estimated 15 million Americans — _including over 200,000 of my own Oregon constituents_ — will be kicked off their health care plans.

* Republicans slashed SNAP by 200 billion dollars, threatening access to food assistance for hundreds of thousands of Oregonians

* And the big list of cuts includes clean energy credits, making wind and solar energy more expensive in favor of fossil fuels — which ultimately raises your energy costs.

name: Haley Stevens
subject: He wants to send the National Guard to Detroit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
this is why we need to win

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=787%2E49239%2EqGekWF)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5746?t=2&akid=787%2E49239%2EqGekWF)
---
null, it’s Haley Stevens.
Mike Rogers just called for the National Guard to be deployed into Detroit.
It was wrong in 1967, and it’s wrong now.
Let me be crystal clear: This is exactly why I introduced the Stop Trump’s Abuse of Power Act – to prevent any president from deploying the military into our communities without the consent of local or state leaders.
We’ve already seen this authoritarian playbook unfold in D.C. and Los Angeles. Now, Mike Rogers wants to make Detroit next.
This isn’t about keeping people safe – if it were, Trump wouldn’t have cut hundreds of millions of dollars in funding for public safety. It’s about control, intimidation, and fear. Rogers and Trump are willing to use the military as a political weapon against American citizens. We cannot allow that.
I’m running for Senate to stop dangerous, antidemocratic power grabs like this. But I need your help to defeat MAGA Mike Rogers and put an end to the chaos.
**[Will you chip in $5 or more to help me win in Michigan and fight back against this abuse of power?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5747?t=3&akid=787%2E49239%2EqGekWF)**
| | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5747?t=4&akid=787%2E49239%2EqGekWF)
---
Thank you,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5748?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=787%2E49239%2EqGekWF) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5746?t=6&akid=787%2E49239%2EqGekWF)

Thank you,
Haley

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: not a typo
body:
|
#
Friend, I want to try something a little different today. I’m asking if you can chip in just $1 to our grassroots campaign. _And no, that’s not a typo!_

[**One single dollar can make a real difference in our fight to keep MI-08 blue and flip the House. body:
| | | Hey y'all, it's James Carville. I just looked over some polling numbers, and **if you're Trump, this is really bad news.**

His approval rating is crashing and burning, he's underwater in EVERY swing state, and now his numbers are even flatlining with his own supporters!**The wheels are comin' right off, and there's not a damn thing he can do about it.**

I'll just say it: **Trump is _screwed._**

**Now here's the juicy bit, y'all:** If Trump's numbers keep tailspinning (and I'd bet good money they will), _he could drag down the entire GOP with him._ Now, we gotta confirm these numbers _immediately._

**We're launching my _exclusive_ 9/6 Trump approval poll TODAY to prove that his numbers are circling the drain.** We need as many responses as possible to get an accurate reading, so please, tell us now:

name: Mark Warner
subject: I’m livid.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
| | |
---
I’ll be honest, folks: I’m livid. And that’s not a statement I make lightly.
The Trump administration is taking its marching orders from a fringe conspiracy theorist who’s associated with white supremacists and 9/11 denialism – and it’s directly undermining our career intelligence professionals.
If you’re as fired up as I am to hold Trump accountable and take back the Senate for Democrats – please join me and Michael Bennet with a contribution to our campaigns:
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114736252/567984921/1661201660?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk911-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjUwZTEwYS0zNzhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BzeohoyegEn8QtQpmOX3PTc7oJrajlYKxIZj6T0Pxeo=)
---
Hear me out, friend:
Weeks ago, I arranged a meeting at the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency’s headquarters in Springfield, Virginia. Engagements such as these are a core part of my responsibility to provide oversight and support to our intelligence community. **And they have never been questioned or politicized... until now. **
Earlier this week, conspiracy theorist Laura Loomer discovered the unpublicized visit and launched a campaign of baseless attacks against me. And then, Trump’s henchmen canceled my visit.
**I can’t overstate how unprecedented and dangerous this is.** This administration is taking its marching orders from Laura Loomer – a wackjob with a long history of outlandish fringe views, including 9/11 denialism, anti-Muslim harassment campaigns, and associations with white supremacists.
Let me be clear: I will never be deterred from carrying out my constitutional responsibilities. The business of government and the security of our nation will not be dictated by extremist attention-seekers.
**But for goodness sake – I can’t be in this fight alone. And right now, the silence from my Republican colleagues is speaking volumes.** It doesn’t matter how dangerous, reckless, or irresponsible the Trump administration acts, too many of my Republican colleagues would rather fall in line than stand up for what is right.
I’ve never been more determined to hold this critical seat for Democrats and flip the balance of power in Congress.
[**Join me and Michael Bennet with an emergency donation today to help us fight back, defeat Trump’s Republicans in the midterms and flip the Senate. Your donation will be split between my reelection campaign and Michael Bennet's.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114736253/567984923/-1552314934?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk911-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjUwZTEwYS0zNzhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BzeohoyegEn8QtQpmOX3PTc7oJrajlYKxIZj6T0Pxeo=)

clean_body: | | | I’ll be honest, folks: I’m livid. And that’s not a statement I make lightly. The Trump administration is taking its marching orders from a fringe conspiracy theorist who’s associated with white supremacists and 9/11 denialism – and it’s directly undermining our career intelligence professionals. If you’re as fired up as I am to hold Trump accountable and take back the Senate for Democrats – please join me and Michael Bennet with a contribution to our campaigns: | | = Hear me out, friend: Weeks ago, I arranged a meeting at the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency’s headquarters in Springfield, Virginia. Engagements such as these are a core part of my responsibility to provide oversight and support to our intelligence community. And they have never been questioned or politicized... until now. Earlier this week, conspiracy theorist Laura Loomer discovered the unpublicized visit and launched a campaign of baseless attacks against me. And then, Trump’s henchmen canceled my visit. I can’t overstate how unprecedented and dangerous this is. This administration is taking its marching orders from Laura Loomer – a wackjob with a long history of outlandish fringe views, including 9/11 denialism, anti-Muslim harassment campaigns, and associations with white supremacists. Let me be clear: I will never be deterred from carrying out my constitutional responsibilities. The business of government and the security of our nation will not be dictated by extremist attention-seekers. But for goodness sake – I can’t be in this fight alone. And right now, the silence from my Republican colleagues is speaking volumes. It doesn’t matter how dangerous, reckless, or irresponsible the Trump administration acts, too many of my Republican colleagues would rather fall in line than stand up for what is right. I’ve never been more determined to hold this critical seat for Democrats and flip the balance of power in Congress. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Mark Warner and Michael Bennet: | | | = | | = | | = | | = The fight continues, Mark Warner = | Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States Paid for by Bennet for Governor. body:

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz._JFawRgXoyCOKlxd2PWEA)

| | Fellow Conservative, The radical-left Democrats have been waging a war against ICE for years now. During the Biden-Harris era in Washington, they simply undermined them and handcuffed agents from doing their job to protect our homeland security and public safety.

**Now, with President Trump and our Republican majorities giving ICE their full support, the left has turned to attacking them in the streets...**

Assaults against ICE agents are up 700% from just a year ago.

Agents and their family members are being doxed and targeted.
__ **THIS INSANITY MUST BE STOPPED****.** We need to stand with ICE agents and police officers as they come under attack for enforcing the law, and we need to hold the Democrats accountable for the end result of their over-the-top anti-ICE rhetoric.

[**If you agree, step up today to support our critical work at Team Cruz >>>**](https://trk.email.tedcruz._wZ0E7IGoV1nMuDyaZg) I'm proud to stand with President Trump, with ICE, and with our law enforcement officers who put their lives on the line every single day to protect our communities and save lives.

**I know you are too, and I can assure you I am doing everything in my power to ensure they have the resources and tools they need to do their jobs and remain protected from these violent radicals intent on tearing down our great nation.**

Thank you, as always, for being part of our fight-to-win team of true American patriots.

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

Not surprising! _Whatley has shown us that he is willing to fall in line with his party no matter what, even when it hurts our state._ **Now here’s the problem —** not enough voters have heard of Michael Whatley yet. We need to spread the word so folks can understand just what’s at stake in this election and how bad he would be for North Carolina. **[Peter, we wouldn’t usually try to do an opponent’s work for him, but in this case, we’d like to give Whatley a hand raising his name ID. Can you rush in a $25 donation or anything that works for you to help spread the word?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114736350/567985050/-1743631236?amount=25&refcode=ea.3a7f6c2c-378b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.3a7f6c2c-378b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTdmNmMyYy0zNzhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NbLGN2DKxM0MOHGuEstzNxOqvHVw8MKmAo9GgUIJR_Q=)** Here’s the thing about Michael Whatley. His only ambition is to be a GOP yes-man — a reliable party-line vote in favor of their extreme agenda. He will do and say anything that his party leaders tell him to. He called Republicans’ bill gutting Medicaid a “huge win for all Americans!” (!!) and praised federal government layoffs that have already cost our state hundreds of jobs. **Guess he doesn’t believe standing up for North Carolinians is a requirement for serving as our next Senator.** Voters need to hear about him, Peter. They need the full story. clean_body: North Carolinians need to hear about this. | MICHAEL WHATLEY APPROVAL POLL Approve 30% Disapprove 35% Not familiar 35% Great news, Peter — new polling shows that when North Carolinians learn about D.C. insider and Big Oil lobbyist Michael Whatley, they just don’t want him representing us in the U.S. Senate. Not surprising! Whatley has shown us that he is willing to fall in line with his party no matter what, even when it hurts our state. Now here’s the problem — not enough voters have heard of Michael Whatley yet. We need to spread the word so folks can understand just what’s at stake in this election and how bad he would be for North Carolina. = Here’s the thing about Michael Whatley. His only ambition is to be a GOP yes-man — a reliable party-line vote in favor of their extreme agenda. He will do and say anything that his party leaders tell him to. He called Republicans’ bill gutting Medicaid a “huge win for all Americans!” (!!) and praised federal government layoffs that have already cost our state hundreds of jobs. Guess he doesn’t believe standing up for North Carolinians is a requirement for serving as our next Senator. Voters need to hear about him, Peter. They need the full story. And luckily for Whatley, we’re ready and willing to help tell it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Let’s do this, Team Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. Peter,

This Labor Day, Christina celebrated IA-01's workers by joining the Quad Cities Federation of Labor Parade. She met with future constituents, heard their stories, and talked about the issues that matter most to Iowa’s working families.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114736606/567985404/-1612730695?refcode=em25_250906_FRLDP_fnd_gq_act___TBHQ_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250906_FRLDP_fnd_gq_act___TBHQ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=836163e1-378b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzYxNjNlMS0zNzhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vWBo-I5FevNuftYptCdVmafA_8GqKyxJTn5RXRW5lfg=)
She laughed with families on the sidewalks and shook hands with union members. She also listened to folks talk about what’s keeping them up at night — wages that can’t keep up with living expenses, healthcare that costs too much, and politicians in Washington who aren’t listening.

These moments matter. A parade is a whole lot of fun, but for Christina, every stop on the campaign trail is first and foremost a chance to have real conversations with real people. Our campaign is all about making sure IA-01 finally has a representative who shows up, listens, and fights for our neighbors, not corporate donors and D.C. insiders.

Mariannette Miller-Meeks has had her chance and Iowa’s workers are still waiting for someone to put them first. Christina is ready to be that leader. But we can’t do it without you.

name: In This Together PAC
subject: Andy has a winning strategy, but it's going to take all of us to help him implement it:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
The GOP is about to unleash all of their resources on the most vulnerable Democrats.
Peter,

Right now, Andy is doing his part to support key races nationwide that will shape the future of our democracy.

As the Trump Administration and Republicans in Congress work to cut healthcare for Americans, close rural hospitals, withhold funding from public schools, and more, Governor Andy Beshear is working to support the leaders who can hold the federal government accountable.

He’s standing shoulder-to-shoulder with Democratic frontliners in the U.S. House of Representatives — _**the Members of Congress who are in the toughest, most competitive races in the entire country.**_

These are the folks who have to win re-election if we’re going to put a check on an out-of-control Trump Administration. And they’re also the very same people Republicans are targeting with everything they’ve got. The Republican House majority is the smallest in nearly a century, and they will be looking to spend big in each of these races to ensure they don’t give up control.

That’s why Andy is doing everything he can to make sure those members have the support they need. He’s contributing to their campaigns, helping them raise the money they need to compete, and sharing the winning strategies he used to win three statewide elections in deep-red Kentucky.

In This Together was formed to support good leaders and good candidates who are running in tough red and purple districts across the country. We can’t afford to lose a single seat if we want to put a stop to the Trump and Republican agenda that is slowing down our economy and hurting our people.

[**If we all do our part, we can protect these vulnerable seats, defend our democracy, and build the momentum we need to take back the House in 2026. Can Andy count on you to chip in $5 to support his efforts today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114736802/567985909/841405539?refcode=em25_250906_frontl_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250906_frontl_fndd_gq_act___ITTPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=80267dbb-388b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODAyNjdkYmItMzg4Yi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=551NZX9rUr_J_0CLP8gbd2nPPTSMcLcowWnhysf11HE=) clean_body: The GOP is about to unleash all of their resources on the most vulnerable Democrats. Peter, Right now, Andy is doing his part to support key races nationwide that will shape the future of our democracy. As the Trump Administration and Republicans in Congress work to cut healthcare for Americans, close rural hospitals, withhold funding from public schools, and more, Governor Andy Beshear is working to support the leaders who can hold the federal government accountable. He’s standing shoulder-to-shoulder with Democratic frontliners in the U.S. House of Representatives — the Members of Congress who are in the toughest, most competitive races in the entire country. These are the folks who have to win re-election if we’re going to put a check on an out-of-control Trump Administration. And they’re also the very same people Republicans are targeting with everything they’ve got. The Republican House majority is the smallest in nearly a century, and they will be looking to spend big in each of these races to ensure they don’t give up control. That’s why Andy is doing everything he can to make sure those members have the support they need. He’s contributing to their campaigns, helping them raise the money they need to compete, and sharing the winning strategies he used to win three statewide elections in deep-red Kentucky. In This Together was formed to support good leaders and good candidates who are running in tough red and purple districts across the country. We can’t afford to lose a single seat if we want to put a stop to the Trump and Republican agenda that is slowing down our economy and hurting our people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team In This Together PAC | Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear and In This Together PAC are working to support leaders who will lead with compassion and decency, reject anger politics, and always do what's right. Friend, Congress is voting next week to hand Trump even more money for state violence—**a record-breaking military budget of nearly $1 trillion taxpayer dollars.** The fascist-in-chief will use this to put more troops on our streets and continue attacking other countries. He’s illegally using the military for law enforcement, and he’s egging on ethnic cleansing and occupation in Palestine. There are too many war-mongers in our government. **Half of the annual Pentagon budget goes to weapons corporations, which many members of Congress own stock in and receive campaign contributions from**.1 So when my colleagues press that yes button to vote for increases to the military budget, some are personally benefiting financially. That’s why I’m leading the push to ban members of Congress from investing in the weapons industry. **Before the Senate and House of Representatives vote on the military budget** , we must speak up and urge Congress to invest in life rather than death. [**Sign the petition to demand Congress reject the military budget for fiscal year 2026—and instead invest in what our communities need, like healthcare, housing, and clean air and water.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9WDifJMqK2ZAKNDza039FJvspUwi2H0xQu4IFAh9LOCRpe8Ea5hVUkp1qLS-DiDhpuMNRkWSQjqSrtji-EUP2i3xRuZLXQ6goRzXDELSyzkoTzmhvCDe4x1mGDHestb375r7jPIDVRHamsdHgQ5AP_T8yvF5iZu9TwxhyWQqAeHUFePxdMASDyP1lD-AECYfi8SbkfD7NDvS-IsNBC30_GjHvOLPpnWd-BszMVTC1EjhaiJQjUJTwAD1zW1FBYLSoL9CkGtCnK0in8rclpFUputc7vxP9qGPD2-Ihf5FFxmRC4o8mzNW9BYsry6SggnAaCX_yOpVssR-nctIpXrmBiGHcO7ky5lZACR8Hrzm3gSzCOacp8XfVJmvU_UEbaenSgykyp5evDWMsQ13ztiUKIo3UeHjCFwCpAR1xamw6VfcoZsw91Z_OI7kmk0ZIyG83EukLau6btaOXY5IX0LvkOg/4jo/uyR_8PmmQ7u-nrdEK53W1g/h1/h001.Ol09Q_fsc3vwIrH1Po627cn2Q7v9OL2MljrQq-EVcFA) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9WDifJMqK2ZAKNDza039FJvspUwi2H0xQu4IFAh9LOCRpe8Ea5hVUkp1qLS-DiDhpuMNRkWSQjqSrtji-EUP2i3xRuZLXQ6goRzXDELSyzkoTzmhvCDe4x1mGDHestb375r7jPIDVRHamsdHgQ5AP_QwtgTODKOYFnMqp5UyHh86MFk_eY72z0Y6aV01152waF56L4PEB-IQlKExEHialZgfASvgJb340nuIeqywDdzLc87f9F2aE90VOdtzCc18dIDMyjOGlX9ATLdzQRfH8T2CEz6ZQhCpiZltd9k3nTuV0qrn16yB7Hb6qGXIKbmPZPvfksivHdS8ectRAWHqn9LYJMMsOw28CIxFSXZfOemUcd2La9Pt473Aj3ADGNfOhHB4Oiggz702eoIwcRvpu03q87YOcbK87-1HYSJjhzEc_KzTupLqgOa9iM9XdZZbbI4lkz9Z0665HUxLdqMif1g/4jo/uyR_8PmmQ7u-nrdEK53W1g/h2/h001.sZICRVd6w4UWwk02FJgOV0iXbfjiEvv9L1EfEs_o7NI)

Members of Congress already sent an additional $150 billion to the Pentagon war machine in the Big Budget Betrayal bill earlier this year. **Shamefully, they did this while voting to cut healthcare and food assistance for families in their districts.**
Many of my colleagues who claim to care about waste and fraud have no problem voting for increases in the Pentagon budget, even though the Pentagon hasn’t passed an audit for 7 years in a row.

As the only Democrat who can flip a Governor's seat blue this year, I want to set an example for the nation.
That's why we've knocked on over 250,000 doors so far. It's why we've launched plans to make life more affordable and strengthen our schools. And it's why we've committed to building the largest grassroots campaign in our Commonwealth's history.
_This won't be an easy race, but I'm used to overcoming the odds._
Back in 2018, I ran for Congress in a district that Republicans had controlled for 50 years. People told me that I shouldn't run, that I couldn't win.
_Well, together, we pulled off the impossible._
**Now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia in the biggest election yet of Trump's second term.** National Republicans are throwing millions of dollars at us, and Trump himself has started launching attacks, but I know this team will have my back with so much on the line.
It may sound small, but your $10 contribution would help us make sure we can counter all the right-wing disinformation and continue sharing our agenda with voters.

clean_body: This won't be an easy race, but I'm used to overcoming the odds. | | | = Hi Derek, it's Abigail Spanberger, Democratic nominee for Governor of Virginia. I'm respectfully asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Abigail Spanberger and Mark Warner: | = = = | = = = ---|--- As the only Democrat who can flip a Governor's seat blue this year, I want to set an example for the nation. That's why we've knocked on over 250,000 doors so far. It's why we've launched plans to make life more affordable and strengthen our schools. And it's why we've committed to building the largest grassroots campaign in our Commonwealth's history. This won't be an easy race, but I'm used to overcoming the odds. Back in 2018, I ran for Congress in a district that Republicans had controlled for 50 years. People told me that I shouldn't run, that I couldn't win. Well, together, we pulled off the impossible. Now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia in the biggest election yet of Trump's second term. National Republicans are throwing millions of dollars at us, and Trump himself has started launching attacks, but I know this team will have my back with so much on the line. It may sound small, but your $10 contribution would help us make sure we can counter all the right-wing disinformation and continue sharing our agenda with voters. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Abigail Spanberger and Mark Warner: = = = = = = Thank you so much, Abigail Spanberger = ********=****** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

body:
| | | Since we launched our campaign in January, I’ve personally knocked thousands of doors to flip VA-HD22 and expand the 51-49 Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates this November.
I’ve got more doors to knock this weekend!
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6JVWfSIy4GZfox9RzBB5J3QF25ZIT4bRLQ39rb3vlc2NP3Pasr29lt3-nMykSxWTT88q_T2Kv69hArPFruwJaBtKRmgo2NaHxA5Aen4i_W7UBYYdut1GeWCKDJVmFiSZQqbYzrTcuZ6_gxl4HvtoCIVmqojPfJx0WsEJ7Wwi0j8N4GQC_69CyUMMt8kq2OHxBw7nnsWWvl8t71SBqeAnMz_ffERRTJJLUmRi5NwUEdLInGJ13aGw8KJPGjMwJ7MXAw/4jo/6WYgfD__QlqxnOzKnLpMog/h0/h001.HX6iG2HfBS5fSJjRvZtnFLTBMJXBi5SrmL79hEBSbzo)
It’s the best part of campaigning: one-on-one conversations with voters about what concerns their families.
My neighbors say they’re worried about Donald Trump and MAGA.
I also hear that we all want the same things: fully-funded public schools, safer communities, affordable health care, and a strong democracy.
**Now, we’re in the final sprint. Early voting starts in just two weeks, and I need to knock as many doors as I can.**
******[The more we can raise online with emails like this, the less time I have to devote to fundraising ... and the more time I can spend on the doors. clean_body: | | | Since we launched our campaign in January, I’ve personally knocked thousands of doors to flip VA-HD22 and expand the 51-49 Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates this November. I’ve got more doors to knock this weekend! It’s the best part of campaigning: one-on-one conversations with voters about what concerns their families. My neighbors say they’re worried about Donald Trump and MAGA. I also hear that we all want the same things: fully-funded public schools, safer communities, affordable health care, and a strong democracy. Now, we’re in the final sprint. Early voting starts in just two weeks, and I need to knock as many doors as I can. **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Your donations fund our full-scale mail, digital, and TV advertising campaigns that help reach thousands of voters that I can’t reach personally. And, your donations help us get our message out - voters at the doors are seeing and hearing the results of your work. Thanks for your support, Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. name: Greg Casar
subject: I’m officially running for reelection
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250906-1513-foote&t=1001&akid=1513%2E342411%2E85MUJ- ]Squad Victory Fund

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250906-casar-split-movement.W44Zty&refcode=em20250906-1513&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1513%2E342411%2E85MUJ- ]Greg Casar

Hi, Peter. It’s
Congressman Greg Casar, and I need you to hear this directly from me
first:

I’m officially running for re-election in Austin.

Donald Trump and Greg Abbott pushed through their racist, illegal,
gerrymandered maps that merge my district with another Democrat’s. Their
goal is clear: to protect Trump from accountability in the next election.

They’re rigging the maps to silence our communities and keep progressive
fighters like me out of the People’s House.

They don’t want me in Congress because they don’t want us to be heard.

But I have news for them: we’re not going anywhere. I’m going to keep
fighting for Austin and working people every single day.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250906-casar-split-movement.W44Zty&refcode=em20250906-1513&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1513%2E342411%2E85MUJ- ]If you’re with me, please split a donation right now between The Squad
Victory Fund and my reelection campaign to help me fight back and keep our
progressive, pro-worker movement in Congress.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250906-casar-split-movement.W44Zty&refcode=em20250906-1513&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1513%2E342411%2E85MUJ- ]Contribute ››

If you don’t know already, let me tell you what I’m fighting for.

I didn’t start my career in a courtroom or the corporate C-suite. I
started it here in Austin — on construction sites, organizing alongside
workers to win a raise, a union, and the right to a water break.

It’s where I learned the two big lessons that guide my work:

1. When working people stand together — Black, white, Latino, immigrant,
and native-born — we win.
2. When you’re taking on big corporations and corrupt politicians, you
don’t roll over. You stand up and fight back.

Those lessons took me from the Austin City Council — where we built
affordable housing, raised the minimum wage, and saved our local Planned
Parenthood — to the halls of Congress.

But you didn’t elect me to learn the broken playbook Democrats have used
for decades. You sent me there to write a new one.

So I’m doing things differently.

I’m taking on Trump, his billionaire buddies, and their puppet
politicians.

Greg Abbott and Donald Trump want movements like ours out of Congress
because they’re scared of what we can achieve.

They think they can silence our city. Take us backwards from the rights
our heroes fought for. They don’t want people like me in Congress, because
they don’t want people like us to be heard.

But if Abbott and Trump think they can silence us, they’ve got another
thing coming.

So, Peter, I am
proud to share that I will be running for re-election. To represent
Austin, the city that gave me everything. And I plan to give it my
everything too.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250906-casar-split-movement.W44Zty&refcode=em20250906-1513&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1513%2E342411%2E85MUJ- ]If you are with me, please split $3 between The Squad
Victory Fund and my reelection campaign.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250906-casar-split-movement.W44Zty&refcode=em20250906-1513&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=1513%2E342411%2E85MUJ- ]Contribute ››

Let’s win this thing, together.

Greg Casar

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1513%2E342411%2E85MUJ-

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

Peter, Trump just asked the Supreme Court to quickly rule on an emergency appeal approving his wide-ranging reciprocal tariff agenda: [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6rbjiLbuw32n-zlV1B48TSeWzq2FDstiL34HGQeQ06pYct61jMLEhtKPx9Qh0i556F2S6oeC3jKw5OgOFXc4lyEEXwgJ1IaVII2VosVy20SqhCu7FZbAfylSIU7IvwdjFWiYJMDujZVDpYaQJKLdhO3a8HiLiQGPL3qal51Z3KvM_8X6udGhbHo2fCH49-zP7ed4YRebYW-Jr5zlB5GC_yCuAha5J7hfWJ5Fg99n1bnKkBAnb-cUrz5ECyRmDOe5yKrhAkWSum4kEnClf4Khw-H-J37ola42lh7D9Qa42HV1p_woFHSXmYFoFW0ksZRj0/4jo/AHQAv41BQCyGcWhxpKo1GA/h0/h001.b7-790mTW5mg_1KzlwCdA669bzTk3aYnRVHbtlthic8) **He warned of "devastation" if he loses the appeal and his power is weakened.** Just five days ago, a lower court ruled that Trump had illegally overstepped his authority in implementing the tariffs—an executive decision that has the potential to turn the entire economy upside down. Now, the Supreme Court will decide whether to keep their “major questions doctrine” in place, a rule the MAGA justices made up out of nowhere to allow them to act as an unelected super-legislature that can weigh in on and overrule policy positions they personally don’t like. **The MAGA justices on the Court used the “major questions doctrine” to rule against President Biden when he tried to cancel student loan debt. Now, they’ll use the same doctrine to allow Trump to fundamentally reshape the American economy.** This is the moment Trump and his right-wing extremist cronies have been waiting for. These decisions are exactly why they worked for decades to pack the Supreme Court with MAGA loyalists. When this Supreme Court is faced with a decision between Trump and the law, they’ve proven that they’ll choose Trump every time. **According to the Yale Budget Lab, the tariffs are on track to cost a typical households $2,400 on average. 1 American consumers are expected to get hit with at least 70% of the cost.2 ** In a democracy, Trump shouldn’t be allowed to snap his fingers and make life harder for every American—but that’s exactly what the Supreme Court is poised to allow him to do. **Trump is flooding the zone with his outrageous moves toward authoritarianism to make it difficult for us to keep up and fight back.** We can’t let the Supreme Court’s role in Trump’s takeover skate by unnoticed. That’s why United for Democracy is hyperfocused on holding the MAGA justices accountable and taking back our judiciary and our Constitution. [**We’re bringing together allies and experts across the country to keep the spotlight on the Supreme Court and fight back in real time. Chip in today to power our efforts >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsQNarR6PCR1lUtXpWTyhe6rbjiLbuw32n-zlV1B48TSc66Uq-VXvbAb8_sCGgLKszBwyQhjZk14jXg8k2Swh3tlzZk-PWt1AJyT5Cdt0pDK0Tz3F9X2OHcVOYFKLNdCZFDNCSk2-KtBdT2JDf-GUeAdVpTqeeECF2ttrYcvNuUmwA7i50SN-q0TkOdVpLxESHGeugt_RAOvwbSiTSBlDyaOvjhBa_fWrXAIiMK3edvyGhJuaGDPN7IM3qco73k8nstIWbMvVRD17yjcw6xKJzP8GmgDk6GyvY87cGP5jKl2w8C7sVg2V9eZE4Lg4_eY9QQkkOocIJ-rk6t88SAt4hs/4jo/AHQAv41BQCyGcWhxpKo1GA/h1/h001.qcV0TJvf4evIFBJ6OBSSudIR9Ba4KLhBXTw93wtRj1g) Thank you for being in the fight for our democracy, Stasha Rhodes

name: All On The Line Ohio Update
subject: re: Ohio
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
The only way we can protect fair representation is by working together
|
---

Peter,
There’s no more effective tool to end map manipulation than mobilizing supporters to take action. That’s exactly what our teams are doing right now in Ohio.
As Ohio’s redistricting process gets underway, All On The Line is leading the grassroots movement to ensure fair representation for all Ohioans.
Earlier this summer, we hosted the first of many events where people shared their stories, learned how to testify for fair maps, and even mobilized their fellow neighbors to join the fight.
A.G. Holder also headlined an Ohio small business roundtable event where panelists discussed the importance of government stability and accountability to their local businesses.
Every day, All On The Line is harnessing the power of the people so that we can build a democracy that truly works for everyone — from Ohio to Texas and beyond. But this work is only possible when grassroots supporters like you stand with us.
**[Make a gift now to help fund our organizing efforts on the ground in Ohio and across the country and fuel our fight for fairness in our democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114738860/567992577/1200718241?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_OHUpdate_email_20250906-AOTL-Tier1-OHUpdate_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250906-AOTL-Tier1-OHUpdate_&utm_campaign=OHUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyZDYwNDhjLTNhOGItZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SYQ0yeLfZPWbX9ZSuaSgtKTdnSHfdqloU0gltHo9_NY=)**

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: Let’s keep giving ‘em hell
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114740280/567997380/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg0NmNjMGItM2Q4Yi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OaLxi3uQudgUmOxsEnTIcAp0iq3MDlbPG_GqminwnvE=) Hi, tonight is the last stop on my “Give ‘Em Hell” town hall tour. I kickstarted this back in May to reject the president’s harmful agenda and engage directly with Oregonians. Since then, I’ve had the opportunity to stop in seven cities across our district and host several telephone town halls to hear your thoughts and concerns. So I want to say thank you to everyone who has shown up to use your voice at my town halls this summer. It’s your stories that fuel our fight and help me better represent our community in Congress. From protecting Medicaid to defending Social Security to lowering costs, I’ve heard what’s on Oregonians’ minds and I’m ready to keep fighting to put your interests first. **We are in a fight for our nation, our values, and our freedoms, and I’ll never stop defending our country and standing up for my fellow Oregonians every chance I get.** **[If that’s a fight you believe in, then I hope you’ll consider making a contribution to my re-election campaign today and ensure Oregonians always have a representative who will show up for them.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114740283/567997382/-629675555?refcode=email_090625_lasttownhall&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg0NmNjMGItM2Q4Yi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OaLxi3uQudgUmOxsEnTIcAp0iq3MDlbPG_GqminwnvE=)** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114740285/567997385/-629675555?refcode=email_lasttownhall&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTg0NmNjMGItM2Q4Yi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OaLxi3uQudgUmOxsEnTIcAp0iq3MDlbPG_GqminwnvE=)

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Peter, I’m counting on you to help up clean up the Media’s Lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC

The Radical Left Governors and Mayors of crime ridden cities don’t want to stop the radical crime. I wish they’d just give me a call. I’d gain respect for them. Now hear me: WE’RE GOING TO DO IT ANYWAY. This isn’t a political thing; We have the right to do it because I HAVE AN OBLIGATION TO KEEP AMERICA SAFE! Thank you for your support! Donald J. clean_body: | | | ** We’re calling out Republican Rep. Kiggans' betrayal! We are furious, and you should be too. Republicans promised to look out for us. Instead, they slashed food assistance and took a wrecking ball to our healthcare while protecting the corrupt, rich and powerful. That’s not representation, that’s betrayal. Able Dems just put up our first billboard in Campton, VA, calling out vulnerable Republican Rep. Jen Kiggans for gutting SNAP. People are seeing it. It’s hitting a nerve. **Now we need your help to put up the next one, exposing her vote for devastating, historic cuts to healthcare. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. If they can take food off our tables and healthcare from our families, they will. Unless we make it impossible to ignore. Let’s be clear: the Republican Party isn’t working for you. They’re working for Trump and the donor class, protecting the well‐connected while regular people pay the price. We’re done whispering about it. We’re putting it on billboards so everyone sees exactly who sold them out. ** ****Thanks for your support. -Able Dems elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Hi, it's Dr. Mary Trump. ** ** **As Donald Trump 's niece, I know what an unqualified and dangerous person in public office looks like.** ** ** But it's not just my uncle. All across the country, his acolytes have gained power and now control the Republican Party -- _including here in Georgia, thanks in part to Marjorie Taylor Greene._ ** ** That's why I'm reaching out today. ** ** [**Shawn Harris is running a grassroots, people-powered campaign to defeat MTG and restore honor and integrity to the U.S. Congress. I 'm proud to endorse him, and I'm asking you personally to join me in supporting Shawn with a contribution of $25 or more today. My uncle's presidencies have been about nothing more than tearing us apart, sowing division, and destroying democracy -- all so that he can profit and become more powerful. And that's exactly what Marjorie Taylor Greene, as one of his biggest supporters, does each and every day in the House of Representatives. Neither Donald nor Greene deserves the office they hold. ** ** [**That 's why I'm supporting Shawn Harris in this campaign, but I need you to stand with me at this moment. Please, chip in whatever you can to help carry Shawn over the finish line, and let's defeat my uncle's biggest loyalist once and for all. >>**](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/DHFJSFeSA2hR8tb_d3mtEQ~~/AAPPABA~/XIbbgYz48T9MoQBj07GyzipdqzoCQTAn_FmlgLr8ZHxt5sSOHUcToFsA19AQOgIrkG4FIh8h0aLH0Xv3TbJ87v6UUcQuldLOa3J0h91xnzrqMoG1gFfY2Q9eW74GJoO637pdYGJSRZjXlNe0Tt5l_Zi-9xMcIFuGrxXJJIQjxjilCPKYRhs5jceQXJxeK8Yhr6u3toYh4p4bFgxmt5oz9MrX2irr_R_FP_qSCj1O5qSIITMG23eYZWkTREfmzYLamqtJAGZJp_WRNGXnudZPbpoFmgUPRQQhsNB0GaYl8pdtdBmzy5LYknSyKB4OCokF) Thank you, Dr. Mary L. name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Want a call from David Hogg?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
David wants to thank you for your support at this critical moment.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250906-1&t=1&akid=2627%2E587540%2Epfr6t7)
Peter, **David let us know that he wants to call grassroots donors** to thank them for supporting us during this critical moment for Leaders We Deserve.
**[Want a chance to get a call? Donate $5 now and you might be on the list.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250906_1_calls?refcode=em20250906-2627&amount=5&refcode2=2627_587540_pfr6t7&akid=2627%2E587540%2Epfr6t7)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250906_1_calls?refcode=em20250906-2627&amount=5&refcode2=2627_587540_pfr6t7&akid=2627%2E587540%2Epfr6t7)
Right now, we’re laser-focused on funding our **$20 million investment** in a new generation of progressive leaders. We have some big plans for this election cycle:
🔴 Defeating vulnerable Republicans and flipping their competitive districts blue.
🔵 Challenging ineffective Democrats in safe-seats with young, bold candidates.
🟣 Running progressive champions for open seats and building a bigger bench.
But we also know that **this work is only possible with your support, Peter.** We aren’t funded by right-wing billionaires and corporate PACs. We rely on people just like you chipping in whatever amount makes sense for them, whenever they can.
If we don’t keep our fundraising on track, we risk needing to scale back on our plans for this election. _We can’t let that happen._
**[Peter, will you make a $5 contribution today? If you donate now, you might get a thank you call from David.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250906_1_calls?refcode=em20250906-2627&amount=5&refcode2=2627_587540_pfr6t7&akid=2627%2E587540%2Epfr6t7)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250906_1_calls?amount=5&refcode=em20250906-2627&refcode2=2627_587540_pfr6t7&akid=2627%2E587540%2Epfr6t7)**
Thank you for your support,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250906-1&t=2&refcode2=2627_587540_pfr6t7&akid=2627%2E587540%2Epfr6t7)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: Team Baldwin
subject: The Trump administration doesn’t care if you get sick
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| We need leaders in the Senate who will stand up to this extreme administration.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4958%2E35263%2EVPmFiv)
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-sep25.avzHzX&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250906_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4958%2E35263%2EVPmFiv) RFK Jr. is making America sick again, Peter. From firing thousands of health workers including the CDC Director to defunding research projects addressing cancer, heart attacks, strokes, lead poisoning, injury, violence, our country is less safe and less healthy with RFK Jr. making decisions on our health. The Trump administration might not care about your health, but Tammy will _always_ fight to make healthcare accessible and affordable. We need real leaders in the Senate who will stand up to this extreme administration and fight for accessible care for all of us. **[If you’re with Tammy in this work, will you pitch in today?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-sep25.avzHzX&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250906_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4958%2E35263%2EVPmFiv)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=stb-em-sep25.i9k4bD&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250906_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=4958%2E35263%2EVPmFiv)

subject: Let’s send an unmistakable message
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114741646/568002178/-1384072709?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDQwNmFlYi00MjhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4eCMMWD-jihtc-EzjUhcJnQnMQ4_6i8FE2Nponm1PYU=)
I won’t waste a second of your time, Peter

**[I’m reaching out because the end of this month marks a critical FEC fundraising deadline, and we’re pacing a bit behind where we need to be in order to hit our goal. Will you chip in $3 to keep me fighting for you in Congress, then read on about why this matters?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114741652/568002182/-1384072709?refcode=em-9.6.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDQwNmFlYi00MjhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4eCMMWD-jihtc-EzjUhcJnQnMQ4_6i8FE2Nponm1PYU=)**

---

I’m proud of the way we ran our campaign to unseat an entrenched Republican and give CA-27 real representation.

I decided early on that if I was going to run for Congress, I’d always keep our communities as the top priority – not bowing to political pressure from any side.

We connected with thousands of people at their doorsteps, on the phone, and at events – and our hard work won the day. We ended up being one of the only Democrats to flip a red seat in a tough election year.

I’m honored to be in Congress advocating for the Santa Clarita, San Fernando, and Antelope Valleys in the months since our historic win.

**But this time around, our race will look a lot different. As a first-term member who flipped a difficult district blue, I’m a huge target – and the national GOP is already attacking me.**

We need a strong showing today to stay on top of our quarterly goal. Come September 30th, we’re required by the FEC to make our fundraising public – and that will inform how hard the GOP will hit us.

**[If everyone reading this email chipped in $3 today, we’d send an unmistakable message that CA-27 is going to stay blue for the long haul. Can I count on your support before midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114741658/568002190/-1384072709?refcode=em-9.6.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDQwNmFlYi00MjhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4eCMMWD-jihtc-EzjUhcJnQnMQ4_6i8FE2Nponm1PYU=)**

clean_body: | = I won’t waste a second of your time, Peter = | **= I’m proud of the way we ran our campaign to unseat an entrenched Republican and give CA-27 real representation. I decided early on that if I was going to run for Congress, I’d always keep our communities as the top priority – not bowing to political pressure from any side. We connected with thousands of people at their doorsteps, on the phone, and at events – and our hard work won the day. We ended up being one of the only Democrats to flip a red seat in a tough election year. I’m honored to be in Congress advocating for the Santa Clarita, San Fernando, and Antelope Valleys in the months since our historic win. But this time around, our race will look a lot different. As a first-term member who flipped a difficult district blue, I’m a huge target – and the national GOP is already attacking me. We need a strong showing today to stay on top of our quarterly goal. Come September 30th, we’re required by the FEC to make our fundraising public – and that will inform how hard the GOP will hit us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Since launching this campaign, I have visited communities all across the Commonwealth — from Farmville to Fairfax, Richmond to Roanoke — to hear directly from Virginians about the challenges they face.
_And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources._
My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." _We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here._
I've given voters my word: **As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington.**
We can't be defined by what we're against — we must focus on moving our Commonwealth forward.
That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from healthcare and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills.
With the days left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to:
✅ Visit every corner of Virginia.
✅ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks.
✅ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen.
It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond.
**[Everything depends on us raising what we need from grassroots donors. So, I'm asking: will you pitch in $10 or more to my campaign and Fight Like Hell PAC to help us win on November 4th and in the years ahead?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114741715/568002313/597868876?amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250906_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWM0MDZhZWItNDI4Yi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jd7ZhzkTq386-D_M8-zkyppI1C5RDlOFAvOmbI4TScQ=)**

clean_body: It’s a bold step, but we can’t be timid right now. | = Team, this is Abigail Spanberger. We have just two months to go until Election Day! I'm the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's seat blue, and we're in the homestretch now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Abigail Spanberger and Fight Like Hell PAC will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Since launching this campaign, I have visited communities all across the Commonwealth — from Farmville to Fairfax, Richmond to Roanoke — to hear directly from Virginians about the challenges they face. And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources. My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here. I've given voters my word: As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington. We can't be defined by what we're against — we must focus on moving our Commonwealth forward. That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from healthcare and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills. With the days left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to: ✅ Visit every corner of Virginia. ✅ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks. ✅ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen. It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Abigail Spanberger and Fight Like Hell PAC will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = I'm grateful to have you on my team, Abigail Spanberger Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. name: Josh Harder
subject: We need to ban Congressional stock trading
body:
I feel strongly about this. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114742006/568003410/-1860252395?refcode=-footer-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTg0MDZhZWItNDI4Yi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Gre6McyvXAswgoUlcDFRoD1h2pxub9Pztza5zJHv8WU=) | Peter, This shouldn’t be controversial: Members of Congress shouldn’t be allowed to trade stocks while they write the rules. But as we know, _many_ politicians think the rules don’t apply to them. (Refraining from naming names here...) When lawmakers profit from decisions they make, trust in our democracy dies. It’s really that simple. **Public service is supposed to be about helping your community, not about getting rich.** I feel strongly about this because I ran for Congress to fight for working families, not to play Wall Street games. I absolutely support banning Members of Congress from trading stocks, and I want to hear from you. [_**Will you sign our petition to ban Congressional stock trading once and for all?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114742011/568003413/262491616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTg0MDZhZWItNDI4Yi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Gre6McyvXAswgoUlcDFRoD1h2pxub9Pztza5zJHv8WU=&emci=6a35bb60-8b8a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=e8406aeb-428b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=6455652) [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114742016/568003422/262491616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTg0MDZhZWItNDI4Yi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Gre6McyvXAswgoUlcDFRoD1h2pxub9Pztza5zJHv8WU=&emci=6a35bb60-8b8a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=e8406aeb-428b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=6455652) Thank you for standing up for accountability, Josh

name: Derek Tran
subject: Your support matters more than ever
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114742172/568003818/1527952032?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDNmODE0NmItNDM4Yi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WRUK-IMKqcAHsRw55MePokFyF3y33qeOOkEX8oCJ4WI=)
Roll Call just released their list of the ten “most evenly divided” districts in America -- and my district, California’s 45th, made the list. This is resounding _proof_ that every single vote matters. Last year, we flipped CA-45 by just 653 votes. And now, with Republicans pouring millions into this district, national analysts say it’s once again at the center of the fight for the House majority. Here’s what Roll Call reported: Democrats have only a 0.6% edge here on paper. That makes this seat one of the most competitive in the entire country, and one of the most likely to decide control of Congress. I know what’s at stake: the right to affordable health care, reproductive freedom, and a government that works for working families instead of billionaires and special interests. That’s why I’m not taking a dime from Big Pharma or Big Oil. **[But that also means I need grassroots supporters like you to stand with me. With our end-of-quarter FEC report due this month, national Republicans will be watching closely to see if we have the resources to defend this seat. Will you rush in a donation of $3 today to help us hold CA-45?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114742173/568003819/1527952032?refcode=em-9.6.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDNmODE0NmItNDM4Yi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WRUK-IMKqcAHsRw55MePokFyF3y33qeOOkEX8oCJ4WI=)**

clean_body: | = Roll Call just released their list of the ten “most evenly divided” districts in America -- and my district, California’s 45th, made the list. This is resounding proof that every single vote matters. Last year, we flipped CA-45 by just 653 votes. And now, with Republicans pouring millions into this district, national analysts say it’s once again at the center of the fight for the House majority. Here’s what Roll Call reported: Democrats have only a 0.6% edge here on paper. That makes this seat one of the most competitive in the entire country, and one of the most likely to decide control of Congress. I know what’s at stake: the right to affordable health care, reproductive freedom, and a government that works for working families instead of billionaires and special interests. That’s why I’m not taking a dime from Big Pharma or Big Oil. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Republicans only need to flip three seats to take back the majority. If they win here, they’re one step closer to letting Donald Trump’s extreme agenda run unchecked. We can’t let that happen. Together, we’ll keep CA-45 blue and defend the values that matter most. Thank you, Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. Derek Tran is a veteran, consumer rights attorney, and Member of Congress representing California's 45th District. To support Derek's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please click .
