Hey, it’s Jay Jones.
You may have seen my campaign mention that we’re being outraised 8-to-1 by my MAGA opponent, Jason Miyares. It’s true.
But even with this deficit looming over our campaign, here’s what reassures me: we’re unbought.
There’s not a single corrupt MAGA billionaire who I’d let control the office of Attorney General, and I sure as hell am not interested in taking blank checks from MAGA mega-donors – something Jason Miyares can’t say the same about.
While Miyares takes checks from special interests, we’re asking everyday people like you to chip in $10, $25, or $50.
As Jason Miyares rings up Trump’s extremist billionaire buddies for help, our team looks to thousands of Virginians for support.
And just recently, as outside groups invested $1 million to defeat us, folks rallied behind our cause and helped us offset the impact.
That’s what a real grassroots movement looks like.
But a grassroots movement is nothing without its supporters. So will you help us raise every last dollar we need to defeat Jason Miyares and remove Donald Trump’s last foothold in Virginia? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_new-gen-election-em_q32025]

| | Peter, let me be clear: [FIRST:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114742689/568005632/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250906_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODRkMmVjNC00MzhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gBMFaBkJsRo-ZpIQanZtEuB-Eu39odjTAKFz0nBSoIs=) Trump tried to [RIG](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114742691/568005634/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250906_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODRkMmVjNC00MzhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gBMFaBkJsRo-ZpIQanZtEuB-Eu39odjTAKFz0nBSoIs=) the election by robbing Democrats of seats and silencing our voters. body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Congress is back in session, which means Jason is back in D.C. fighting for Coloradans.

He spent August meeting with constituents and hearing firsthand about the devastating impacts of Trump’s reckless health care cuts and trade war that is raising prices for working families.

This agenda is unpopular — even Trump knows it. That’s why his latest boogeyman is mail-in voting.

Donald Trump recently announced that he will move Space Command to punish Colorado for voting against him and using mail-in voting. He’s also threatened to issue an executive order that bans mail-in voting. It’s not only unconstitutional, it’s unreasonable — but he knows the only way he can continue his extreme actions is by suppressing people’s voices and trying to rig the next election by stealing congressional seats with gerrymandering.

Jason will always stand up to fight for voting access. Stand with him today by pitching in a grassroots contribution: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-sep25]

clean_body: Jason Crow For Colorado [] Congress is back in session, which means Jason is back in D.C. fighting for Coloradans. He spent August meeting with constituents and hearing firsthand about the devastating impacts of Trump’s reckless health care cuts and trade war that is raising prices for working families. This agenda is unpopular — even Trump knows it. That’s why his latest boogeyman is mail-in voting. Donald Trump recently announced that he will move Space Command to punish Colorado for voting against him and using mail-in voting. He’s also threatened to issue an executive order that bans mail-in voting. It’s not only unconstitutional, it’s unreasonable — but he knows the only way he can continue his extreme actions is by suppressing people’s voices and trying to rig the next election by stealing congressional seats with gerrymandering. Jason will always stand up to fight for voting access. Stand with him today by pitching in a grassroots contribution: [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $10 NOW [] DONATE $25 NOW [] DONATE $50 NOW [] DONATE $100 NOW [] DONATE $250 NOW [] ANOTHER AMOUNT [] Voters in every party use vote-by-mail at a high rate because it’s safe, reliable, and helps to make voting more accessible. Peter,

The Michigan GOP, the NRSC, and Fox News are all obsessed with Abdul. It’s
starting to get weird...

[ A ]A post from the Michigan GOP that says: Mamdani + Abdul El-Sayed = Two
peas in a pod. The post also has a graphic of Zohran and Abdul
photoshopped into peas in a pod.

They’re running TV segments, ranting on social media, and even comparing
Abdul to other progressive leaders like Zohran Mamdani — all in an effort
to paint him as some “radical.”

But what’s so “radical” about fighting for Medicare for All? Or giving
teachers a raise? Or making sure our kids can breathe clean air and drink
clean water?

That’s the “radical” platform Abdul is running on — a vision rooted in
making life better for working people across Michigan. Because in the
richest country in the world, it shouldn’t be this hard to get by.

The truth is, MAGA Republicans attack us because they’re afraid of us.
They know that when we rally for a system that prioritizes people over
profits, we win.

clean_body: We Didn't Start the Fire | | | | | | | | Reader,For far too long the New York Times has dominated American journalism. It calls itself the "paper of record" and claims it publishes "all the news that's fit to print." But Americans know that the Times doesn't have their best interests at heart. The good news is that the Times' historic rival is back in business and quickly reclaiming market share. | | | | The New York Sun is a paper that fights for the American people and promises to "shine for all." Most of all, the Sun loves America and is fully committed to upholding the Constitution. We're not in the business of stoking the fires that plague our republic. We're in the business of putting them out. So if you're tired of the New York Times acting like the most important newspaper in America, it's time to join the Sun and our fast growing movement to save American journalism. For just 1c a day you can make a statement about which paper speaks for you. Please join us today. | | | | | | | Dovid Efune Publisher, The New York Sun | | The New York Sun Company, LLC, 300 Park Ave, 2nd Floor, New York, NY 10022, United States **** ${Gears.unsubscribe\(\})

name: Team Ossoff
subject: re: Kemp’s endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
Brian Kemp is weighing in on Georgia’s Senate race.
#

Peter, we had to make sure you saw this:
[](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250906-1-f&t=1&akid=732%2E5691347%2EoTxddk)
Governor Brian Kemp just weighed in on Georgia’s critical Senate race — and _personally endorsed_ MAGA Republican Derek Dooley to challenge Jon Ossoff.
Republicans here in Georgia and across the nation are all in to defeat Jon because they **_know**_ he’s the most vulnerable Senator up for reelection in 2026. And they know that Democrats can’t retake the Senate majority without protecting this seat.
**That’s why:**
* → Kemp is trying to influence this race by throwing his support behind his best buddy, Dooley.
* → JD Vance came to Georgia and attacked Jon live, on stage at a major GOP event.
* → Far-right Super PACs are spending millions of dollars on TV and digital ads attacking Jon.

The GOP is going to do _(and spend!)_ whatever it takes to win Georgia and defend their Senate majority in 2026. **That’s why we need to fight back now.**
**[Can you please make a contribution today to ensure Jon has what it takes to fight and WIN? We wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t so important.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250906-1-f&t=2&akid=732%2E5691347%2EoTxddk)

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Our work is far from over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=kMSCh5%2BEWF4XzHeZNcrV1BnwSyJbLIc0xb0moVc8Un4cn8WQ7sez7vlngVwKXlep%2FbwBGxhnMK%2B7XvW7T5ESYUyL32E8WGEwvZY29U8AyzSUpmrM%2FfInlvBqo0CCHfMpP%2FYWyuy4kFW9%2FKgHYQVboiB4ILh2%2F3ztHAWiiITAY%2BDjoB14jqr8laM7QASuACQ80j%2FOaB33WSFkzqjCMwlr7PgzbvvU%2BvRDhchCFrf2wQxyFmWOkTnULvWPRhI5aTFQy5DOCA7DCUaPq82ikPJYYaONdzSLzJTBNI1onp0Zdywtlu5G%2FiKddQ3fDSVSWgElO4a5%2BiCc0MY2DRBdumfelah%2F1hEcwbDJDqKk97p%2By5FlgU9pPno8ICEX%2BBdndeZVjVropyFW6ENGsbh1rp%2BX0blRF7ztKpRJ5x%2BSByXJATY%3D)
---
| |
---
Last month, I traveled across southern New Mexico and met with folks from all walks of life — people who’ve seen the impact of our work, and others who reminded me just how much more we still need to do. From small business owners and teachers to farmers, nurses, and young people building a future here — one thing was clear: **New Mexicans are resilient.** They believe in hard work, in community, and in each other. That’s why I’ve been fighting for every New Mexican — to bring good jobs to our communities, expand access to healthcare, invest in our schools, and make sure opportunity reaches every corner of our state. **But we’re not done.** Too many families are still working hard just to stay afloat. Too many communities are still waiting for the investments they’ve been promised. And too many doors remain closed to too many people. **That’s why I’m not stopping.** I’m going to keep fighting for a New Mexico where everyone has a fair shot — to build a good life and get ahead. **But I can’t do it alone.** [If you believe in this work, I’m asking you to stand with me. clean_body: Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Last month, I traveled across southern New Mexico and met with folks from all walks of life — people who’ve seen the impact of our work, and others who reminded me just how much more we still need to do. From small business owners and teachers to farmers, nurses, and young people building a future here — one thing was clear: New Mexicans are resilient. They believe in hard work, in community, and in each other. That’s why I’ve been fighting for every New Mexican — to bring good jobs to our communities, expand access to healthcare, invest in our schools, and make sure opportunity reaches every corner of our state. But we’re not done. Too many families are still working hard just to stay afloat. Too many communities are still waiting for the investments they’ve been promised. And too many doors remain closed to too many people. That’s why I’m not stopping. I’m going to keep fighting for a New Mexico where everyone has a fair shot — to build a good life and get ahead. But I can’t do it alone. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = In this fight with you, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . | Peter,

I want to make sure you know exactly what’s at stake. So here are 3 things you need to know:

**1️⃣ ****Trump and the GOP are targeting California.** Yes, even here. Republicans only need a handful of seats to keep control of the House, and they’re spending big in blue states to protect their grip on power.

**2️⃣ ****I’m leading BOLD PAC to flip the House.** As Chair of BOLD PAC, I’m helping elect diverse, progressive Democrats nationwide, but the road ahead is far from easy.

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: Trump’s public broadcasting cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hi folks,

Republicans swore that defunding public broadcasting wouldn’t hurt lifesaving emergency alerts.

They lied. Now, rural stations are already feeling the effects of these cuts.

Local radio stations are lifelines. Flood warnings. Tsunami alerts. Pandemic updates. When danger hits, folks don’t scroll social media or refresh The New York Times home page – they turn on the local radio.

Stations are losing hundreds of thousands of dollars in federal support, reporters are leaving, and disaster coverage is hanging by a thread.

But Republicans don't care. They were ready to rubber-stamp whatever Trump wanted, so they voted to gut public broadcasting funding. Even though they knew it’d hit their own constituents hardest.

That’s not just reckless. It’s shameful.

And Republicans think no one will notice.

So we have to prove them wrong. Please, will you let me know where you stand by taking my 60-second public broadcasting survey now?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51636?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=1001&akid=10293%2E434096%2EdlHFPt

Thanks, folks,

John ❤️

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1002&akid=10293%2E434096%2EdlHFPt

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23369%2E4449941%2EjHghTh) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23369%2E4449941%2EjHghTh) Team,

More and more Democratic Governors are standing up to Donald Trump and defending our democracy, but we need to know where YOU stand. [**Represent your area and let us know using the buttons below:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68155?t=3&akid=23369%2E4449941%2EjHghTh) [ **DO YOU SUPPORT THE DEMOCRATIC GOVERNORS STANDING UP TO DONALD TRUMP? **

They’re ALL fighting back against Trump’s illegal redistricting war, National Guard threats, and blatant attacks on our democratic institutions!!

But we need to know if local Democrats like you support these Democratic Governors in their fight against Trump.

[**That’s why we’re launching an EMERGENCY POLL to gather data from your area for our records. We still need [194] more responses before 11:59 PM TONIGHT, so please team, let us know what you think:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68155?t=8&akid=23369%2E4449941%2EjHghTh)

name: Jane Fonda
subject: I have something special for you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Your chance to win a poster signed by me and Artist Shepard Fairey.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114743392/568007793/1328794144?refcode=ea.d1b8cd17-488b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.d1b8cd17-488b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQxYjhjZDE3LTQ4OGItZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q3YqpZABWkGz86987ilmKM3idibkCAdTO2w-cUboMA8=&emci=b02bc911-488b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=d1b8cd17-488b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)
---
When Shepard Fairey, the visionary artist behind so many iconic images of resistance, reached out to honor my lifetime of activism through his art, I knew this limited-edition poster belonged with the people who made that legacy possible. I can't tell you how moved I've been by the response to Shepard's incredible artwork so far. Over 900 supporters like you have already entered for their chance to win one of five signed posters, and I don't want YOU to miss out. Y’all, I have something to apologize for.
The other day, I used profane language to describe my thoughts on the wannabe dictator who sits in the Oval Office these days.
I’m sorry for my language, y’all — **sorry that I didn’t go even further.**
Because the truth is that barely begins to describe how I feel about Donald Trump, his horrific administration, and all the destruction he’s caused ever since he took back power.
**So when I called Donald Trump a _piece of s—t_ , I meant it — and then some.**
[Will you help me hold Donald Trump, his MAGA minions, and all their enablers accountable by splitting $10 or more between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia right now? name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Village Idiot president spending billions to switch "Defense" Department to "War"
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't let Trump waste billions changing the Defense Department to "War" Department](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta8702084-8e56-4aa7-9500-3794b9ee639b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdd98d84a-35a5-4ef0-ab6e-6d8007c61047/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _([Take action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d071dd3-efcc-4586-9999-0c1d16fe8ab2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[,](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbc43c4e6-ea1d-48b7-a1a8-359cb9523bf2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) then forward this email to friends to help build support!)_ President Trump is about to spend several billion dollars to change the name of the "Department of Defense" to "Department of War." And people who actually know something about the military are [horrified](https://default.salsalabs.org/T97f100d9-2b1d-4760-a050-2c50686350b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) that he will be diverting money and attention from critically important matters for something so stupid, given that there are about eleventy billion crises right now that could draw us into war. [**Add your name: "Don't let Trump waste billions changing the Defense Department to "War Department."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13c316bb-3f11-49b1-a2d6-f7bdb4ce0b98/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The Defense Department is enormous, with millions of people and a huge number facilities around the globe. Seemingly small things like changing letterhead, signs, etc., will add up to billions. And it doesn't enhance our defense, it hurts it. By making us look like warmongering jackasses AND ridiculous at the same time, it will make it far more easy for our adversaries to appeal to neutral nations and even our close allies. It's stupid, it's costly, and it's the kind of thing that could only come from the village idiot currently commander-in-chief. Trump needs to reverse himself on this, **and if he won't Congress must do it for him**. [**Add your name: "Don't let Trump waste billions changing the Defense Department to "War Department."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d0e4b97-ffd4-4721-9291-bee739eb098c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T853ba9ff-a22b-4369-a5d0-4c44f2a8fa84/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Only a few discounted hotel rooms remain!
body:
Make your DC trip a memorable one with an overnight stay
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/010001992036d813-d3ec0fdf-886c-4a4f-b219-961f8865548e-000000/LAUFNu6gGbRYTFRNp8np1AiA0MqrxHQRnGAgqsounI8=421)We are days away from the culmination of the Only Citizens Vote bus tour. After traveling thousands of miles, one thing is clear: a majority of Americans agree that **only citizens should vote in U.S. elections!**
I hope you’re planning on joining us in DC on _**Wednesday, September 10th**_ , While hotel stays in DC are often over $400 per night, we have been able to secure a limited number of rooms at a nearby Courtyard Marriott at a huge discount of $135/night. These rooms are available on a first-come, first-served basis, so [_**secure yours today**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdc-hotel%2F/1/010001992036d813-d3ec0fdf-886c-4a4f-b219-961f8865548e-000000/b3V4nL9Ev6A-LJKkuzEYeFAiwDlF9D94nW2oR0HxR4U=421)![BOOK YOUR STAY](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdc-hotel%2F/2/010001992036d813-d3ec0fdf-886c-4a4f-b219-961f8865548e-000000/GfBz8t0eRxBeXSxV_aS6F6zkYBZH129h5cuYp0JCy28=421)If you can, [_**invite a friend**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fevents.teapartypatriots.org%2Fevent%2Focv-bus-tour-washington-dc%2F/1/010001992036d813-d3ec0fdf-886c-4a4f-b219-961f8865548e-000000/xzz8jg0Hot8J1sBMqKBqydGAQ-B9ShowV57-b3J24K4=421) or two to travel with you. Every patriot who shows up amplifies the message that We The People demand that Congress close the loopholes and only allow U.S. citizens to vote in U.S. elections!Can’t wait to see you there!Jenny Beth Martin
_P.S. If you can't make it, I understand, but_[ _**_please take 10 seconds to sign our petition_**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Faction.teapartypatriots.org%2Fpetition%2Fonlycitizensvote%2F%3Futm_source=tpot%26utm_medium=email%26utm_campaign=fc-email%26utm_content=2025-09-06-room_block/1/010001992036d813-d3ec0fdf-886c-4a4f-b219-961f8865548e-000000/govHsGv23rZqVCYNXAofMURT_gLa98OaJ_WUavzM1Yg=421) _. Even if you're not there in person, your voice demanding Congress protect our elections will be heard!_[ CONTRIBUTE](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/1/010001992036d813-d3ec0fdf-886c-4a4f-b219-961f8865548e-000000/a1lwMabe0qwKwnHiZzDxvqb-nMH8pEyuxjAiO0RXsmQ=421) _This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. All rights reserved.__Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes._ To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:[_**Tea Party Patriots Action**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/2/010001992036d813-d3ec0fdf-886c-4a4f-b219-961f8865548e-000000/g1XEU4u6mL5fPOSeRB-mT2d7qUXRyMWF7ov5l6XqvNE=421)
2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314
Woodstock, GA 30189Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [unsubscribe](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/1/010001992036d813-d3ec0fdf-886c-4a4f-b219-961f8865548e-000000/4gmY08Lq8PZSHSUErahqJUbDE92aYFogouZhY3yE_TU=421) or [update your preferences](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/2/010001992036d813-d3ec0fdf-886c-4a4f-b219-961f8865548e-000000/5-CMN8tLYNBjSGBnJIezS2E9TnYs4rHMKG1QxrLObFs=421).

Fellow American - I often think about my father's journey to America. He arrived with just $1.75 in his pocket and a dream in his heart. It's a reminder that the American Dream is within reach, no matter where we start.

As I run for Governor of Virginia, I'm reminded of the power of small actions adding up to make a big difference. That's why I'm writing to ask for your help today.

_**If every person reading this email could give just $1.75, we would hit our major fundraising goal and be one step closer to winning this toss-up race.**_ It's a small ask, but it would make a huge impact.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Here’s how we win in 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
The New York Times just sent [https://www.nytimes.com/2025/08/20/us/politics/democratic-party-voter-registration-crisis.html] us a wake-up call—people are losing faith in the Democratic Party. Red, blue, and purple states alike are seeing a decline in registered Democrats, especially among working-class and young voters.
We can’t rely on the old playbook. We need to give people a clear reason to support Democrats. That means meeting people where they are, hearing their concerns, and proposing real solutions.
I’ve traveled across the country for my “Benefits Over Billionaires” town halls to do just that. We’re registering new Democratic voters on site in red districts by laying out policies that would improve people’s lives if we win:
✅Increase social security and restore funding for Medicaid
✅Make billionaires pay their fair share in taxes
✅Stop price-gouging on food and prescription drugs
✅Create a $17 minimum wage
✅Invest in affordable housing
✅Root out political corruption
This is not a lost cause. We can win. We can take back the House and deliver for the American people. But to make that happen, I need your help.
Will you donate $10 or more today to help me stay on the road and show that Democrats are the party of the future? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benefits-over-billionaires-town-halls?refcode=20250825&amount=10]

clean_body: [] Peter, The New York Times just sent [] us a wake-up call—people are losing faith in the Democratic Party. Red, blue, and purple states alike are seeing a decline in registered Democrats, especially among working-class and young voters. We can’t rely on the old playbook. We need to give people a clear reason to support Democrats. That means meeting people where they are, hearing their concerns, and proposing real solutions. I’ve traveled across the country for my “Benefits Over Billionaires” town halls to do just that. We’re registering new Democratic voters on site in red districts by laying out policies that would improve people’s lives if we win: ✅Increase social security and restore funding for Medicaid ✅Make billionaires pay their fair share in taxes ✅Stop price-gouging on food and prescription drugs ✅Create a $17 minimum wage ✅Invest in affordable housing ✅Root out political corruption This is not a lost cause. We can win. We can take back the House and deliver for the American people. But to make that happen, I need your help. Will you donate $10 or more today to help me stay on the road and show that Democrats are the party of the future? [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT [] Thank you for your support, your activism, and all that you do. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Paxton picked the wrong fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Ken Paxton is doing everything he can to silence those of us who dare to stand up, speak the truth, and fight for what’s right.
You’ve probably seen what he’s been up to lately. After years of corruption, lies, indictments, and using the power of his office to target political enemies, _he’s now targeting us._
**He’s weaponized the Texas justice system in an effort to intimidate us and drain us of the resources we need to fight in Texas. So far his frivolous lawsuits have cost us over $300,000.**
But we’re not backing down. I won’t bend the knee to corruption and abuse of power in this state. We are going to stand and fight.
I hope you’ll be with me in this fight and help ensure we have the resources to defend ourselves and the grassroots power to keep organizing. That’s why I’m asking:
[**Can you chip in right now to help us defend ourselves, stand strong against Ken Paxton’s attacks, and continue organizing?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67034?t=2&akid=240346%2E444211%2EAyhlA6)
**[DONATE](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67034?t=3&akid=240346%2E444211%2EAyhlA6)**
Every dollar you give goes directly toward this urgent work—fighting back against Paxton’s abuse of power and keeping this movement focused on what really matters: organizing, registering voters, and getting our country back.
This isn’t just about me or any one person. It’s about whether people in Texas can speak out without fear of the full weight of the state being brought against us in retaliation.
If Ken Paxton thinks he can bully us into silence, he’s got another thing coming.
[**Please—if you’re able—chip in today to stand our ground and fight back against the growing threat of authoritarianism.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67034?t=4&akid=240346%2E444211%2EAyhlA6)
**[DONATE](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67034?t=5&akid=240346%2E444211%2EAyhlA6)**
Beto O’Rourke

**[Donate](https://secure.numero.ai/contribute/Powered-by-People-52bbdfbf-f23e-4c6f-a608-84d883119212?refcode=em20250906-240346-footer)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=240346%2E444211%2EAyhlA6), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=240346%2E444211%2EAyhlA6).

John has always fought for real results for Colorado — he’s led efforts to pass historic investments in our aging infrastructure, invest billions to take on the climate crisis, bring thousands of good-paying manufacturing jobs back to American soil, _and more._
But with Trump in the White House and Republicans in full control of Congress, Democrats like John have had limited power to deliver meaningful change for hardworking Americans. **They must be stopped — and that starts by defending Colorado’s Senate seat to help Democrats take back the Senate.**

body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:
[ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8faaafe78f4c4e508b5c9d59bb548952&_e=JEKpfvmb2nNADkWWVxCmvgAh2VmDPQbaGF7Eo_eSdbhM2E9SibDp3ZDB5gA9VnE3l2sImSA576jmhfvr4uaxNV852SsAU-BEwDWFXTzMizgDAFuBx8I_bjoChBrKAok4gvKQMumkpEpbUKEOTcbPm1SY9QfiRraVocIlrZf37DA24qCz0SNcMdZTA0W7ddtQYTGgFtfm8II436fPBhuXRLaHWdHk1wZoA6lXj_t5oiMTqanZPk-BPOt_o-1qRlDH5v-KzO4jgR_ZSrIIg4yfpFt-ySe0hZH8wawOPbsBohU2dzAvBky9FwpW4mAkBZu9BLGWoLfCuVNcy2TmGLTrGn3HZSzcQeDpQ5F65sw5mKfqihetGf4qu8ZFwbkqMdn_q3uaJEICi-IzMXEgx_8tGDtqE5LTI0X8E6pPjOI28xZSNIAtaPbNa1TXfaqEjtrRT1pP8SaCjWVqahpFpPIIIhqfNkAq0v_Z0fftmuBSRpLEAOv8UguDqBhRBjzxhHNv9SsZmGLllgCV4vXzGZp4MsYpOVrkqUyepKw-bXYUFaYpsFhVwukpzuHlkOv3Wg0bWFZss0jTsJJuSKuidEtMiv6NneIKPlS48gtWVOKqR63M7vvhD88nxZz6pF9aj-oehOAT-rY5soumDqISJL2LMQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
[ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=8faaafe78f4c4e508b5c9d59bb548952&_e=JEKpfvmb2nNADkWWVxCmvgAh2VmDPQbaGF7Eo_eSdbhM2E9SibDp3ZDB5gA9VnE3l2sImSA576jmhfvr4uaxNV852SsAU-BEwDWFXTzMizgDAFuBx8I_bjoChBrKAok4gvKQMumkpEpbUKEOTcbPm1SY9QfiRraVocIlrZf37DA24qCz0SNcMdZTA0W7ddtQYTGgFtfm8II436fPBhuXRHwhtUTDFomafZorkZTX_whxvwGpAstFqWEy6qX9ol1TGo0lR0KXiDaDpMJElmzO9MKD1zgXn0nLSdEir5oTb4L6gq-WwVMdh3Db-KD8bkk2QxBO8Ieypv4Xq71YLS6hsLQCn7LDl3mpltP1gLFr4NZcyTImEWe4SALjrrCykTKHdUpUi-54tvFs25X6UP4r7R1wwwT3MGXXn-ktV7UqjSpvoHAOaK6WgIGjRA6d3saW6-FS8ResoxTHAKECZRYMgj11jmhVKvr2qjGVcf22b2kJUv2XKKzs0cWcVKE-2IUPUh6O_5aXBVDHhyIt6mt66ZBy2T5WvMcuOP1l4ESSvQ6VQC87rwzA7fwb97v2ZRmmS553N5c0EJ_TxCVOV_kB8iK7oYoTtHGWg59lZL8vNqALXl0PFgFNrRd9OjWmajB92T5Y6GBmjjXZUkLmkSwK-w%3D%3D)
But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---

clean_body: This is the situation I’m caught in: Friend, Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to JAIL me for the rest of my life. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. As it stands, I’m simply out of options. Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn. Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! The Democrats’ cronies even STRIPPED me of my law licenses! Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for state-level charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance was to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford! Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

body:
These are three of the open U.S. Senate seats we need Democrats to WIN in 2026. Will you help us do it?
#

**If you’re ready to help us flip the Senate in 2026, please consider making a donation of $15 or more right now.** **[MAKE A DONATION HERE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94522?refcode=em20250906-9384&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9384%2E614464%2E8LWbq0)** If you want to know more before chipping in, please keep reading to learn about THREE of the open U.S. Senate seats we need Democrats to WIN in 2026.
---

**— IOWA —** Iowa’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Republican Joni Ernst, who recently announced her intent to retire. Earlier this summer, Cook Political Report UPGRADED Iowa’s U.S. Senate race TOWARD Democrats. This is one of our TOP opportunities to expand the Senate map — and your support today could help us build on the incredible momentum we’re already seeing in Iowa. **[FLIP IOWA: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94522?refcode=em20250906-9384&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9384%2E614464%2E8LWbq0)**
---

**— MICHIGAN —** Michigan’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Democrat Gary Peters, who announced his intent to retire earlier this year. This is the only OPEN U.S. Senate seat held by a Democrat that Cook Political Report currently rates as a TOSS UP. Your support today could help us defend this seat in what will inevitably be one of the nation’s top battlegrounds in 2026. **[DEFEND MICHIGAN: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94522?refcode=em20250906-9384&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9384%2E614464%2E8LWbq0)**
---

**— NORTH CAROLINA —** North Carolina’s U.S. Senate seat is currently held by Republican Thom Tillis, who recently announced his intent to retire. This is the only OPEN U.S. Senate seat held by a Republican that Cook Political Report currently rates as a TOSS UP. We know this will be one of the most expensive elections next year — and we’re urgently counting on your help to stay prepared for the fight ahead. **[FLIP NORTH CAROLINA: CHIP IN](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94522?refcode=em20250906-9384&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9384%2E614464%2E8LWbq0)**

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114744976/568013000/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250906_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzk3YmI3ZjQtNGQ4Yi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f5VHhzSwR5ns3mXIzTbD28xuKDljgPttiCI_von9zPo=)
---
Team —

The GOP’s audacity knows no limits.

Arizona Republican Rep. David Schweikert just called concerns about 194,000 Arizonans losing Medicaid coverage "whining and bedwetting."

**That's right — Schweikert thinks it's "whining" when Arizona families worry about losing their health insurance, while defending tax cuts for billionaires. Need we say more?** | [PITCH IN TO FLIP AZ-01 BLUE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114744977/568013001/1948356670?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250906_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzk3YmI3ZjQtNGQ4Yi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f5VHhzSwR5ns3mXIzTbD28xuKDljgPttiCI_von9zPo=)
---
Let's be clear about what he’s defending:
* **194,000 Arizonans** projected to lose Medicaid coverage
* **1 in 5 people in his own district** depend on Medicaid — 12,601 of whom would lose coverage
* **More than 55% of Arizona hospitals** forced to operate in the red, risking closures across the state
* **$33.1 billion** slashed from Arizona's healthcare spending

But wait, it gets worse.

In the same breath, Schweikert called for cuts to Medicare — a program that nearly 1.5 million Arizonans rely on. **He mocked his own colleagues for being afraid to cut Medicare, saying "you've got to go there."**

This is the same David Schweikert who refuses to show up to town halls, backs out of debates at the last minute, and won't face the people he's sworn to serve.

**[Will you pitch in right now to help us flip AZ-01 blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114744978/568013002/548103770?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250906_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzk3YmI3ZjQtNGQ4Yi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f5VHhzSwR5ns3mXIzTbD28xuKDljgPttiCI_von9zPo=)**

All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and **without gas, fumes or noise**. name: Seth Magaziner
subject: working people need an advocate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=h31K1NmodxqCsYvPNYrNojrNTXDTAmoPYnD%2FeEQsSVfNXQNRkGawr2%2FMe3W1bVlbUmAEGKvC8LmraeppL4JRTkVfgQTDi4SSOVFHJz78KlzB4Aa39kmWG6WYGZmCIEa1ASz8GodWIxHI0ncO2fo3uoL4f%2BTl9zn%2F7BNZjQ84wcR8Kz%2FWifIHPi4%2BAc4T9B44br03hf6WJ5Caf0IE5860%2Faqc6qDVIEus1%2FsqLeEOLkAKIHNsx0CUjBL42y1Za12AvIlw5ziownn5bqUgWlYJgXCZdGadO5VCGePuWEdIukGOqa%2BmdefV%2B5LgRYazhEKfXerhXpPiAB9Ts1jyv8wUDKh8MD0Q0%2FfsyMutpLBRG7bvt3VMywDQjmWBVzvmU6Iv%2FvAv9FIXy%2FfqeWPiqEcJkMDIv8dyUwP8sGiN9RiLlKYffuwobH%2FEbOsiykX9zBds)
---
| |
---
Peter,

Working people built Rhode Island and our country, and people who work hard for a living deserve an advocate in Congress.

Anyone who works a full-time job deserves paid vacation – to run errands, take care of a loved one, or simply take a well-earned break. But right now, America is the only developed country that does not guarantee vacation time for workers.

**That’s why I’ve reintroduced my PTO Act, so all full time workers are guaranteed two weeks of paid leave every year.**

I am fighting every day in Congress to protect our workers, including paid vacation time, fair wages and work conditions. [And now, I need your help. name: Sarah McBride
subject: hell no
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
This is important.
#
**This is important:**
Last month, Donald Trump took control of the local police in D.C. and deployed the National Guard. Now, he’s escalating his plans to do the same in other major cities across our country.
**We’re watching in real time the politicization of our military to consolidate power and intimidate political opponents. It’s dystopian and dangerous.**
Trump’s plans will undermine public safety and erode trust. And as Delawareans know all too well from the year-long occupation of Wilmington in the late 1960s, the painful scars can last for generations.
**I won’t sit back as Donald Trump abuses his power.**
That’s why I joined as an original co-sponsor of the _SUN Act_ , legislation that ensures accountability and transparency anytime the National Guard is deployed in our streets. It’s why I’m continuing to speak out and sound the alarm. And it’s why I’m doing everything I can to help take back the House next year and deliver a real check on this president.
[**If you’re with me in saying HELL NO to dictatorship in America, chip in $5 to help me keep up the fight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250906-1?refcode=em20250906-2321&amount=5&refcode2=2321_21716_K21zzc&akid=2321%2E21716%2EK21zzc)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250906-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250906-2321&refcode2=2321_21716_K21zzc&akid=2321%2E21716%2EK21zzc)**
In solidarity,
Sarah McBride

name: Donald John Trump
subject: I want to try and get to Heaven.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
I believe He saved me for a reason, and this is why I think He did it!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
Friend,
**I want to try and get to Heaven.**
Last year I came millimeters from death when that bullet pierced through my skin. My triumphant return to the White House was never supposed to happen!
But I believe that God saved me for one reason: **TO MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**
I wasn’t supposed to beat Crooked Hillary in 2016 — but I did.
I wasn’t supposed to secure the border & build the greatest economy in history — but I did.
I certainly wasn’t supposed to survive an assassin’s bullet — but by the grace of the almighty God, I did.
SO NOW, I have no other choice but to answer the Call to Duty, but I can’t do it alone.
Friend, you’ve been with me through everything.
You were there when they launched: the Russia Hoax, the first Impeachment, the second Impeachment, the rigged 2020 election, the Raid on Mar-a-Lago, the Arrest and Mugshot at the Fulton County Jail, the Removal from the CO ballot, the sham cases in DC / FL / NY / DC, the first Assassination attempt, the second Assassination attempt, and so much more!
Just because I won in a HISTORIC landslide and have unleashed the Golden Age of America, **THAT DOESN’T MEAN WE CAN TAKE OUR FOOT OFF THE GAS!**
The forces that hate our country don’t want a secure border or safe cities or high paying jobs. The Radical Left Lunatics want to STOP MAGA, but we’re not going to let them NO MATTER WHAT.
**Let me make this SOLEMN PLEDGE to you: I WILL NEVER SURRENDER!**
I put my life on the line willingly because this is what I was made to do, but our movement, the beautiful MAGA movement, is powered by YOU.
Every time they count us out – count YOU out – we come back bigger, better, and stronger than ever before.
This is our moment to show the world that we will NEVER back down, NEVER give an inch, and NEVER SURRENDER in our fight to save this country.
_That’s why I’ve launched a 24 HOUR TRUMP FUNDRAISING BLITZ, and I’m asking everyone to chip in $15 to make it one for the record books!_
**_[So if you’re with me all the way to the end, join with MILLIONS of your fellow PATRIOTS by chipping in $15 to keep the wins rolling in!>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
[GIVE $15](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Sincerely,
Donald John Trump

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

name: Tobias Read
subject: RESPONSE REQUESTED: Ban phones in public schools?
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250906em-ob2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250906em-ob2]
As Oregon’s Secretary of State and a member of the State Board of Education, I take our state’s K-12 education system extremely seriously.
As parents and educators become increasingly aware of the impact of social media and cell phone usage on students, conversations about the potential need to ban cell phone use in schools have gained momentum.
That’s why I’m reaching out today. I wanted to get your input on this critical question for the future of education and the raising of our kids. Your input is very important to me.
So let me know: Do YOU support banning cell phones in public schools? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
ANSWER NOW >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
The work to build a world-class education system for Oregon’s kids is never done.
There will always be more for us to do when it comes to building a public school system Oregon can be proud of — and I’m ready to dig in.
However, with such divisive questions facing our state over the next few years, I wanted to solicit your input on some of the most pressing issues.
So please, spare just a few seconds to let me know where you stand on the issue of cell phones in the classroom. Do you support banning them from our schools? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
ANSWER NOW >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]

# **[Congresswoman Comments Gets Strong Response Following Report](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Rep. Yassamin Ansari (D-AZ) has managed to spark a political firestorm — not just over immigration policy, but over the very definition of who a member of Congress represents. name: Lt. Gov. Austin Davis
subject: How Trump is spending his time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Austin Davis
body:
Not even a year into his second term, Trump is taking an axe to the guardrails of our Democracy.

Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XrGKMtCcbE2djJaqLq6C9g2?unsubscribedata=BPDtn%2BgspV8WAoBwpa7DsvgsZdviX02IEOKnOsrfcDO4eLDEs%2FV%2BeV91yl0NQjdNS1bYH%2B9PURsOJQ6nEqN%2FGrQnbgixtfi%2B6wRgs5mnMKdYe5YLohKc5UjqyUpxVzTkTu5Zpz8X81xv14TXsbY71hXAaXnuSAWxD6qRVxzymNJVofG4ZQ46plm1lXolrxASwhAp5dk58oSSrJT9q0T7SNhyZHxFQV9j7qv%2Bmvwjq9ahSDUD6ayFoVMY01EZslRRnlBvyzg9dvxkN1smqlBGk2AfrrOUDsGZfN%2Ba9lF3X%2FJ3ZqFRxTobNG%2BeDpEU8MATGXkgfgLR2%2B78MZcc5D5F7Jz19LBy6Od0l8hFqwDYvzNvnQt%2FgC5pudZWqWaUaPzbpNYzpI58MQofvj2PLZCX6LhrPIX%2BA68iJE0wMm%2FVIa2tFrqojU6WPzIyB72SPtha)

| | Peter, it's Lieutenant Governor Austin Davis with an important update. **Not even a year into his second term, Trump is taking an axe to the guardrails of our Democracy.** **→ FIRST** Trump met with Putin in Alaska and abandoned our allies in Ukraine (yet again) by failing to negotiate a deal that would bring peace to the region. **→ THEN** He aligned himself with Putin in a terrifying new way: citing his stance against absentee voting as a reason for why Trump should sign an executive order abolishing it. Talk about a blatant act of voter suppression. **→ NOW** He's suggesting that it would be a good thing "if we happen to be in a war with somebody" during our next election cycle, because it would mean he could stay in power by delaying a vote. Our president is spending his time in the Oval Office bullying our allies, jeopardizing international security, and doing everything he can to hold onto his power, _regardless of the will of the people._ We have to stand firm in our fight against his authoritarian behavior. We cannot allow it to continue unchecked. **[If you're with me, pitch in today so we can keep fighting back!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114746482/568017909/1445643945?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_090625_PUTIN_30DO60DD30NTL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDM0YzU5Ny01NzhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9OojVxuwCB97yBDxN9temep4suGFf_YBokaZSepfm3Y=)** | | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114746483/568017910/410908810?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_090625_PUTIN_30DO60DD30NTL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDM0YzU5Ny01NzhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9OojVxuwCB97yBDxN9temep4suGFf_YBokaZSepfm3Y=)**

**I'm laser-focused on delivering real results in PA,** but I've attracted major attention from national Republicans for continuing to stand up to Trump.
Republican politicians and their mega-donors know that Pennsylvania will decide the fate of the 2026 election, and it's up to us to be ready for outside money to pour into the state.
**[Republicans are already organizing to take me down with their megadonors, Peter, so I need your help. Can you pitch in any amount now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114746484/568017911/1445643945?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_090625_PUTIN_30DO60DD30NTL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDM0YzU5Ny01NzhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9OojVxuwCB97yBDxN9temep4suGFf_YBokaZSepfm3Y=)**

Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, it's Lieutenant Governor Austin Davis with an important update. Not even a year into his second term, Trump is taking an axe to the guardrails of our Democracy. → FIRST Trump met with Putin in Alaska and abandoned our allies in Ukraine (yet again) by failing to negotiate a deal that would bring peace to the region. → THEN He aligned himself with Putin in a terrifying new way: citing his stance against absentee voting as a reason for why Trump should sign an executive order abolishing it. Talk about a blatant act of voter suppression. → NOW He's suggesting that it would be a good thing "if we happen to be in a war with somebody" during our next election cycle, because it would mean he could stay in power by delaying a vote. Our president is spending his time in the Oval Office bullying our allies, jeopardizing international security, and doing everything he can to hold onto his power, regardless of the will of the people. We have to stand firm in our fight against his authoritarian behavior. We cannot allow it to continue unchecked. = | | = I'm laser-focused on delivering real results in PA, but I've attracted major attention from national Republicans for continuing to stand up to Trump. Republican politicians and their mega-donors know that Pennsylvania will decide the fate of the 2026 election, and it's up to us to be ready for outside money to pour into the state. = **If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | **=** | **=** | **=** | **=** | **=** | **=** Thank you, Peter. = Lt. name: Josh Turek
subject: rewind the tape
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Hey team, it’s Josh Turek checking in. I’m the Democrat in the race for Iowa’s U.S. Senate seat, which could decide Senate control. There’s no denying this race is CRITICAL, so before I tell you a little about my background and how it brought me into this race, **I’m personally asking you to consider splitting a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton today. No donation is too small to have an impact.** _Let’s rewind the tape:_ I was born in ‘79 in Council Bluffs, Iowa and diagnosed with spina bifida caused by my dad’s exposure to Agent Orange in Vietnam. I had 21 surgeries before the age of 12. I grew up with the wrong color lunch ticket at school, wearing Goodwill hand-me-downs. I come from a big, close-knit family. But even still, life as a small-town, working-class disabled kid in the ‘80s wasn’t all peaches and cream. I was bullied so badly I had to leave public school in sixth grade. I was an isolated kid with a chip on his shoulder. One summer, an adaptive sports camp across the river in Omaha introduced me to wheelchair basketball. Suddenly, I had a purpose. I played throughout high school and college. I even went pro overseas for several years, where I met my wife, Jarolin. I competed in four Paralympics and took home two gold medals and one bronze for Team USA. After I retired from wheelchair basketball, I won my first election for Iowa State Rep by just 6 votes, in a solid-red Trump district no one thought I’d win. Fast forward to now and I’m proudly representing Council Bluffs and Carter Lake at the Iowa State Capitol. But when Joni Ernst replied to a constituent worried about Medicaid cuts with the infamous line: “Well, we all are going to die,” I knew I had to get in the game. Then, she voted to cut Medicaid coverage for millions of Americans and over 100,000 Iowans, _**and I was all in and ready to replace her.**_ **I’m in this Senate race to give Iowans a shot at building a life, a family, and a legacy they’re proud of. I’ll be a Senator they respect, who respects them in return.** That’s the part we’ll achieve in the U.S. Senate (Step 2). First, we need to get started on Step 1: **winning one of the most-watched, must-win races in the country.** [**Folks, every vote and every dollar counts to help us build out the team and ground game to win in Iowa. So please, don’t sit on the sidelines. Will you split a $10 donation between my battleground Senate campaign and Seth Moulton today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114746560/568018161/1609644847?refcode=250906_Turek_MFC_Rewind&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODMzZjEyYi01NzhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=miAfoqjchd_sXJG_0udTBRejtUtyAfRx8Cvq_XC_qPE=) | | [**$18 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114746561/568018162/858557679?amount=18&refcode=250906_Turek_MFC_Rewind&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODMzZjEyYi01NzhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=miAfoqjchd_sXJG_0udTBRejtUtyAfRx8Cvq_XC_qPE= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

clean_body: | Hey team, it’s Josh Turek checking in. I’m the Democrat in the race for Iowa’s U.S. Senate seat, which could decide Senate control. There’s no denying this race is CRITICAL, so before I tell you a little about my background and how it brought me into this race, I’m personally asking you to consider splitting a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton today. No donation is too small to have an impact. Let’s rewind the tape: I was born in ‘79 in Council Bluffs, Iowa and diagnosed with spina bifida caused by my dad’s exposure to Agent Orange in Vietnam. I had 21 surgeries before the age of 12. I grew up with the wrong color lunch ticket at school, wearing Goodwill hand-me-downs. I come from a big, close-knit family. But even still, life as a small-town, working-class disabled kid in the ‘80s wasn’t all peaches and cream. I was bullied so badly I had to leave public school in sixth grade. I was an isolated kid with a chip on his shoulder. One summer, an adaptive sports camp across the river in Omaha introduced me to wheelchair basketball. Suddenly, I had a purpose. I played throughout high school and college. I even went pro overseas for several years, where I met my wife, Jarolin. I competed in four Paralympics and took home two gold medals and one bronze for Team USA. After I retired from wheelchair basketball, I won my first election for Iowa State Rep by just 6 votes, in a solid-red Trump district no one thought I’d win. Fast forward to now and I’m proudly representing Council Bluffs and Carter Lake at the Iowa State Capitol. But when Joni Ernst replied to a constituent worried about Medicaid cuts with the infamous line: “Well, we all are going to die,” I knew I had to get in the game. Then, she voted to cut Medicaid coverage for millions of Americans and over 100,000 Iowans, and I was all in and ready to replace her. I’m in this Senate race to give Iowans a shot at building a life, a family, and a legacy they’re proud of. I’ll be a Senator they respect, who respects them in return. That’s the part we’ll achieve in the U.S. Senate (Step 2). First, we need to get started on Step 1: winning one of the most-watched, must-win races in the country. = | | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" I’m deeply grateful you’re in this fight with me. Together, Josh Turek = = [content goes here] Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: The conditions inside ICE facilities are horrific
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
Dehumanizing conditions are a stain on our humanity. |
---
Peter, Last weekend, I visited with the detainees being held at ICE’s Eloy Detention Center. **The conditions were horrific.** I spoke with dozens of people who came to this country seeking asylum and looked to the U.S. as a place of refuge. A woman who is fighting leukemia hasn’t had proper access to the medical treatment she requires, and is coughing up blood and has lost over 50 pounds due to the medical neglect. The people within the detention center don’t have access to quality water — the water they’ve been given has chlorine in it and is causing reactions all over their bodies. They told me of the used underwear they’re forced to wear, causing rampant UTIs. They’ve told me of the racist and retaliatory treatment they’ve received, just for speaking with me on these oversight visits. **These conditions are dehumanizing and are a stain on our society. I refuse to let this continue, but I need your support in this fight. [Pitch in today to stand with us as we push back against this authoritarian administration.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114746582/568018241/1289792659?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250906_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTM4NTRiNS01ODhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bovmvt0ZTjPM_-Sd3UHqaM1wALVdNnmljdKswsv0ozE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114746584/568018243/1289792659?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250906_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTM4NTRiNS01ODhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bovmvt0ZTjPM_-Sd3UHqaM1wALVdNnmljdKswsv0ozE=)

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: RFK Jr. must go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Friend, where are the actions that are Making America Healthy Again?

I’m seriously asking — because what we’ve seen so far is nothing short of dangerous:

* Rollbacks on cancer and disease research.
* The removal of actual medical professionals from federal health agencies.
* Limits on testing for food-borne illnesses that put families at risk.

This isn’t a plan for health. This is sabotage.

“MAHA” is a threat to the health and safety of every American. And at the center of it is Robert F. Kennedy Jr., whose reckless leadership is undermining science, eroding trust, and leaving our communities more vulnerable to disease and preventable illness.

We cannot let this happen. Public health should be guided by science and expertise — not politics, conspiracy theories, or dangerous neglect.

That’s why I’m calling for Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to be removed now.

But to get there, we need a movement of people willing to push back against this reckless agenda and fight for leaders who will protect our families, not put them at risk.

SAY NO TO MAHA » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2025-FR-September?&refcode=E15081-20250906-PublicHealth-SB-GOP&amount=10]

The stakes could not be higher. Lives are on the line — and silence is not an option.

Let’s fight for real public health, together.

- Eric
DONATE TO ERIC » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-aug2025-fr-august?refcode=E15081-20250906-PublicHealth-footer-Trump&amount=25]

**** Dear Defender of Truth, Women shouldn't have to share locker rooms with men. They shouldn't have to compete against male athletes. And they shouldn't be punished for speaking the truth.

But across America, that's exactly what's happening.

Men are being allowed to compete in women's sports--robbing girls of scholarships, medals, titles, and safety.

Now, for the first time in history, the U.S. Supreme Court has agreed to hear two cases--_State of West Virginia v. B.P.J._ and _Little v. Hecox_ --that could decide the future of women's sports nationwide.

This could be a watershed moment in the fight to protect biological reality and fairness.

If you believe women's sports should be reserved for women, we need your voice today.

clean_body: Women shouldn’t have to share locker rooms with men. | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | ** Dear Defender of Truth, Women shouldn't have to share locker rooms with men. They shouldn't have to compete against male athletes. And they shouldn't be punished for speaking the truth. But across America, that's exactly what's happening. Men are being allowed to compete in women's sports--robbing girls of scholarships, medals, titles, and safety. Now, for the first time in history, the U.S. Supreme Court has agreed to hear two cases--State of West Virginia v. B.P.J. and Little v. Hecox --that could decide the future of women's sports nationwide. This could be a watershed moment in the fight to protect biological reality and fairness. If you believe women's sports should be reserved for women, we need your voice today. Your signature will say clearly: ✅ Men should not be allowed to compete on women's teams ✅ Women deserve privacy, fairness, and safety ✅ Radical gender ideology must not ignore biological truth After you sign, you'll be taken to the next critical step... Make a gift to support female athletes like Lainey Armistead, a courageous former college soccer player who is helping defend her state's Save Women's Sports Act in court. Your gift of any amount will help Alliance Defending Freedom stand strong at the Supreme Court--at no cost to our clients. 🚨 We've won 16 cases at the Supreme Court since 2011. With your help, and God's blessing, we can win again. Please add your name now--and then take the next bold step to protect women's sports with a generous gift. Together, we can ensure every girl has a fair opportunity to play--and win--on a level playing field. Thank you for standing for truth. With gratitude, Suzanne Beecher** Legal Counsel Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

# _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9e915e97-02af-4348-9cbf-bc01b2c9bd08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In America, we often celebrate sports as the great equalizer--a domain where talent and determination trump background and circumstance. Yet beneath the inspiring stories of athletic achievement lies a blunt truth: sports participation and viewership serve as some of our most reliable markers of social class.
From childhood through adulthood, one's socioeconomic status determines not just which sports are accessible, but which athletic cultures feel welcoming and familiar. The games we play, the athletes we follow, and even the way we consume athletic entertainment reveal the invisible lines drawn across American society.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVjYXBpdGFsaXN0bWFnLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.Fjnq3VeydLUQ3tOU-0seSCG89am5RLOf363Y16Z6StY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=172826346)
## The Equipment Barrier: Hockey, Football, and Baseball's Middle-Class Gateway
The all-American pastimes of football, baseball, and hockey demonstrate how equipment costs and cultural expectations create middle-class sporting territories. Youth hockey demands thousands of dollars in gear, ice time, and travel expenses, effectively pricing out lower income families while becoming a suburban status symbol. Football, despite its working-class image, increasingly requires expensive summer camps, private coaching, and specialized training to reach competitive levels.
Baseball presents another example, where specialized coaching and equipment are necessary and one's area code can largely determine a young athlete's exposure to the sport. Once genuinely accessible to urban working-class children who played stickball in the streets, modern baseball has evolved into a game for the moderately wealthy. Travel teams, hitting instructors, specialized academies, superior premium bats and year-round training cycles have made competitive entry costs exclusive to many.

_**(Piece continues)**_
## Elite Athletic Territories: Sports for Blue Bloods
At the apex of class-based sporting segregation sit activities like lacrosse, golf, polo, tennis, and equestrian sports. These pursuits require not just significant financial investment, but cultural capital that spans generations. Golf courses and tennis clubs serve as networking venues where business relationships flourish alongside athletic competition. Young people don't simply learn these sports--they're socialized into upper-class customs, etiquette, and social expectations via participation in the sport.
Despite growing popularity, lacrosse remains concentrated in affluent suburbs and elite private schools in the north-eastern United States.
Horse riding and polo represent the extreme end of class-based sport, where participation costs can reach tens of thousands annually. These activities don't just exclude based on price--they exist within social ecosystems that assume inherited wealth, country estate access, and generations of cultural familiarity.
Viewership of these elite sports remains similarly segregated. Tennis and golf broadcasts target affluent audiences through luxury marketing and commentary that assumes knowledge of high class culture. The social aspects often receive as much attention as athletic performance, reinforcing these sports' roles as upper-class social spaces.
## Swimming:
Consider swimming, often lauded as the perfect full-body exercise and a essential life skill. For middle-class families, swimming represents healthy recreation, competitive opportunity, and college scholarship potential. Suburban communities invest heavily in aquatic centers, country clubs feature pristine pools, and middle-class parents readily enroll children in swim lessons and club teams.
Yet for working-class and lower-income families, particularly those in urban areas or regions far from natural bodies of water, swimming remains largely inaccessible. Public pools, where they exist, are often overcrowded and offer limited instructional programs. Private lessons can cost hundreds of dollars monthly--money that working families cannot spare when rent, food, and basic necessities take priority. The result is a stark divide: swimming and water sports become culturally and practically foreign to entire segments of the population, while serving as natural stepping stones for middle-class children into competitive athletics and lifelong fitness habits.

## Working-Class Athletic Culture: Boxing and Soccer's Accessibility
At the other end of the spectrum, boxing and soccer are examples of sports which have largely remained in the working-class sphere. Boxing gyms in urban neighborhoods provide free or low-cost, yet high quality training, requiring minimal equipment while offering pathways for personal development and potential professional success. The sport's culture celebrates toughness, determination, and respect for hard work--values that resonate strongly with working-class communities. The dangerous realities of sports like boxing and Mixed Martial Arts seem to keep elites and suburbanites with wary parents away, as the risk of head trauma or other injuries is unappealing to many.
Soccer's global popularity stems partly from its democratic nature: all that's needed is a ball and open space. In immigrant communities and working-class neighborhoods, soccer provides cultural connection and community building without significant financial barriers. Youth soccer leagues often operate on volunteer efforts and modest fees, making the sport accessible to families across economic circumstances.
## Following the Money: How Advertising Reveals Class Divide in Sports
Perhaps nowhere is sport's class stratification more visible and confirmed than in advertising. Luxury brands align themselves with upper-class sports with surgical precision, understanding that their target demographics overlap with these activities' participant and viewer bases.
Rolex partners with elite golf events and tennis championships where its wealthy customer base expects to see premium timepieces. Mercedes-Benz sponsors equestrian competitions and high-end golf tournaments, while luxury airlines advertise during broadcasts of polo matches and yacht racing. Private banking firms and wealth management companies pour marketing dollars into sports where affluent audiences naturally congregate.
These sponsorship decisions aren't coincidental. They reflect sophisticated market research showing that upper-class sports deliver precisely the demographics that luxury brands seek. The advertising reinforces these sports' elite character while making clear that certain athletic spaces are designed for those with substantial disposable income.
Middle-class sports attract corresponding sponsor profiles. Baseball and Football broadcasts feature home improvement retailers, mid-range restaurants, and automotive brands targeting suburban households.
Working-class sports tell their own advertising story. Boxing matches are sponsored by energy drinks, fast-food chains, and affordable consumer products. The messaging emphasizes value, accessibility, and brands that working-class audiences actually purchase, rather than aspirational luxury goods.

## Beyond the Game
Understanding sport's relationship to social class matters because athletics play such a significant role in American identity formation, educational opportunity, and social mobility.
It's obvious all sports should work to make themselves accessible to a broad range of Americans so to recruit and train the best athletes, regardless of social class background, while retaining the attributes and cultures that make them what they are.
Sports serve as a mirror of American society's hierarchy in a way most of us miss while watching the game, driving our kids to practice, or taking the field ourselves.
