clean_body: From childhood through adulthood, one's socioeconomic status determines not just which sports are accessible, but which athletic cultures feel welcoming and familiar... | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? From childhood through adulthood, one's socioeconomic status determines not just which sports are accessible, but which athletic cultures feel welcoming and familiar... | | | Sep 6 | | | | | | | | | | | | Opinion: | | ---|---|--- In America, we often celebrate sports as the great equalizer--a domain where talent and determination trump background and circumstance. Yet beneath the inspiring stories of athletic achievement lies a blunt truth: sports participation and viewership serve as some of our most reliable markers of social class. From childhood through adulthood, one's socioeconomic status determines not just which sports are accessible, but which athletic cultures feel welcoming and familiar. The games we play, the athletes we follow, and even the way we consume athletic entertainment reveal the invisible lines drawn across American society. The Equipment Barrier: Hockey, Football, and Baseball's Middle-Class Gateway The all-American pastimes of football, baseball, and hockey demonstrate how equipment costs and cultural expectations create middle-class sporting territories. Youth hockey demands thousands of dollars in gear, ice time, and travel expenses, effectively pricing out lower income families while becoming a suburban status symbol. Football, despite its working-class image, increasingly requires expensive summer camps, private coaching, and specialized training to reach competitive levels. Baseball presents another example, where specialized coaching and equipment are necessary and one's area code can largely determine a young athlete's exposure to the sport. Once genuinely accessible to urban working-class children who played stickball in the streets, modern baseball has evolved into a game for the moderately wealthy. Travel teams, hitting instructors, specialized academies, superior premium bats and year-round training cycles have made competitive entry costs exclusive to many. A message from our sponsor (Piece continues below) | | ---|---|--- If you've been watching the headlines, you already know - the threat of food shortages, blackouts, and supply chain failures is more real than ever. That's why our 4Patriots have been flying off the shelves, selling out time and time again. People are waking up to the truth - you can't count on the system anymore. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. And yes, you'll get 9 additional FREE BONUSES as our thank you. (Piece continues) Elite Athletic Territories: Sports for Blue Bloods At the apex of class-based sporting segregation sit activities like lacrosse, golf, polo, tennis, and equestrian sports. These pursuits require not just significant financial investment, but cultural capital that spans generations. Golf courses and tennis clubs serve as networking venues where business relationships flourish alongside athletic competition. Young people don't simply learn these sports--they're socialized into upper-class customs, etiquette, and social expectations via participation in the sport. Despite growing popularity, lacrosse remains concentrated in affluent suburbs and elite private schools in the north-eastern United States. Horse riding and polo represent the extreme end of class-based sport, where participation costs can reach tens of thousands annually. These activities don't just exclude based on price--they exist within social ecosystems that assume inherited wealth, country estate access, and generations of cultural familiarity. Viewership of these elite sports remains similarly segregated. Tennis and golf broadcasts target affluent audiences through luxury marketing and commentary that assumes knowledge of high class culture. The social aspects often receive as much attention as athletic performance, reinforcing these sports' roles as upper-class social spaces. Swimming: Consider swimming, often lauded as the perfect full-body exercise and a essential life skill. For middle-class families, swimming represents healthy recreation, competitive opportunity, and college scholarship potential. Suburban communities invest heavily in aquatic centers, country clubs feature pristine pools, and middle-class parents readily enroll children in swim lessons and club teams. Yet for working-class and lower-income families, particularly those in urban areas or regions far from natural bodies of water, swimming remains largely inaccessible. Public pools, where they exist, are often overcrowded and offer limited instructional programs. Private lessons can cost hundreds of dollars monthly--money that working families cannot spare when rent, food, and basic necessities take priority. The result is a stark divide: swimming and water sports become culturally and practically foreign to entire segments of the population, while serving as natural stepping stones for middle-class children into competitive athletics and lifelong fitness habits. The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support our work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. Working-Class Athletic Culture: Boxing and Soccer's Accessibility At the other end of the spectrum, boxing and soccer are examples of sports which have largely remained in the working-class sphere. Boxing gyms in urban neighborhoods provide free or low-cost, yet high quality training, requiring minimal equipment while offering pathways for personal development and potential professional success. The sport's culture celebrates toughness, determination, and respect for hard work--values that resonate strongly with working-class communities. The dangerous realities of sports like boxing and Mixed Martial Arts seem to keep elites and suburbanites with wary parents away, as the risk of head trauma or other injuries is unappealing to many. Soccer's global popularity stems partly from its democratic nature: all that's needed is a ball and open space. In immigrant communities and working-class neighborhoods, soccer provides cultural connection and community building without significant financial barriers. Youth soccer leagues often operate on volunteer efforts and modest fees, making the sport accessible to families across economic circumstances. Following the Money: How Advertising Reveals Class Divide in Sports Perhaps nowhere is sport's class stratification more visible and confirmed than in advertising. Luxury brands align themselves with upper-class sports with surgical precision, understanding that their target demographics overlap with these activities' participant and viewer bases. Rolex partners with elite golf events and tennis championships where its wealthy customer base expects to see premium timepieces. Mercedes-Benz sponsors equestrian competitions and high-end golf tournaments, while luxury airlines advertise during broadcasts of polo matches and yacht racing. Private banking firms and wealth management companies pour marketing dollars into sports where affluent audiences naturally congregate. These sponsorship decisions aren't coincidental. They reflect sophisticated market research showing that upper-class sports deliver precisely the demographics that luxury brands seek. The advertising reinforces these sports' elite character while making clear that certain athletic spaces are designed for those with substantial disposable income. Middle-class sports attract corresponding sponsor profiles. Baseball and Football broadcasts feature home improvement retailers, mid-range restaurants, and automotive brands targeting suburban households. Working-class sports tell their own advertising story. Boxing matches are sponsored by energy drinks, fast-food chains, and affordable consumer products. The messaging emphasizes value, accessibility, and brands that working-class audiences actually purchase, rather than aspirational luxury goods. The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support our work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. Beyond the Game Understanding sport's relationship to social class matters because athletics play such a significant role in American identity formation, educational opportunity, and social mobility. It's obvious all sports should work to make themselves accessible to a broad range of Americans so to recruit and train the best athletes, regardless of social class background, while retaining the attributes and cultures that make them what they are. Sports serve as a mirror of American society's hierarchy in a way most of us miss while watching the game, driving our kids to practice, or taking the field ourselves. * You're currently a free subscriber to . name: Rob Bonta
subject: No kings, no tyrants
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250906&t=1001&akid=1939%2E1088799%2EdBOAaF ]Rob Bonta

I wanted to
reach out with a personal note, because I know it’s a challenging time for
so many across California and America.

This year we’ve watched a President who has openly admired dictators
repeatedly push the boundaries of his power and brazenly disregard the
rule of law.

We’ve seen relentless attacks on our rights and freedoms. Many people feel
demoralized and frightened, and I understand.

But today I urge you not to feel hopeless, because we’re not helpless:
we’re fighting back.

Just this week, the court delivered a major victory in our fight against
Trump’s lawlessness — affirming that the use of military troops for
civilian law enforcement in California was a violation of the law.

And it’s not just lawsuits. It’s thousands of No Kings protests. It’s
neighbors talking to neighbors about what’s going on in our country. It’s
millions of Americans standing up to speak out against tyranny.

History has shown us that people power is the most potent power there is:
from the civil rights movement to the farm worker movement to the
restoration of democracy in countries around the world.

So long as we keep standing up and speaking out together, people will have
the first and the last word in the story of this state and this country —
period.

What’s more, our Constitution was built for a moment like this. It was
carefully designed to protect America against kings and tyrants — and as
Attorney General, I will do my part and remain resolute in my commitment
to defend the Constitution.

But I do need you by my side, because people power requires ALL of us. So
I’m asking you today to recommit yourself to this fight.

[ https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-250906/?t=1002&akid=1939%2E1088799%2EdBOAaF ]Add your name right now to say you’ll stand with me and with your
fellow Americans in the ongoing grassroots movement to defend our
freedoms, protect our rights, and demand justice.

ADD YOUR NAME

We have each other, and that’s a powerful thing.

Thanks for reading.

-Rob

[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/1075?t=1003&akid=1939%2E1088799%2EdBOAaF ][IMG]

Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1004&akid=1939%2E1088799%2EdBOAaF
Update Your Information: https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/
Unsubscribe: https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=1939%2E1088799%2EdBOAaF

c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
info@robbonta.com

subject: Republicans tried to censure and remove me for doing my job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
| Republican Rep. Clay Higgins tried to censure me—to shame me on the House floor and strip me of my committee—all for doing my job.

And, you know what, he _FAILED._

I stood my ground. And we showed Republicans that when we stand together, we stand strong.

This is a victory, but the fight isn’t over. Not by a long shot. | | [STAND WITH US](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114748036/568023438/226075250?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250905_FR_SplitMcIver_0_6MO_LaMonicaMcIver_NA_NA_split&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2U1OWIxZi02NzhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r3cvdOY-mdZad7GUVI-cbmPPwo5uYA8B24OSs78Yy4Y=)
---
They will keep trying to silence me and attack me—**they have literally charged me with crimes for doing my job.** And I will keep standing up and fighting back. Because I know what’s right.

It’s not lost on me that Republicans tried to throw me off of the committee charged with doing oversight of DHS—all for doing oversight of DHS. But this is about more than me. It is about how far the Republican Party will put themselves out on a limb to serve Donald Trump and his cruel agenda.

They tried to shame me. They failed, and they will keep failing because I won’t fold. Not now, not ever.

But I need you with me RIGHT NOW. This is just the beginning of the work we have ahead.

**_[We were able to fight back this time, but we know that the Trump administration won’t stop trying to punish me for doing my job to hold them accountable.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114748037/568023439/226075250?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250905_FR_SplitMcIver_0_6MO_LaMonicaMcIver_NA_NA_split&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2U1OWIxZi02NzhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r3cvdOY-mdZad7GUVI-cbmPPwo5uYA8B24OSs78Yy4Y=)_** That’s why they’re continuing on with their baseless legal battle and charges against me.

**_[They are taking me to court, and we need to amass the resources to mount a legal defense against this administration. name: Team Stevens
subject: Do you believe in protecting Social Security?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Republicans are openly floating plans to privatize Social Security – including Donald Trump’s own Treasury secretary.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=783%2E49239%2EzY06ZE)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5660?t=2&akid=783%2E49239%2EzY06ZE)
---
null, it's Team Haley Stevens here with a warning:

Republicans are openly floating plans to privatize Social Security – including Donald Trump’s own treasury secretary.
Here’s what privatization would mean:

📉 You’d hand your hard-earned Social Security to hedge funds.

🎯 They’d gamble your retirement on the stock market.

🔥 All so they can gut the system and sell it off.
It’s not a fix. It’s a cash grab for Wall Street.

But Haley Stevens has a different idea: _**How about we protect what working people have earned?** _
Haley will never stop fighting to protect retirement security for Michigan families. But we need your voice to help shape our fight:
**
[Will you take 60 seconds to fill out our Social Security survey now? We need 42 more responses from 18326 before midnight, so share your thoughts now.>>](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5661?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=783%2E49239%2EzY06ZE) **
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5661?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=783%2E49239%2EzY06ZE)
---
Thanks for standing with us,

Team Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. **Team, the alarm bells have _never rung louder:_**

**FIRST:** Donald Trump called the free press the "enemy of the people."

**THEN:** He declared that networks with opposing viewpoints should be _shut down_ \-- even saying MSNBC "shouldn't even have a right to broadcast."

** AND NOW: Trump's _never_ been closer to getting his wish. With the stroke of a pen, he cut over a BILLION DOLLARS in funding that supports NPR and PBS!**

_Your local station_ could be on the chopping block without this crucial support -- so it's up to ALL of us to fight back against the Republican senators who did this. We need YOU to sign on before our petition closes at midnight, so **please, this is _absolutely essential:_ **

body:
The rumors have been confirmed. Obama made the call.
| Peter,
---
Rumors were circulating that Obama was meddling behind the curtain in the New York City Mayor’s race in support of Zohran Mamdani – a communist who wants to abolish prisons and private property.
---
_Those rumors have now been confirmed by Mamdani himself._
---
**Obama called him to congratulate him and guide him to victory in an election nearly 2 months away.**
---
_In fact, the entire Obama Network has been quietly meeting with Mamdani._
---
Why? _Because they see Zohran Mamdani as the next Barack Obama_.
---
You may be inclined to brush this off as a problem for New York City alone...
---
_**...But knowing what you know now, would you have brushed off a similar warning about a relatively unknown community organizer from Chicago named Barack Obama?**_
---
If you could go back in time and stop Obama before his rise to power, would you?
---
As the most senior elected Republican in New York, I am making a _solemn pledge_ to you right now: I will fight with every fiber of my being to stop Mamdani and FIRE Governor Kathy Hochul who singlehandedly enabled his rise to power.
---
_That’s _my_ pledge. Now I’m entrusting _you_ with a 500% MATCH that I’ve authorized to fight back as the Obama Machine tries to install a communist mayor in the biggest city in America._
---

name: NDRC
subject: Republicans think they can take power away from voters. We won’t let them.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
This fight is happening now.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114748336/568024749/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwNWNiNWQzLTZjOGItZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=M9Ccd6_obrMTUhaiKBV8pvwvHE4AKUSIiTa9ZBDPyhk=&emci=ca317f42-938a-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=805cb5d3-6c8b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, The redistricting fight playing out right now in several states will have national implications for fair maps and representation. Here’s a rundown of how we got here and what’s at stake: _**FIRST**_ : The Trump White House demanded Texas conduct a mid-decade redraw to manipulate its congressional map — a brazen power grab to help Republicans hold on to power. _**THEN**_ : Texas Republicans did exactly that, passing a racially gerrymandered map that dilutes minority voting power and could flip five seats in the midterms. _**NOW**_ : The White House is ramping up pressure for more states to pass similar extreme gerrymanders, openly pressuring hesitant legislators in Indiana and Missouri to get in line and follow Texas’s lead. That’s on top of a redistricting process already underway in Ohio, which could wipe out three more Democratic seats. **Peter, we're looking at an all-out brawl. Republicans have launched an unprecedented attack on our democracy, and it’s going to require an extraordinary effort to fight back and win.** California is taking the fight directly to voters by asking them to approve a new, temporary map that will undo some of the damage done by Texas and other states. We’ll be mobilizing voters on the ground to make their voices heard. At the same time, the fair maps movement is challenging Texas’s racial gerrymander in court. Together, we’re pushing back on multiple fronts against this attempt to thwart the will of voters. But this is a tough fight that will require significant resources. clean_body: This fight is happening now. | Peter, The redistricting fight playing out right now in several states will have national implications for fair maps and representation. Here’s a rundown of how we got here and what’s at stake: FIRST : The Trump White House demanded Texas conduct a mid-decade redraw to manipulate its congressional map — a brazen power grab to help Republicans hold on to power. THEN : Texas Republicans did exactly that, passing a racially gerrymandered map that dilutes minority voting power and could flip five seats in the midterms. NOW : The White House is ramping up pressure for more states to pass similar extreme gerrymanders, openly pressuring hesitant legislators in Indiana and Missouri to get in line and follow Texas’s lead. That’s on top of a redistricting process already underway in Ohio, which could wipe out three more Democratic seats. Peter, we're looking at an all-out brawl. Republicans have launched an unprecedented attack on our democracy, and it’s going to require an extraordinary effort to fight back and win. California is taking the fight directly to voters by asking them to approve a new, temporary map that will undo some of the damage done by Texas and other states. We’ll be mobilizing voters on the ground to make their voices heard. At the same time, the fair maps movement is challenging Texas’s racial gerrymander in court. Together, we’re pushing back on multiple fronts against this attempt to thwart the will of voters. But this is a tough fight that will require significant resources. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks so much, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: My father just announced a new Census
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend, my father just made one of the most important announcements
of his presidency.
#
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/voter-verification-new-census-donjr-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama&utm_campaign=rw-donjrcensus_donjr_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20250904_TW-5L.117501_t1701453-575&utm_term=lrm-active]

JOE BIDEN AND RADICAL FAR-LEFT DEMOCRATS CONSPIRED TO RIG THE CENSUS
BY COUNTING THE MILLIONS OF ILLEGALS THAT THEY LET INTO AMERICA.
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/voter-verification-new-census-donjr-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama&utm_campaign=rw-donjrcensus_donjr_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20250904_TW-5L.117501_t1701453-575&utm_term=lrm-active]

Their goal? Use illegals to increase the population of deep-blue
sanctuary cities and states, therefore giving Democrats more seats in
Congress – and electoral votes – at the expense of American
citizens like YOU.

Conducting a full brand-new mid-decade census like this is
unprecedented...
_BUT DRASTIC TIMES CALL FOR DRASTIC MEASURES.
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/voter-verification-new-census-donjr-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama&utm_campaign=rw-donjrcensus_donjr_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20250904_TW-5L.117501_t1701453-575&utm_term=lrm-active]_

We cannot allow illegals to infiltrate the census and steal
representation away from honest, tax-paying American citizens for
another second.

But the first step we must take is to ensure that the GOP’s own
census records are accurate, up-to-date, and ONLY 100% fully verified
U.S. citizens.

That’s why I’m contacting you today...

As it stands, Senate GOP Leadership is waiting for YOU to verify your
voter records.

PLEASE DON’T WAIT – TAKE JUST A MOMENT TO PRIVATELY (DON’T LET
ANYONE VIEW YOUR SCREEN) VERIFY YOUR VOTER RECORDS SO WE CAN BE
CERTAIN THAT ONLY U.S. CITIZENS ARE BEING COUNTED IN OUR CENSUS.
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/voter-verification-new-census-donjr-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama&utm_campaign=rw-donjrcensus_donjr_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20250904_TW-5L.117501_t1701453-575&utm_term=lrm-active]
VERIFY YOUR RECORDS >>
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/voter-verification-new-census-donjr-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama&utm_campaign=rw-donjrcensus_donjr_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20250904_TW-5L.117501_t1701453-575&utm_term=lrm-active]

Thank you,
#
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/voter-verification-new-census-donjr-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama&utm_campaign=rw-donjrcensus_donjr_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20250904_TW-5L.117501_t1701453-575&utm_term=lrm-active]

name: Cliff Schecter with Blue Amp
subject: A Plague of Fools: Florida’s War on Sanity
body:
Why Ron DeSantis Wants Florida's Kids to Get Sick & Die

### After your HUGE response to our Labor Day Sale of [25% off Paid Subscriptions](https://substack.com/redirect/36a1870b-d13f-4287-b5da-3ff46d3b7357?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--and to celebrate the first Soundcheck Fund cohort _you helped fund_ --we've extended it thru the rest of the week! Support Democracy, [Get a Subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/36a1870b-d13f-4287-b5da-3ff46d3b7357?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)!
[I Want 25% Off Now!](https://substack.com/redirect/36a1870b-d13f-4287-b5da-3ff46d3b7357?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/41054947-8a06-486c-925e-a2eae209fe86?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Govenor Ron "Puddin' Fingers" DeSantis boldly declares science and modern medicine to be out of reach for Florida's schoolchildren.
The state of Florida has proven yet again that it leads the nation in bombast, buffoonery, and backsliding into the intellectual Stone Age.
With the fervor of a medieval mad man and the IQ of a doorstop, republican Governor Ron DeSantis has now declared war not just on science, but on the very concept of civilization itself.
His latest offense? [A plan to eradicate all childhood vaccine mandates.](https://substack.com/redirect/1da7b0eb-74bb-40d8-b47c-eed8c4298636?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
That's right: polio, measles, tetanus, chickenpox, and Hepatitis B -- those ancient plagues we once defeated--are now poised to make their triumphant return, courtesy of the Sunshine State's messiah of morons.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d581681c-65f9-43fc-ba77-d83887823d9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Ron "The Plague Bringer" DeSantis explaining why he doesn't care if schoolchildren die of preventable illnesses in Florida.
Thanks to DeSantis, Florida schools will be required to welcome any child, [even if that kid hasn't been vaccinated against anything](https://substack.com/redirect/1da7b0eb-74bb-40d8-b47c-eed8c4298636?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). If that child gets sick and spreads his plague to other kids and grownups, oh well.
And if anybody dies, well, that's just how it goes.
It takes a special kind of political depravity to look at the history of modern medicine--arguably humankind's biggest triumph--and decide it's the enemy. But DeSantis, ever the opportunistic oracle to the anti-intellectual, has managed to turn disease into a civil rights issue.
In this Floridian fantasyland, viruses are freedom fighters, bacteria are patriots, and public health is tyranny in drag. One wonders what's next: will hurricanes be hailed as expressions of meteorological liberty?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/da52e916-e1f8-4de0-bfbd-95066582d3dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A horrible reality that will be all too real for Florida's schoolchildren thanks to Ron DeSantis
Ron DeSantis, of course, is not alone. Standing shoulder to shoulder in this right-wing medical jihad is Florida Surgeon General Joseph Ladapo, a man who seems to have acquired his credentials from a backroom seminar held in a gas station.
With the [wild-eyed conviction of a snake oil salesman](https://substack.com/redirect/fb3954bd-204a-4c59-83c6-14b597093ebf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Ladapo likened childhood vaccines to "slavery"--an analogy so grotesque, so profoundly ahistorical, that it would make even a Confederate re-enactor spit out his chewing tobacco in disbelief.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b3e532ad-7722-4462-9471-31b2c5e6654e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Florida Surgeon General Joseph Ladapo, future fall guy in training, explaining why schoolchildren will have to get sick and possibly die from preventable illnesses in Florida.
If vaccines are slavery, then soap must be fascism, seatbelts are shackles, and antibiotics? A war crime.
The sheer lunacy of the "vaccines are slavery" comparison should have sent Ladapo packing to a padded wing of the nearest insane asylum. Instead, in Florida, he gets a state platform, a podium--and republican applause.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b60f68e2-be50-4aa2-860b-062fc7836c07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
One of these is actual, real historical slavery. Can you spot which one?
Make no mistake: this is not governance. [This is theater for the terminally gullible](https://substack.com/redirect/fb3954bd-204a-4c59-83c6-14b597093ebf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a calculated pander to the cranks and crackpots who think Dr. Anthony Fauci is the Antichrist and believe "natural immunity" is a plan, not a punchline.
[In place of evidence, we get vibes. ](https://substack.com/redirect/4934c556-850a-4cee-958b-726ec915eb64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In place of policy, paranoia.
And steering this clown car is DeSantis himself, the Ivy League MAGA ventriloquist, eager to burn science at the stake if it wins him a few more votes from the right wing conspiracy crowd.
The consequences, of course, will be paid not by the governor, nor by the MAGA maniacs cheering this madness from the bleachers of Facebook and social media.
Eventually, the bill will come due in kindergarten classrooms and pediatric hospitals, where innocent children--too young to vote, too young to choose--will be left exposed to diseases their great grandparents barely survived.
It is child sacrifice by another name, performed not in the name of progress or necessity, but to appease a political cult addicted to grievance and allergic to reason.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.qxgwINXTnkT2APZrMEYYHVHnrbks5qQzvu1IJ2wbBGc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=172916355)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/677aaea5-2982-4469-944d-97a98ac64326?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The victims of Florida Gov Ron DeSantis.
Meanwhile, across the country, [actual adults in California, Oregon, and Washington state are forming a coalition to protect public health](https://substack.com/redirect/e1ef2ac9-9faa-4c42-b869-8ccb4a4ed807?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and uphold evidence-based vaccine policy. While Florida burns its medical textbooks for fuel, other states are choosing to light the way forward.
One can only hope the virus respects state lines.
In the meantime, do not mistake this Florida nuttiness for a mere lapse in judgment. This is not a Florida man throwing a live alligator through a Wendy's drive through, or a Florida woman storming the U.S. Capitol on January 6 in a scuba mask, or a Floridian who stole an ambulance to drive home from the hospital because he was tired of waiting.
All of those actual incidents were personal dumb-ass choices.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/252c15e6-e183-4b02-9e67-e086a435b346?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Yes... This really happened. Alligator thrown through a drive thru window. Who does that? Florida does that.
Florida's government abandoning vaccines mandates for school children is intentional institutional sabotage. It is the gleeful dismantling of the very systems that made mass death a relic of the past.
It is idiocy elevated to doctrine, ignorance enshrined in law, and cowardice paraded as courage.
Once upon a time, the sunshine state was a symbol of vitality, vigor, and family vacations. Now, the state has opted for chaos and abandoning children to the whims of infection.
Instead of creating memories with your kids in the Everglades or on Disney theme park rides including Pirates of the Caribbean, just wait.
Suffering through Sepsis is coming.
* * *

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114748398/568024954/823540626?refcode=ea.fe764857-6f8b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.fe764857-6f8b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTc2NDg1Ny02ZjhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lom_qnEawnrtw0c-vO4mvzduWqYK7xsV9pGGwoRrne0=&emci=8a49d870-be89-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=fe764857-6f8b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=17205535)
I don’t mess around with something as important as representing the people of my home, Peter. Every race I’ve ever run, I’ve been in it to win — even when the odds seemed long. You’ve been there with me every time, and together, we’ve succeeded. Now, this election for the U.S. Senate may be our toughest challenge yet. So [**when I ask you to donate to our campaign, it’s because your contribution**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114748399/568024957/-1743631236?refcode=ea.fe764857-6f8b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.fe764857-6f8b-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTc2NDg1Ny02ZjhiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lom_qnEawnrtw0c-vO4mvzduWqYK7xsV9pGGwoRrne0=) could make the difference between victory and defeat. **Republicans see me as the top threat to their Senate majority. They know that we have the team, the support, and the momentum to win.** That means national attention will be on us. I will always be straightforward about this campaign: our plans, where we stand in the polls, what we expect to come, and what we need from you. Right now, we’re preparing for national GOP money groups to spend _hundreds of millions_ against us, and Democrats are being outraised by Republicans. Meanwhile, various polls have shown either a dead heat or us with a slight lead. **[I am asking you to contribute just $5 or another amount that fits in your budget today because we can’t afford to leave this race up to chance — or up to Republicans’ deep-pocketed donors and their dark-money groups. name: Shane Cory
subject: Back the Brave Men who Sacrificed for Tom Homan's Safety
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Liberty Fund
body:
Seven veterans answered the call without hesitation. A Navy SEAL quit his job, hugged his family, and shadowed Tom for 30 days.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17890028/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvemJoRVlVbUtrYg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDY/LbmNsUW9MU1drRA/qP2hpZHM9bmM1cVBTWlhBZnFlOExscw/gaLy0DA/sdk1245f96e)

| | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17890028/VaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuYW1lcmljYW5saWJlcnR5ZnVuZC5jb20vYWxmLWhvbWFuLTItbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDY/LbmNsUW9MU1drRA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxmLWhvbWFuLTImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxNDI0X3dyMQ/gaLy0DA/sfo31d06200)
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17890028/VaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuYW1lcmljYW5saWJlcnR5ZnVuZC5jb20vYWxmLWhvbWFuLTItbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDY/LbmNsUW9MU1drRA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxmLWhvbWFuLTImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxNDI0X3dyMQ/gaLy0DA/sfo31d06200) Dear Patriot,

Back in February, I told you the urgent story of how a team of veterans set aside everything to protect Tom Homan from a deadly threat when the government wouldn't.

It's worth retelling, especially now, as [**we face a tight deadline to cover final costs**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17890028/VaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuYW1lcmljYW5saWJlcnR5ZnVuZC5jb20vYWxmLWhvbWFuLTItbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDY/LbmNsUW9MU1drRA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxmLWhvbWFuLTImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxNDI0X3dyMQ/gaLy0DA/sfo31d06200).

**This is about real liberty—folks free to live without government interference or abandonment**.

It started with a disturbing call to a close friend and veteran on December 23rd.

Tom Homan, set to become Border Czar under President Trump, was already pushing bold plans to secure borders and deport criminal illegals. On Tucker, **Homan declared War on the Cartels before Trump was even sworn in.**

Tom called my friend for a clear reason. **A credible assassination plot against Tom had emerged, and Joe Biden's team did nothing** —leaving Tom and his family exposed.

Tom couldn’t sleep, and he’s the type of man that honestly doesn’t give a damn what happens to him – **his only concern was for his family and his wife he dearly loves**.

The Biden Admin refused to provide Tom with security, and Tom is like us. He can’t afford to spend hundreds of thousands of dollars out of his own pocket to ensure his own safety.

So, Tom did the next best thing and **called a combat veteran in our community**.

I got the next call from my friend who just got off the phone with Tom: “Shane, need you brother. Meet me and the boys at the G.”

Myself and a team of six other serious men were given the briefing and asked to set our lives aside until Inauguration Day when the Trump Admin could take over with a government protection team.

**No one hesitated.**

No one said, “let me check with work” or “let me ask my wife” (they all knew their wives would demand them to take the unpaid job – because we’d all do it for each other).

There were no second thoughts. Every man asked geared up and got to work to stand up the next morning.

The travel was non-stop.

Let me tell you, Tom Homan is a beast with unmatched energy, so we had to move faster than him with advance planning, extraction plans, etc.

No fancy equipment. No intel network**. Just hard men willing to do anything to keep a good man safe.**

But it came at a significant cost, and we have thousands of dollars in unpaid reimbursements we need to cover. [**Can you donate today and help cover the final costs?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17890028/VaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuYW1lcmljYW5saWJlcnR5ZnVuZC5jb20vYWxmLWhvbWFuLTItbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDY/LbmNsUW9MU1drRA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxmLWhvbWFuLTImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxNDI0X3dyMQ/gaLy0DA/sfo31d06200)

Seven veterans answered the call without hesitation. A Navy SEAL quit his job, hugged his family, and shadowed Tom for 30 days.

The squad: a Special Forces medic, three Army vets, three Marines—all pros in protection. Trackers, ex-LEO, extraction experts.

**Not fancy suits, but tough, bearded guardians who commanded respect and cleared crowds effortlessly.**

They logged over a dozen cross-country trips: advance scouts first, then Tom with the detail, plus family guards working with local cops we deeply appreciated.

Government-run, this would've bloated to hundreds of thousands monthly. **Our volunteers cut corners, but bills for travel and essentials piled up.**

Come January 20th, our SEAL delivered Tom safely to the inauguration, transferring to official protection. Job done.

But in February's appeal, we sought help for reimbursements and bonuses. [**Generous donors responded, yet a $5,720 gap lingers.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17890028/VaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuYW1lcmljYW5saWJlcnR5ZnVuZC5jb20vYWxmLWhvbWFuLTItbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDY/LbmNsUW9MU1drRA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxmLWhvbWFuLTImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxNDI0X3dyMQ/gaLy0DA/sfo31d06200)

Worse, one unpaid protector—a true patriot—has been footing these bills himself, straining his finances.

We must settle this in seven days. **[**Will you donate $75, $150, or any amount today to lift this burden?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17890028/VaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuYW1lcmljYW5saWJlcnR5ZnVuZC5jb20vYWxmLWhvbWFuLTItbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDY/LbmNsUW9MU1drRA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxmLWhvbWFuLTImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxNDI0X3dyMQ/gaLy0DA/sfo31d06200)** It's about honoring liberty-loving heroes.

Fast-forward: Tom's 2025 as Border Czar has been a triumph.

He's slashed illegal crossings by 70%, with encounters at historic lows.

Record deportations target criminals, eradicating threats and saving lives. Self-deportations surge as fear of enforcement spreads.

**ICE agents praise him as "one of their own,"** morale soaring under his 30+ years of experience.

But let's not overlook the volunteer veterans who enabled this.

That $5,720 must be paid soon. **[**Your gift of $35 or more could make all the difference—donate before the week ends.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17890028/VaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuYW1lcmljYW5saWJlcnR5ZnVuZC5jb20vYWxmLWhvbWFuLTItbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDY/LbmNsUW9MU1drRA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxmLWhvbWFuLTImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxNDI0X3dyMQ/gaLy0DA/sfo31d06200)**

Positive words about Tom abound this year.

From viral videos calling him a "hero crushing it" to Trump crediting him for plummeting stats, he's hailed for boosting safety without harming or stealing.

Government like Biden's breeds corruption; ALF works against it by taking on missions like this.

With urgency high, **[**please give what you can—$100 would help hugely**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17890028/VaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuYW1lcmljYW5saWJlcnR5ZnVuZC5jb20vYWxmLWhvbWFuLTItbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDY/LbmNsUW9MU1drRA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxmLWhvbWFuLTImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxNDI0X3dyMQ/gaLy0DA/sfo31d06200)****.**

Gratefully,
Shane Cory
President
American Liberty Fund
Veteran, United States Marine Corps

P.S. Biden's disregard for the plot against Tom still boils my blood. Our vets stepped up selflessly, and Tom's 2025 wins validate their risk. [**Help us clear the $5,720 shortfall in seven days.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17890028/VaHR0cHM6Ly9kb25hdGUuYW1lcmljYW5saWJlcnR5ZnVuZC5jb20vYWxmLWhvbWFuLTItbWItb20v/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDY/LbmNsUW9MU1drRA/qP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9YWxmLWhvbWFuLTImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1vbSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249bWImYW1vdW50PTI1JnV0bV90ZXJtPTIxNDI0X3dyMQ/gaLy0DA/sfo31d06200)

Paid for by American Liberty Fund

Contributions are not tax deductible. American Liberty Fund is organized as a Super PAC and as such, contributions limits and corporate donation restriction do not apply. Use of image and likeness of any candidate, politician or officeholder is strictly for the purposes of this organization's communications and in no way represents authorization, coordination (direct or indirect) or endorsement by that individual of any kind.

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e17890028/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MDY/LbmNsUW9MU1drRA/qP2hpZHM9bmM1cVBTWlhBZnFlOExscw/gaLy0DA/s4t21fae3b2)

Tom Homan, set to become Border Czar under President Trump, was already pushing bold plans to secure borders and deport criminal illegals. On Tucker, Homan declared War on the Cartels before Trump was even sworn in. Tom called my friend for a clear reason. A credible assassination plot against Tom had emerged, and Joe Biden's team did nothing —leaving Tom and his family exposed. Tom couldn’t sleep, and he’s the type of man that honestly doesn’t give a damn what happens to him – his only concern was for his family and his wife he dearly loves. The Biden Admin refused to provide Tom with security, and Tom is like us. He can’t afford to spend hundreds of thousands of dollars out of his own pocket to ensure his own safety. So, Tom did the next best thing and called a combat veteran in our community. I got the next call from my friend who just got off the phone with Tom: “Shane, need you brother. Meet me and the boys at the G.” Myself and a team of six other serious men were given the briefing and asked to set our lives aside until Inauguration Day when the Trump Admin could take over with a government protection team. No one hesitated. No one said, “let me check with work” or “let me ask my wife” (they all knew their wives would demand them to take the unpaid job – because we’d all do it for each other). There were no second thoughts. Every man asked geared up and got to work to stand up the next morning. The travel was non-stop. Let me tell you, Tom Homan is a beast with unmatched energy, so we had to move faster than him with advance planning, extraction plans, etc. No fancy equipment. No intel network. Just hard men willing to do anything to keep a good man safe. But it came at a significant cost, and we have thousands of dollars in unpaid reimbursements we need to cover. Seven veterans answered the call without hesitation. A Navy SEAL quit his job, hugged his family, and shadowed Tom for 30 days. The squad: a Special Forces medic, three Army vets, three Marines—all pros in protection. Trackers, ex-LEO, extraction experts. Not fancy suits, but tough, bearded guardians who commanded respect and cleared crowds effortlessly. They logged over a dozen cross-country trips: advance scouts first, then Tom with the detail, plus family guards working with local cops we deeply appreciated. Government-run, this would've bloated to hundreds of thousands monthly. Our volunteers cut corners, but bills for travel and essentials piled up. Come January 20th, our SEAL delivered Tom safely to the inauguration, transferring to official protection. Job done. But in February's appeal, we sought help for reimbursements and bonuses. Worse, one unpaid protector—a true patriot—has been footing these bills himself, straining his finances. We must settle this in seven days. It's about honoring liberty-loving heroes. Fast-forward: Tom's 2025 as Border Czar has been a triumph. He's slashed illegal crossings by 70%, with encounters at historic lows. Record deportations target criminals, eradicating threats and saving lives. Self-deportations surge as fear of enforcement spreads. ICE agents praise him as "one of their own," morale soaring under his 30+ years of experience. But let's not overlook the volunteer veterans who enabled this. That $5,720 must be paid soon. Positive words about Tom abound this year. From viral videos calling him a "hero crushing it" to Trump crediting him for plummeting stats, he's hailed for boosting safety without harming or stealing. Government like Biden's breeds corruption; ALF works against it by taking on missions like this. With urgency high, . Gratefully, Shane Cory President American Liberty Fund Veteran, United States Marine Corps P.S. Biden's disregard for the plot against Tom still boils my blood. Our vets stepped up selflessly, and Tom's 2025 wins validate their risk. Contributions are not tax deductible. American Liberty Fund is organized as a Super PAC and as such, contributions limits and corporate donation restriction do not apply. Use of image and likeness of any candidate, politician or officeholder is strictly for the purposes of this organization's communications and in no way represents authorization, coordination (direct or indirect) or endorsement by that individual of any kind.

name: Team Justice Democrats
subject: We just announced Angela Torres’ candidacy to replace Jimmy Gomez. Now, we need your help:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Our second endorsement is finally here! After months of preparation,
Angela is the newest progressive challenger we are excited to share with
you — and just the beginning of many more candidates we are ready to
support this cycle.

None of this would’ve been possible without the incredible local community
organizing and candidate recruitment that everyday people just like you
made possible with small, grassroots donations. Together over the years,
we’ve built a national movement.

But taking on Rep. Jimmy Gomez isn’t going to be easy. While he’s accepted
millions from Corporate PACs, AIPAC, and Crypto lobbies, Angela is relying
on the everyday people of California’s 34th District and across the
country who are ready to put in 110% to elect a real progressive champion.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250906-2-at?refcode=em20250906-36994&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36994_1203867_mQUWg2&akid=36994%2E1203867%2EmQUWg2 ]That’s why we’re raising as much as we can for Angela from purely
small-dollar, grassroots donors. Will you help us get there with a
$5 donation right now?

Angela is a born-and-raised Angeleno who understands her community’s most
pressing issues because she’s lived them.

* Growing up in East LA as the daughter of a deportee and a single
mother, she experienced the terrifying reality of family separation
firsthand, after her father was deported when Angela was just 15.
* Her mother was left to raise Angela and her 3 sisters alone overnight
— a nightmare more and more families across Los Angeles, Chicago, DC,
and beyond are experiencing as Trump and his ICE goons take over and
terrify communities nationwide.
* Since 2017, the working-class community Angela grew up in and still
lives in today has been represented by Rep. Jimmy Gomez — a politician
who’d like you to think he’s a progressive, but who, in reality, has
left his community behind. Since coming into office: he has taken
millions from AIPAC, voted to pass Trump’s corrupt crypto agenda, and
sold out to corporate industries like private equity and real estate.
Gomez’s campaign relies on the same lobbies that fuel Trump’s rise,
destabilize our economy, and displace our neighbors — while families
in Los Angeles are struggling to even survive.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250906-2-at?refcode=em20250906-36994&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36994_1203867_mQUWg2&akid=36994%2E1203867%2EmQUWg2 ]This race is about a young, working-class Angeleno running to represent
the working-class community she was born and raised in, versus a corporate
politician who has turned his back on that very community for some PAC
checks. Make a donation right now that will go 100% to Angela’s grassroots
campaign.

But while Gomez went to Washington DC and closed the door on his
constituents, Angela’s lifelong community is at the center of her campaign
and vision for the district. From seeing her neighbors, teachers, and
classmates come together to support her family after her father’s
deportation, to watching her mom work two and three jobs to make ends
meet, to serving as the President of her local elected Neighborhood
Council, Angela’s experiences are the foundation of her values, advocacy,
and unwavering commitment to fight for working families like her own.

Angela can take Jimmy on and win, but it’s going to take a groundswell of
grassroots support from this progressive movement. This race isn’t just
about Los Angeles — it’s about whether our Congress will be powered by
working-class fighters like Angela, or bought off by corporate PACs and
Trump’s billionaire backers like Jimmy Gomez was.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250906-2-at?refcode=em20250906-36994&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36994_1203867_mQUWg2&akid=36994%2E1203867%2EmQUWg2 ]Let’s kick our second 2026 endorsement off strong! Rush
$5 or more to help send Angela to Congress and give
Angelenos the representation they deserve.

In solidarity,

Team JD

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250906-36994-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36994_1203867_mQUWg2&akid=36994%2E1203867%2EmQUWg2

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36994%2E1203867%2EmQUWg2

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Hear me out:
Weeks ago, I arranged a meeting at the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency’s headquarters in Springfield, Virginia. Engagements such as these are a core part of my responsibility to provide oversight and support to our intelligence community. **And they have never been questioned or politicized... until now.**
Earlier this week, conspiracy theorist Laura Loomer discovered the unpublicized visit and launched a campaign of baseless attacks against me. And then, Trump’s henchmen canceled my visit.
**I can’t overstate how unprecedented and dangerous this is.** This administration is taking its marching orders from Laura Loomer – a wackjob with a long history of outlandish fringe views, including 9/11 denialism, anti-Muslim harassment campaigns, and associations with white supremacists.
Let me be clear: I will never be deterred from carrying out my constitutional responsibilities. The business of government and the security of our nation will not be dictated by extremist attention‐seekers.
**But for goodness sake – I can’t be in this fight alone. And right now, the silence from my Republican colleagues is speaking volumes.** It doesn’t matter how dangerous, reckless, or irresponsible the Trump administration acts, too many of my Republican colleagues would rather fall in line than stand up for what is right.
I’ve never been more determined to hold this critical seat for Democrats and flip the balance of power in Congress.
**[_Join me and Kirsten Gillibrand with an emergency donation today to help us fight back, defeat Trump’s Republicans in the midterms, and flip the Senate. Your donation will be split between my reelection campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114748441/568025173/491263923?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.06_Mark-Warner-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTk0ZDEyNy03MThiLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fKXiw4oPPuGWDVj07LHsVNnV2Jay22hoa5Zxw_E4Grk=)**

clean_body: I’ll be honest, folks: I’m livid. And that’s not a statement I make lightly. The Trump administration is taking its marching orders from a fringe conspiracy theorist who’s associated with white supremacists and 9/11 denialism – and it’s directly undermining our career intelligence professionals. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mark Warner and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Hear me out: Weeks ago, I arranged a meeting at the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency’s headquarters in Springfield, Virginia. Engagements such as these are a core part of my responsibility to provide oversight and support to our intelligence community. And they have never been questioned or politicized... until now. Earlier this week, conspiracy theorist Laura Loomer discovered the unpublicized visit and launched a campaign of baseless attacks against me. And then, Trump’s henchmen canceled my visit. I can’t overstate how unprecedented and dangerous this is. This administration is taking its marching orders from Laura Loomer – a wackjob with a long history of outlandish fringe views, including 9/11 denialism, anti-Muslim harassment campaigns, and associations with white supremacists. Let me be clear: I will never be deterred from carrying out my constitutional responsibilities. The business of government and the security of our nation will not be dictated by extremist attention‐seekers. But for goodness sake – I can’t be in this fight alone. And right now, the silence from my Republican colleagues is speaking volumes. It doesn’t matter how dangerous, reckless, or irresponsible the Trump administration acts, too many of my Republican colleagues would rather fall in line than stand up for what is right. I’ve never been more determined to hold this critical seat for Democrats and flip the balance of power in Congress. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Mark Warner and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = The fight continues, Mark Warner = * =

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: Here’s the deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
In a race this close and with the stakes this high, we need to have the resources to be able to fight back, and we can only do that with your support.
Hey, I know my team and I have been emailing you a lot recently asking for your support. But I wanted to take a second to explain why your support matters in this crucial race.
Not only is my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, endorsed by Donald Trump – he’s also a faithful advocate for the most disastrous elements of Trump’s agenda, and wants to implement them here in New Jersey. He was one of the _biggest cheerleaders_ for the Republican price hike bill that will throw hundreds of thousands of New Jerseyans off their health care.
And now, Ciattarelli’s being supported by a MAGA super PAC that’s pouring _millions of dollars_ into negative ads that make one false assertion after another about my record and my character.
**[In a race this close and with the stakes this high, we need to have the resources to be able to fight back, and we can only do that with your support. Can you split $10 (or whatever you can) between my campaign and Heartland Patriots so we can stop our opponent and protect New Jersey?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94428?refcode=em20250906-9375&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9375%2E614464%2E60WdDe)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will process your contribution to Mikie Sherrill and Heartland Patriots instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94429?refcode=em20250906-9375&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=9375%2E614464%2E60WdDe) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94429?refcode=em20250906-9375&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=9375%2E614464%2E60WdDe) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94429?refcode=em20250906-9375&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=9375%2E614464%2E60WdDe) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94429?refcode=em20250906-9375&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=9375%2E614464%2E60WdDe) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94429?refcode=em20250906-9375&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=9375%2E614464%2E60WdDe) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94429?refcode=em20250906-9375&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=9375%2E614464%2E60WdDe) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94428?refcode=em20250906-9375&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=9375%2E614464%2E60WdDe)
---
But this race isn’t about what we’re fighting against — it’s about what we’re fighting _for._
**My vision for our state is simple: Make life better for New Jerseyans.** I’ll fight to bring health care, housing, child care, and energy costs down, tackle crime and keep our communities safe, and defend our constitutional freedoms from the right-wing extremists who are taking our nation down a destructive path.
Here’s the deal — we’re in an extremely competitive race, but lots of voters still haven’t made up their minds. **[Your support helps us spread our message across New Jersey, so we can build the coalition we need to win this race. That’s why I’m humbly asking you to split a contribution between my campaign and Heartland Patriots — it’ll make a critical difference in helping us protect New Jersey.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94428?refcode=em20250906-9375&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9375%2E614464%2E60WdDe)**
**[DONATE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94428?refcode=em20250906-9375&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9375%2E614464%2E60WdDe)**
Thank you,
Mikie

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---

name: Announcement from Trump
subject: I'm doing a name change!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
The Department of Defense will be known as the Department of War.
| | | | From President Trump To **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**

---
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
**_[Friend, I’m doing a name change!>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
Yesterday, I signed an executive order bringing forth a new age for our GREAT MILITARY: we now have the **DEPARTMENT OF WAR!**
Under my leadership, the Department of War will be the STRONGEST military in history!
The last time it was called this, America was unstoppable.
🇺🇲 We won World War I. 🇺🇲 We won World War II. 🇺🇲 The world respected us. Our enemies feared us.
**WE NEED AMERICA FIRST. WE NEED STRENGTH. WE NEED PEACE. Victory! That's what the Department of War is all about!**
I am also instructing our new "Secretary of War,” PETE HEGSETH, to propose legislative and executive actions to make the change permanent.
But before Congress even gets to vote, I want to hear from a very special person — **YOU!**
**🚨OFFICIAL TRUMP SURVEY 🚨**
Do you approve of me renaming the Department of Defense to **THE DEPARTMENT OF WAR?**
**_[👉YES, I APPROVE](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
**_[👉NO, I DO NOT](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**

[SECURE RESPONSE LINK](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23373%2E4449941%2EMS-TiR) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23373%2E4449941%2EMS-TiR) [**“DON'T BEND THE KNEE TO TRUMP”**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68219?t=3&akid=23373%2E4449941%2EMS-TiR)
[_Cory Booker to fellow members of the Democratic Party_](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68219?t=4&akid=23373%2E4449941%2EMS-TiR) []()
Cory Booker has done something extraordinary: he’s spoken truth to power, challenging Donald Trump directly and condemning those who would surrender their integrity by bending to his will.

_Our Democracy truly depends on leaders like him._

If you share our gratitude for Cory’s unwavering voice, please add your name to our thank-you card before 11:59PM tonight. **THANK YOU, CORY BOOKER!!** | [SIGN THE CARD BEFORE 11:59PM >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68219?t=5&akid=23373%2E4449941%2EMS-TiR)
---
**↓↓ SEE CARD BELOW ↓↓**

Senator,

I want to sincerely thank you for your powerful words and unwavering courage in speaking out against Donald Trump.

In moments like these, leadership matters. Your voice inspires hope, strengthens resolve, and reminds us that integrity still has a place in politics. Please know that your words are heard, felt, and deeply appreciated by so many of us across the country.

Thank you for showing us what it means to lead with conviction and to fight for what’s right.

With gratitude,

x _YOUR NAME HERE_

name: Team Spanberger
subject: If you oppose Trump's agenda, this can't wait
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114748847/568026536/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-06_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2FlY2VjMzQtNzU4Yi1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1J33CswnJupmIfl3s3GX5pt0tFMogQq9XZl_RK17sbA=)
Peter, Democrats only have _one shot_ to flip a Governor's office in 2025. _And here are what the polls say about Abigail Spanberger's chances:_
**First:** Republicans took control of the governorship in Virginia, eking out a two-point victory in 2021.

name: Team Tina
subject: Guided by science, not politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Tina is joining forces with Gavin Newsom and Bob Ferguson |
#
---
Peter, Big News: Tina just joined forces with Governors in California, Washington and Hawaii to form the West Coast Health Alliance! This new partnership is a commitment to ensuring that the health and safety of West Coast residents are guided by science — not politics. Let’s be clear: Donald Trump’s firing of leading CDC doctors and scientists — and his blatant politicization of the agency — is a direct assault on the health and safety of the American people. The CDC has become a political tool that increasingly peddles ideology instead of science, and folks’ health is at stake. Oregon, Washington, California, and Hawaii will not allow ideology to govern when peoples’ lives are on the line. We will ensure vaccine and immunization recommendations are guided by scientists, not politicians or conspiracy theorists. **Through this alliance, we’re protecting public health and safeguarding our future. ** But we can't do this alone. We need your support to keep moving forward and stay focused on creating policies that protect our communities. Your contribution ensures we can continue critical work like this without compromising our values. This new partnership is a commitment to ensuring that the health and safety of West Coast residents are guided by science — not politics. Let’s be clear: Donald Trump’s firing of leading CDC doctors and scientists — and his blatant politicization of the agency — is a direct assault on the health and safety of the American people. The CDC has become a political tool that increasingly peddles ideology instead of science, and folks’ health is at stake. Oregon, Washington, California, and Hawaii will not allow ideology to govern when peoples’ lives are on the line. We will ensure vaccine and immunization recommendations are guided by scientists, not politicians or conspiracy theorists. Through this alliance, we’re protecting public health and safeguarding our future. But we can't do this alone. We need your support to keep moving forward and stay focused on creating policies that protect our communities. Your contribution ensures we can continue critical work like this without compromising our values. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for standing with us in this fight for science, truth, and the well-being of all Oregonians. Together, let’s build a healthier, more equitable future. — Team Tina Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

name: Real Texas PAC
subject: We've entered a new phase of fascism, Peter. It's time to get in the game.
body:
Peter, let’s not sugarcoat it: Trump is using the U.S. military to institute authoritarian rule city by city — and threatening to arrest anyone who stands in his way.
🔻 Calling up the Marines
🔻 Sending in the National Guard to 19 American cities
🚫 Protesters brutalized. Silenced. Shackled.
🔗 Mass arrests sweeping Washington, D.C.
🚨 Terrified mothers, fathers, and children, yanked off the streets and put into unmarked vans
❗ ❗ ❗ Now he's threatening SPECIFIC cities, TAUNTING governors that he doesn't like... this is TERRIFYING, and unless we act now, it is JUST THE BEGINNING ❗ ❗ ❗
This is fascism. This is lawless, brutal, and deliberate.
And we can’t respond with polite statements or vague concerns.
We need a surge of grassroots resistance — now.
We’re raising emergency funds to support Democrats on the frontlines who will launch rapid-response ads, organize campaigns, and mount legal challenges. This can’t wait. If we let this stand, it will only get worse. Chip in $15 or more right now to help us crush this authoritarian power grab before it spreads further. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=090625_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?express_lane=true&refcode=090625_2&amount=5]

Tomorrow, it could be your governor. Your mayor. Your city under military occupation. This is how it starts — and how democracy ends.
Stand up. Speak out. Fight back. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=090625_2]
Thanks for doing the right thing,
Real Texas PAC

name: GOTV PAC
subject: 12 races in Virginia need your help!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
This year, Virginia’s House of Delegates elections are a proving ground for Democrats nationwide. The balance of power is razor-thin, and these races will shape the momentum we carry into 2026.
Republicans are leaning on Trump’s playbook: divisive culture-war attacks, billionaire donors, and disinformation campaigns designed to keep people home on Election Day.
At GOTV PAC, we’re pushing back the way we know best: by powering texting and phone banking programs in 12 critical Virginia House of Delegates races. These are the tools that reach voters directly, cut through the noise, and make sure every supporter gets to the polls.
Can you donate today to help fuel our Virginia operations and build the turnout Democrats need? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09062025]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

-Team GOTV PAC

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Something powerful happened…
body:
---
Derek, In the last few weeks, we’ve sent several messages focused on Trump and his allies’ attempts to dismantle our democracy — by redrawing congressional maps, threatening to attack voting by mail, and even sending the National Guard into cities like Washington, D.C., as a means of consolidating power. We’ll be honest: We did not know how Democrats would respond to messages like these — especially after such a draining reality of living under the Trump administration. But after we sent those initial messages, something powerful happened: Teri from Utah chipped in $5. A few minutes later, Suzanne from Texas contributed $10. Then, Carlos from New Jersey pitched in $15. And suddenly, we had a whole movement of people committed to fighting back against Trump’s authoritarianism.
